name: Josh
subject: I have a tough decision to make tonight
body:
Our deadline is in 5 hours!
Hey Peter, I hope you're hanging in there.
I’m reaching out one more time before tonight’s end-of-month deadline because right now we’re falling short of our goal, and I have a tough decision to make.
I’ll be honest: it has been a brutal month. Trump just launched a wave of TV ads in my district, and our fundraising has not been where we need it to be.
Tonight I’m making a big decision about how much we can put behind our response ads. But we can't run a single ad unless we hit our goal by midnight. So I’m asking everyone on this team to step up.
Will you please rush in a donation to help us keep California’s 9th district blue?
Here is a link: [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-May2025-FR-May &refcode2=Peter**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108752291/548905223/-1759382976?&refcode=E13512-20250531-EOMDeadline-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWM5YjM4NjYtN2IzZS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=v1viNcBLbAAwq7w2COsyeOfo3Pcb8KRXQzOFP94pRG0=)
Thanks for having my back,
— Josh

Josh Harder for Congress
PO Box 4220
Manteca, CA 95337
United States

name: Maxwell's iPhone
subject: really quick
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey Peter, it’s Maxwell. I just wanted to reach out with a quick update before the end of the night.

We’re only $1,043 short of our May End of Month goal. I just pulled out my phone and did the math, and that means I only need 149 more supporters to chip in $7.

We’re so close! I know we can get there, but we only have 4 more hours until my midnight deadline. So please, can you chip in just $7 before the end of the night?

Here’s a link where you can make a donation. I’ll be keeping an eye out for yours! [**_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/maf-em-pge?refcode=20250531_em_fr_b1_followup_en-rs &amount;=7_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/_7msunhmyKsLUCQTB3lBlA~~/AAPPABA~/QFxHyCKvWkNcUZN1mC90mtiYxrFNGBdfVc_p10qShAv2_pFQSN5l3KZthQO1n8cuqZIFqdDcSBDQgZswEzLn4YuUt32PyeRZhnwPcvrxzD1h-ru1AgBrcacPf_wq2wMYPNTg0xHXSn2okVyKqmhVtGg7b5eRreKbmzVAursUV1JRwYsHaCufx2aAbil_6ac7nWyEiHRCT1NxK7Jjw4U4VIIburpkRfQ9Wm1CPOGt5FAnxPLPaMnI4o48NPJGDed-XQIDA0Raa5sA8SVDtYvT5w0wJ91y7QZCXaG70n-WjefHMFAUINUePUIBnA3wmKU2NIz58Tg06bPcYf3VKxfMqUzxYajdlhpWtuPX78KaOQ8~)**

subject: r.e. Amy Klobuchar, Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren [PLEASE]
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23104%2E4449941%2Eehu4mi) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23104%2E4449941%2Eehu4mi) [ **_PLEASE READ THIS BEFORE YOU GO:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61698?amount=5&amounts=25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=3&akid=23104%2E4449941%2Eehu4mi)

We were starting to think that NOBODY cares about a Constitutional Amendment to OVERTURN _Citizens United._

_But luckily, everything just CHANGED:_

**Top Democrats are banding together to PASS a Constitutional Amendment to crush _Citizens United!_

** ✅ Elizabeth Warren ✅
✅ Amy Klobuchar ✅
✅ Chuck Schumer ✅
✅ Bernie Sanders ✅
✅ Adam Schiff ✅ [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61698?amount=5&amounts=25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=4&akid=23104%2E4449941%2Eehu4mi) | | [ASAP: RUSH $5 NOW TO OVERTURN _CITIZENS UNITED_ >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61698?amount=5&amounts=25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=5&akid=23104%2E4449941%2Eehu4mi)
---
THIS IS AMAZING, LOOK!!!

We must do EVERYTHING in our power to see this through... so we’re RUSHING to raise $50,000 before midnight to stand with these Democrats and OVERTURN _Citizens United!_

We don’t have a second to waste! We need 3 more Democrats in your area to chip in before midnight.

[ **_We’re desperately asking you. Can you PLEASE rush anything before 11:59 PM to help us hit our critical $50,000 goal? >>_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61698?amount=5&amounts=25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=6&akid=23104%2E4449941%2Eehu4mi) | [DONATE $5 >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61698?amount=5&amounts=25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=7&akid=23104%2E4449941%2Eehu4mi)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers
body:
| | |
---
| | Dear Peter, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/F2M507w5d_SgD_5oDRCvEaVo3hBbcYPGOyhgA5iYG0Okamk-OweEAld0hqwpmayh2KFjuBc-5FKovtkagwkZbC_Pmz8_OU2KNAl-XNqx1CCjelPNjQp5Ir9FY5byw7sg6BhdgD_efsnmpWqFffTGfdJtl8N-5q1KP6FNyDZ5W9jRMmF7P8FTjEvnDCnqHSJL1tVD8w7myDJzetibzX7vJ_AxUWxrx8Hk05L8ZLvLqTssCQ3MdZ206clD-kmf1-JPltXrukWJ7HNOQ21mXMb5hilIc9a_eKBiJnnPpIdp4w95GVZE21r2_noyzdv-QBMgSago-GB5euawGsext1gCHqJdwN-ugfLmRHhRPIm-hjBXjKUojP64Am0dCDtrLHgkC7LJldOmgn5tVwaoBGQxyl4x_uZqvGsMrW0r0UxLfGZlR_TfKFf-EdslmnJMTlXEmOPGxKVOSCv2nHrfqVyiFreant1bCuo7AFd_uCrb-D2MtwAOWiIDT8nhzLmszWT78Dzez77o/lZKIu2vWsS7xo616sdFmLzIEkYW9-YV6/9)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to support the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/DMY4IrRvfCqDnZ63X6qAuxt8Y5x4_Xzl6yRq5DyPSDtiA0Oi1peIeuz4PwxpW2VhdiJAg-S1-6RV-nrfB1ZEwzsJlUcftbNiE1wpZI7R5V3AY1OYwdqvKIroScb9wKbG_48SlvPHh4DkJohXSj1j__wnUTd_3nGqd7SYOE07BqbmdgJ1D4DWpCsr5bZpkTfAjTmTXnfhV8ZIzF5FL1Hboo3mp_xaDyTmq4hYUjy1o3eNvdYZjVe5JWFESrWkfkszDc4e9OPSC-aLwfk_D4zGk_hNiEO8wz3s_CqwUHwea2SgT_2FzhFM0IyL7SkgFJ1-KO9tJ67-9DUnVySUOP3VSy7drmG0CvymGS-bq2-XHDIy_WBmP5IW5AWwwCHnO8V1bIgBVh7Wi6c48E4Bp2HJwunOxcfsO1rLM-45oEV3eor6wAu8ifBoAlQvFKkV-MU8LugJx9x6gWS2DDSu4v5CcGnVnL2ebV0GI39AYyfyzdyuKuEjT2DNCwH15VH6NG_2mJPjzFca/HeYBB76q7iyQrZjazMYJvIaxbEtyJaTY/9) And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing:_ Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[Because I can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/uVyfnb85H4FM5ahCDP9cBiV64eY47Pj8rnn5-QIwGDAPJ14EhRTkmkEvJWR4X2E7BVMAWDTXeOHjfIUejxV0J2E4X9zOWcxL1AzsW6imdIN650EBSiASCxd1P222Gyld4AZxRBwNQ_9cr1_h0Zwk-xKOIGyeRbnLEmJhkYPVl4_xqCg68-iouiGMHJnVpP0D988RgClE4TkzauT3Ve1v2TOgmSGse8NhJrikcwAyyFBSGvd_PIzQXQDweSErXCNCNDaEQ_RXBA093U97C4AJkeKr3dJP1G597BbaFdT_6gQ4i3YmeZwUGJV-_3YqiRw0LOTHlXvDt1ApXFIyo2vZw5CMhYztxNMMofvPedlgkcSwCk1hm4YZlBkbHGwm-XgUhk0QPKDBbxrQoOawxGuzFj7V6WumogWlaO2LHKGzgLj8yzlt0GxhC89E9OZ0WgGzPJy8FujLZPzuw98cbys3JWTw1UG57x8B1m3AM3es6Rm3CEj0f0CHVJsnsGY6WdksBeHnyngN/km83V18Hq1ejVz-w8SwV7k2v2U6HGPDM/9)** Millions of families are already watching Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. [**That’s why I’m asking you to help us finish Season Two of**** _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_****by giving a gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/MPAn8h3gUZqDlWiTGzKe2VSs-I51uV8GvKIwWg8dceuCoFFIggl06ogF6bHKKCn9CcCQp351QSmcrETEI4hnbHIc74mWx8XBDT3c6v0w4OSU0OWQ3b9RTc2F_kDsizGaBg7ybBqlD2_gfIYuGPSopA6yjfyzVSKg-giOIxmjQK5vNIAOlNvXiW7L-5VARYsdjXsCSiZxnuqXSKZ8bzyYiyGAm-Aajud_7gFIilnDb0cIceRGfRfSrdQUKLrTYOIUJHsQNlxhgxmNZkL0zDQLsePsyYzP559fQId9lLYrY-_NzZ1_N6E7OQIGVRvo65Y3oub-8QOMIlAm-nG49ThM5dC8vbSrEfn01jQY3Lr27-ECWrB2Kllx_NMYBaUUVMmm4RU-e_EUydQoYAyoFxJVC6829pc_qRaXvItGKkwroJkGtWXy1ZboUoK7yuqbZkAGM_JudNg_MvcbOnznOe5KBSok5M5Z63fPUC62gDRBzFWZo70c3_ccHH2AESHclmGN7hzhtGtx/nc6AAPSm8LhuUeE9fKdcbGrJFHsFe81J/9)**** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower – please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special “Thank You” for your **[gift of $50 or more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/XTlRW-3k00-W86XJVmF4c9zhyYQGiL4tX5X9XPS1ISpeQoQ_BBfpiZGEq7jfHI65bCzHoqn6P0AfcKTy2xhegfY1B5WqSUWB3nHNid_lusYz0wMVfs8kYtnDIxMxRE2ZJbMPCfOby2RKmCvDb5epx9eHQZ3CaKKQlqlQpQGPlpuElN9QI-KVi75m8Lfky9KLWWltDQ0-muRpsfqXSQoaXShHdUNlYiKg5xVGCZL8cX8Ulyin8EkUSIewuqL-SSkx5qSHDlSNE93NhVOktFOe29cJLE2eXwgHaKkwboPWiwRb2Fdp0bsreeHmUzo80atjoig1iGW7C52F4AFb0U1y6TFYymBIXs643r4JQqpPDElXwducyDrhik0CU25j9Z9vdjC4XFnW5W3RCxKYzpj5R4JqV41Mc9kf21Pp6BoERM67u8DjPL42Uf9034lOMAGfPKh2DAw-spptPPiTQckjzrLAg5fkoswJdmOjFMOYWDOlUlVUHpCqYWmydIaDSFAY16eVWELb/DD2jKZjawVnVyi9l2XtU6Twvaree8dCx/9)** , I’ll send you Season One of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your [**gift of $100 or more**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/79COk9OVbjey7RHgI8r0StyVJUDxMnVsifRm7KnTFIWsteadmRjefwQB3g5ZuMAgwczJIE32v7I2gJi87H25VycqPNHxDGAx4rIbW8WVEiTT7xeIrrcbgYOepCHmRVug5dLmFw7aZGWvb4c47dJXCtci9YCEl_efIruLkgrM2R0gMQqPtj3nYQo0O-3DasB2vYzmsoxuVDTc2RQQcs4n6PJXDWCVXYu_KVv3A0mmYJmZaxTYfPh9IEn--mwCUfCO2SS4ycmHsMgMxb0BlZy2zKZMv9XQIsAodSLzjprRFz8UVppYvr8NSolrArS9XAahO0NutoevpgQGBss_YHmvRkZKBwTzIhiFeufnKnttL6PVUYttlY8ARrrvd_IY2nHSHeLezY6_LzzMJua-dg5A5NnG_VX8_a3tEhU_8WwGQmgs7UQ9euy3gGxuH6Kh6GXje2MtTiyjnUUSbXedNkRON0I547474UWASQdaRPySO7to3RrRmrdEjp_t0vvwxlA_zMzC7SuZ/80ckRI8seMwhXnCyBh4UpVn3TzHPc45r/9), I’ll also send you a copy of my children’s book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books – the same God-focused conservative team that’s bringing _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ to life. Maybe you’ve seen me and other BRAVE Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Lara Trump, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D’Souza, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, and so many more have written a BRAVE Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, BRAVE Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. **[But I hope you’ll be a part of history by supporting _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. ](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/ZCJ051NuPkGbyRzRQO-rwn2v2H_Ttela6yc9dS3Aqw8XwP_1DtNEziukrrjR8znQzWpy6kdTF8yFjG3cQagmob6i0dNUyDjAQ3LCjahyf53NDTDUnl04vxuPupeYUAKSO_3RnmW1T7WX5G7w9FHc0DYfvhORdGpR06G04XE4yYb8eS5lRadok6_5j1uLy65egvULCzva9Kay08KZHl203ENyBetM_oLoT7UXpYSQ2UGpy5XZU-2tyR7uzSeC6FKw_L6PaMvPadyad-SjrMnB4YeDRnvxB7HkjwW_RxynGHUc_IW9i8FojJulYtqZ2y-3ry-S0pYlpUfHnitDieXx07lSTiq_kxzvy24RBwMPh95pxL3jctDqmQjEMbVhk-SPgq9MDKKHDh_dVgxtkTvd6EPDqs4l3KIjgv_K48TV0gMGXhFmNnWMxi2O7naAq-3Ffh1VjYHC8bMaqs_ZLx6gHIghH2fgdYlXlxNXGmnDztxj0gZx9mKWtL03-nWhl9FLCKpouny6/BjpDNF_5EPvXduP9a3NUXqauDPGogcUy/9)** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth. Thank you for joining us in the fight.
---
Sincerely,

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Peter, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. And it’s only possible with the help of grandparents and seniors like you. Introducing: Iggy and Mr. Kirk.This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children’s show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of the truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children’s show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Millions of families are already watching Season One of Iggy and Mr. Kirk on our streaming service BRAVE+, YouTube, and on DVD. And the reviews from parents, grandparents, and kids are incredible. One Mom of three little girls told us: “Our family was struggling through a pretty difficult day. But I turned on Iggy and Mr. Kirk and that was exactly what my heart needed as much as theirs.” It’s amazing that your simple response to this letter can make that kind of difference for a family. Each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. ** Whether you can send $35, $25,000, anything in between, or anything higher or lower – please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As a special “Thank You” for your , I’ll send you Season One of Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE on DVD. And with your , I’ll also send you a copy of my children’s book: Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches children to be humble before God instead of prideful. I wrote Pride Comes Before the Fall with the great team at BRAVE books – the same God-focused conservative team that’s bringing Iggy and Mr. Kirk to life. Maybe you’ve seen me and other BRAVE Books authors on Fox News, Newsmax, TBN or other media outlets. Unabashed conservatives like Riley Gaines, Lara Trump, Kevin Sorbo, Missy Robertson, Dinesh D’Souza, John Solomon, Jack Posobiec, and so many more have written a BRAVE Book to stop the Hollywood groomers. Supported by you, BRAVE Books gives parents the tools they need to rebuild our families and reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon. Now I know there are a lot of places you can spend your money in the next ten minutes. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth. Thank you for joining us in the fight. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. body:
| | Hey Peter – I hate to email you on a Saturday night, but I wouldn’t reach out if it wasn’t important. Our re-election campaign is picking up steam and gaining attention by the day.

There’s still a long road ahead, but with attacks from the far-right and outside spending already pouring in, we must be ready to fight back now.

If you can, please pitch in here before our midnight deadline: [https://go.marieforcongress.com/a/may](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108753001/548916360/544333919?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_WL_250531_3_11&refcode2=0f61992e-7e3e-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjYxOTkyZS03ZTNlLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hN1pqNCm4xR7lD1-bKVi9cFbxQuuEwmVt4rUFSFvtRM=)

Marie

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Do you have a minute?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Last time I’ll reach out today. I promise.

| Hey there, it’s Jane again. I know it’s Saturday night, but I wouldn’t reach out again unless it really mattered. **We only have a few hours left before our May fundraising deadline comes to a close, and we’re still short of our $60,000 fundraising goal.** I’ve said it before: JanePAC runs on grassroots power. No lobbyist money. Just people like you, stepping up when we need you most. This is one of those moments. The money we raise before tonight’s deadline will allow us to boost the climate leaders we’ve already endorsed, expand our map, and make sure they have what it takes to go toe to toe with Big Oil’s millions. That’s why your contribution today is so important, and it’s why I have to ask: **Would you be able to chip in to help us reach our goal and power our work ahead?** It would mean the world right now. Here’s a direct link to make a last-minute contribution: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jane-bax-email?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108753129/548921691/2105508926?refcode=ea.5ef55194-7f3e-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.5ef55194-7f3e-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlZjU1MTk0LTdmM2UtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wAZOJtw-8ksGiugrjgMQBho7JrqKoAMfuxYOYlvfR8w=)** I can’t thank you enough, – Jane

| Peter– I’m reaching out one more time before the end of the month to ask: Can you pitch in $6 or any amount before midnight? We’re so close to reaching our May goal. Here’s a direct link: [_**http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rs_er4c_fr_q22025**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108753153/548921734/1131891713?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.05.31_EOM4_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTI1YmJiOS03ZjNlLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z5BpOtdCPUm2IzkbqqPQi4O-RM0fYJEvqpjGxUU46H8=) Standing up to the Trump agenda and flipping the House next year will take a sustained effort from all of us – that means we can’t afford to miss a single deadline between now and November 2026. clean_body: | Peter– I’m reaching out one more time before the end of the month to ask: Can you pitch in $6 or any amount before midnight? We’re so close to reaching our May goal. Here’s a direct link: = Standing up to the Trump agenda and flipping the House next year will take a sustained effort from all of us – that means we can’t afford to miss a single deadline between now and November 2026. When people-powered candidates have resources early, they can plan better budgets, hire staff, and communicate their message — which in turn brings more grassroots support. The more we raise now, the better we’ll be able to provide early support to Democrats in competitive races this year (like Deb K!) and in 2026. So please, if you can, make a donation of any amount to fuel this effort. Here’s the donation link again: = Thanks for all you do. – Emily 💙 = | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. name: Laura Friedman (personal)
subject: If we want a Democratic Congress, we need resources
body:
I'm glad I caught you, friend.
Tonight marks our May end-of-month fundraising deadline.
At the moment, we’re still coming up $2,527 short of our online fundraising goal. Will you rush in a donation before midnight to help us meet this monthly benchmark?
Here's a good link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q2-2025**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108753180/548924739/-319689629?refcode=em-5.31.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTA4ZTRmYjItODAzZS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=thNw4kQvbpFSprQqKLIB4ARODgPfFUV6BXm6M0u9aVs=)
Now more than ever, whether I’m cutting through the gaslighting and damage from the Trump administration or taking on the tough issues in Congress, I get asked the question: _why do you even want to be in Congress?!?_
My answer is always the same: because the fight is too important. Because our country is worth fighting for.
It’s also true that since _Citizens United_ , if we want to fight for Democratic values in Congress, we need resources. And although it may be hard to believe, a lot of our funds come from emails like this. That’s why your support today is so valuable. If you can, please consider sending in a donation before midnight to help us build the coalition we need.
Here's the link again to chip in: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q2-2025**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108753181/548924740/-319689629?refcode=em-5.31.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTA4ZTRmYjItODAzZS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=thNw4kQvbpFSprQqKLIB4ARODgPfFUV6BXm6M0u9aVs=)
Thank you, and have a great rest of your weekend.
Laura

Los Angeles, CA 90027
United States

name: Jena Griswold
subject: Protecting the Colorado way of life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Friend,
Before May officially comes to an end, I want to thank you for being part of this campaign. Together, we are protecting the values we hold dear and the Colorado way of life.
That means standing up to Donald Trump and extremists, defending our freedoms, and making sure Colorado stays a place where rights are respected.
But this campaign runs on grassroots support, and we’re up against powerful interests.
Can I count on you to chip in before midnight and help us finish the month strong? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg-eom?refcode=250531-email-pm]
Gratefully,
Jena Griswold

name: AOTL Update
subject: Don't miss this message from A.G. Holder
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
There are no “off years” when it comes to fighting for fair electoral maps.
|
---

Peter, did you see Attorney General Holder’s note from last week?
His message is urgent and important: There are no “off years” in the fight for our democracy. The work we’re doing _right now_ will lay the groundwork for free and fair elections for decades to come.
From our affiliate’s work in the courts that could affect up to six congressional districts, to our fight to protect the 2030 Census, to our efforts to stop partisan extremists from stealing more seats through gerrymandering this year — so much is on the line right now. And we need everyone in this fight.
**[Please take a moment to read A.G. Holder’s urgent message below, and then rush a donation before our end-of-month deadline to power our work defending democracy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108753439/548937933/-766669670?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGEOMLift2_email_20250531-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOMLift2_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250531-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOMLift2_&utm_campaign=AGEOMLift2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjZWNkNmM3LTgzM2UtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cgLRdNgxBKMimW-yrGcqBSzz-3GQDssacIC704b1iYc=) **

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
Date: Sun, May 25, 2025
Subject: The right that protects all the others
Team, voting is our most important right as Americans — “the right that protects all the others,” as Lyndon Johnson famously said when he signed the Voting Rights Act into law.
It’s no surprise then that extreme forces have spent decades attempting to systematically undermine this right. Whether it's through onerous voting requirements, partisan gerrymanders, or attempting to use courts to invalidate legitimate election results, the goal is the same — to cling to power by any means necessary.
**Our grassroots movement is working across the country to secure fairness in our democracy and ensure every American has an equal say in our government. And we know what it takes to get it done: When we work together, we win. **
[**That’s why today, I’m personally asking you to make a donation to All On The Line to power the movement for a fairer, stronger democracy — this work could not be more essential in the months and years ahead.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108753446/548937940/-766669670?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGEOMLift2_email_20250531-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOMLift2_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250531-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOMLift2_&utm_campaign=AGEOMLift2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjZWNkNmM3LTgzM2UtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cgLRdNgxBKMimW-yrGcqBSzz-3GQDssacIC704b1iYc=)

There’s a reason I say there is no “off year” in the fight for fair electoral maps — the work we’re doing today is critical to advancing the fight for our democracy this year, in 2026, 2028, and beyond:
→ Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, is actively involved in **court cases that could affect the makeup of up to eight congressional districts** — where we must make sure voters are fairly represented. Those outcomes could determine the majority in the House of Representatives.
→ We’re preparing to **stop efforts by extreme partisan actors to steal congressional seats** through extreme gerrymandering — including in Ohio, where leaders are expected to draw new congressional maps this year.
→ And we must stay ready to **protect the 2030 Census from efforts to tamper with it,** to ensure an accurate count and fair representation. Last time around, the Trump administration went out of its way to undermine the census. We fought back and won, and we’re prepared to do it again.

Our mission at DWS PAC is to strategically direct resources to help elect Democrats around the country, and our success depends on support from thousands of donors across the country. subject: we’re SO close!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
I’m so impressed
I’m so impressed, Peter!

Since I reached out, this team has truly stepped it up. We’re closing the gap on our $20,000 end-of-month goal! We’re so close to ending May in an incredible position to defend this seat and ensure we're in fighting shape as we look ahead to 2026.

But there’s still too much at stake to slow down now and come up short. Protecting all of us from this Republican agenda will be tough, and I’m all in. But we need enough resources to make a serious impact. That’s why I need one last push from this team.

If just 75 people who open this email chip in $5, we’ll reach our goal in no time! Please, Peter, will you be one of the supporters I need to reach my final May fundraising goal before midnight tonight? You can chip in using this link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-may-2025?dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108753726/548944640/-1351093942?refcode=em25_250531_eom4_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_250531_eom4_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=e07af3b6-863e-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&refcode2=e07af3b6-863e-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDdhZjNiNi04NjNlLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FlvRGBGP8FlAnTG0ExaflIp9I8lLkPSQxH72bKb1A7k=)**

Peter, I'm a fighter. I won't cower in the face of any attack. I will always take on the mainstream media and expose their double standards.

**My husband is black. Our children and grandchildren are black. I am black. **

The Left loses its mind when I speak the truth. The liberal media can't comprehend that I think for myself and refuse to be bound by their ideology--just because of the color of my skin!

In 2021, I made history and became the first woman to be elected Lt. Governor of Virginia. That's right, I shattered a glass ceiling as a black Republican woman. Democrats and the mainstream media went _**BALLISTIC**_!

All along the way, these Leftists threw nasty, racist insults at me. They simply couldn't comprehend that I'm conservative because _I actually think for myself!_

_**Believe me, I've been called every awful name in the book, but the mainstream media 's vicious attacks have only strengthened my resolve to spread our winning conservative message.**_

clean_body: | | | | | | | Peter, I'm a fighter. I won't cower in the face of any attack. I will always take on the mainstream media and expose their double standards. My husband is black. Our children and grandchildren are black. I am black. The Left loses its mind when I speak the truth. The liberal media can't comprehend that I think for myself and refuse to be bound by their ideology--just because of the color of my skin! In 2021, I made history and became the first woman to be elected Lt. Governor of Virginia. That's right, I shattered a glass ceiling as a black Republican woman. Democrats and the mainstream media went BALLISTIC! All along the way, these Leftists threw nasty, racist insults at me. They simply couldn't comprehend that I'm conservative because I actually think for myself! Believe me, I've been called every awful name in the book, but the mainstream media 's vicious attacks have only strengthened my resolve to spread our winning conservative message. You may not believe it, but this is the truth: I used to be a Democrat! I thought they were the party for regular people, but I was wrong. Republicans are the ones who are fighting to lift people out of poverty, to ensure kids have access to quality education without indoctrination, to create good-paying jobs, and to keep our communities safe. Honestly, when the liberal talking heads on MSNBC started attacking me, I knew I must be on the right path! Don't hold back - No amount is too small! Fighting back against the liberal media and the entire Democrat establishment is never easy, so thank you for joining us to stop them. Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears (R-VA) | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! It's going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. name: Raul (personal)
subject: Update: we can’t fall behind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=kQQN4E9ugLK1FQsXCWQVQ7HMZWD3IFyA3dkcroe8ZTrcu5jbS%2B8kO4GEUAouOvZAMoTYIX6F%2BZ4VX0AyVFKyIui0SKjSWO4Fr8z8CPXBnfnRsM6GZgAEEIP6B5Gti0ArYtFdtAF3MgMAoeLH%2B%2FjeC1lPa96JmUv7EPIVPe3fITukTFCPsZP5oxoSExOH8D1UgRECUSqWo3D21yIO9UX0Dl6f%2FcJMLE5piJWmmokDl0eNES9CxyqgTnplxhnAGU885tL8nXQNLh0LDHXjyUHfiyWIxnebpjEXt%2FQL3PwZRCq1fnWSfipTJWJX4V7SC76V%2FYG5GBUSr9M6da5%2F0UlkzNF43D97J5DvxWcPdHujDIK178ngf3CXKh2UlHi1neZ7TNy1ox401nkGYMOPver9kGb9EjoL9dBZ5zSYf%2BFu3K3o2d2R0%2F%2FOIeqGsegYFPYC]

It's Raul.

At the moment, we’re short of hitting our end-of-month fundraising goal.

That’s not easy to say — especially when we’re up against a Republican agenda that’s working tirelessly to cut the programs millions of Americans rely on, like Medicaid and Social Security.

The consequences of falling behind in this fight are real.

I’m asking for your help. Every dollar we raise right now helps us close the gap — and powers the campaign we need to win this race and help flip the House in 2026.

Can you chip in today and help us make up ground before midnight tonight? >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-may25?amount=10&refcode=SBD_RR_EM_FR_053125_EOM4_30DO30DNTL_D4_S1

We still have time to get back on track — but only if we act quickly. Thanks for being part of this team.

— Raul
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.

name: DNC HQ
subject: Last call: Can you make a $3 contribution to the DNC before midnight?
body:
---
Derek, we’ll get straight to the point. $3. That’s the amount we’re asking you to chip in before midnight. $3 to help us reach our fundraising goal ahead of our FEC deadline. $3 because a strong fundraising showing will send a powerful message to Trump and his allies — that there is serious opposition to their efforts to hand a giant tax cut to the wealthy while the rest of us foot the bill. $3 because the work we’re doing — holding town halls across the country, laying the groundwork to replace the Republicans who voted to slash Medicaid and food assistance for millions of Americans — is only possible with your help. $3 may not seem like it can do all of that, but when we add up your contribution with contributions from supporters like you all over the country, it makes a big difference. **[So can we count on you, Derek, to pitch in $3 before tonight’s midnight deadline?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?refcode=em_20250531_3596_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3596_22930333_mpm5l2&akid=3596%2E22930333%2Empm5l2)**

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Let’s protect what matters most
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=8LdhyGJZWezozzwc4cMjNVAT2ILg8AED4ezhIMKiOQN9fiXmlKXM%2FUxwfiGycdoMPNTVgxqAwJFJx0hoCkPNcArPRw298gvTv1brQKg7bgb5pRuT2P2jC2xlhMX5RwynVkCcRisY6kekBC0GKDE%2Fr35E2cFK0ESYTKZANNMhgAqy780DMwl1AQZhFLBhWsr4%2FcZT24S0djr4bunt8u5gBxvcm7pX3jCuBOtk7ezx8XBXV7u2Pvex4dgDgYboGJkxXY7%2FkwQDWW9ln%2BlEeX3B2eoVSdgrL2EfFabV1tQoEOjQAmLLrhpORJJkdnIyOLvxz8Qpl7AHxUh1dHm24ihIJkUDrHCoNu4Z11cKWU2hkkbpj5fvI8rqx0RnwRJPdNuvlDxeEkCMzYSNoXeErjey%2FWK9sRXGCJAQiAdUWTNMblU%3D)
---
| |
---
Saludos. It's Gabe. Tonight marks our $10,000 end-of-month fundraising deadline — and I wanted to take a moment to tell you why this one matters so much to me. I’ve had the privilege of calling this community home for most of my life. I’ve seen the strength, resilience, and heart that makes this one of the most vibrant places in the country. This community means everything to me. That’s why it’s so hard to watch Donald Trump and the GOP push an agenda that threatens our way of life — slashing the programs working families rely on, while making sure the wealthy get even wealthier. They think billionaires deserve more. Well, I think our community does. That’s why I’m fighting to protect this seat — because if we lose it, we lose the ability to stop Trump’s agenda and defend the programs our communities rely on, not just to survive, but to thrive and carry on their traditions for generations to come. But I can’t win this fight without you. [We’re close to hitting our goal, but we need all hands on deck from now until the clock strikes midnight. Can you chip in $10 before midnight to help us reach our goal and protect what our community deserves?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108753872/548947221/1777442079?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_053125_EOM5_60DO_D5_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDc1NWJiNC04ZDNlLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ne5c4Haq9e2LbgAi6rFb0gUFEuoRNWJrwYsU94A2YiA=) | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108753873/548947222/1777442079?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_053125_EOM5_60DO_D5_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDc1NWJiNC04ZDNlLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ne5c4Haq9e2LbgAi6rFb0gUFEuoRNWJrwYsU94A2YiA=)
---
In this fight with you,

clean_body: Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Saludos. It's Gabe. Tonight marks our $10,000 end-of-month fundraising deadline — and I wanted to take a moment to tell you why this one matters so much to me. I’ve had the privilege of calling this community home for most of my life. I’ve seen the strength, resilience, and heart that makes this one of the most vibrant places in the country. This community means everything to me. That’s why it’s so hard to watch Donald Trump and the GOP push an agenda that threatens our way of life — slashing the programs working families rely on, while making sure the wealthy get even wealthier. They think billionaires deserve more. Well, I think our community does. That’s why I’m fighting to protect this seat — because if we lose it, we lose the ability to stop Trump’s agenda and defend the programs our communities rely on, not just to survive, but to thrive and carry on their traditions for generations to come. But I can’t win this fight without you. = | | = In this fight with you, Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: This wasn’t supposed to work.
body:
-It all started in a garage with no budget and a dream. -You didn't just believe in us. You built us. -From one spark to a nationwide fire. -You helped make the impossible possible. -What started small is now shaking campuses across America. -This is what a real youth revolution looks like. -Because of you, the tide is turning. -See what you helped unleash on the campuses they said we'd never reach. -We were never supposed to be winning--and yet here we are. -One dream. One vision. A whole new generation rising. -You were there from the beginning--even if you didn't know it. -Let me show you what you helped ignite. -This fire's not going out anytime soon. -We're about to go further than we ever thought possible. -Thanks to you, we're lighting up the map. -This is the cultural shift you prayed for. -What we're building together is bigger than you think. -This isn't nostalgia--it's mission fuel. -When they said we'd fail, you said "go." -Let's make this a turning point for history.

| | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/O3ZfnsMnHe-3RM95eEUN6EWwYOT14GJ4LbplFR2oQULbf6DKX_4t-4uPxJQHRtvqqf0mzi-wYOJwsAj_iywYgl3vn03og2xNBDcu5x_czUy8unobNIzg6GbaaEeXaUv17w0WW7ORST5eaeahPI68hO7Eyy-1-WrbOkJ32xUikAuOsCLPt4DqQJsJo5oh6sUqoDXI1OA4uBpl9Hlrek_WWGJBIUXiOIOUDbi078QZ8c1S9hRFBOpXl_PmZAoAFQkNPC-jcMgiRHmFjnnR3gWttRwowinNBbhz5urQrouW3nLaup7nTElwPNADK8u9-PJMryzK9Ts2xlMQK3nTO8-ypJJ0J8ONGM_SSs7JpbcLgT7K7nN1QcWwUwFTOddRk8ZqtP9I4HfybcsnNr52QWvhqUxgKE7ItX4bt0A1bGLr4mTky6G-tEuPiwR1zk_SlA-MQQAjJjBCWvJSO_MSmw/_oDMcrub5kOW-aYKcta65xCezM06sJrf/9)
---
Peter, We recently wrapped up one of Turning Point USA's latest stops on the American Comeback Tour at UC San Diego... I wish you could have been there to see it. Another packed quad. Students eager to listen. Flags waving. Cheers for America. Energy you could feel in your bones. _Not in Texas... Not in Florida..._ **_California._** The "Deep Blue" stronghold the Left said we'd never touch. But we did. And we'll keep going. **Because of patriots like you.**
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/zDyNJtfziiojgGBSFu_cyAK0wkrxF9zB7UXehKu7-2oU7zPtN4dMMuKKgOVodoek3-fjvn9VJiqxxw8d8W2ZCAxsanWMOo5XlfXy1IxHPgxD29ZHXbIH0KZ4wEIDZKCpLT_0XIlUesUsHvbMWHKxr0A7U6gyh_cxoYFfBO-Uze0z6sLtWW0rwNg8OEefMUM_W96v248FhMFln4IzJRgLOMH21RpK_apCQJZAMuqtxNnCpldxPlMFf_REVfAMXiuuRNxiMK79inJUyP-s7FVtGiB1yWibC-xStnJPGNa4TEU6BxMcPJ3idv7GPqQO_eJwjMDtio_n9EaQI7858KPt8-UZOUsZInvIT0fsd0y84KshisvlpjsyPVD75nrBGb96S18aW-eROe_joHPHFjkZzq3VhKegcFIvHSJ3EBlDS-kyiHmqEWJ0Xc_HwRO79es2izgplwcrVrgaq7Um6w/WCjUzWb5InCx9rOMyEl55pruQwe05Pln/9)
---
As I stood there looking out at the crowd -- hundreds of young patriots rising up in a place the Left said they owned -- I couldn't help but think... **Nearly 13 years ago, all of this felt...****_impossible._** Back then, Turning Point USA wasn't the cultural phenomenon it is today.It wasn't an office. It wasn't a team. _It was just me._ No money. No connections. Just a desk and an old computer in a dusty garage in the Chicago suburbs._But what I did have was a vision..._ It was 2012. The Left controlled every classroom, every campus, and nearly every corner of our culture.Their narrative was everywhere: America was evil... Faith was "oppressive"... Freedom was outdated... The Conservative movement was dead... _And most of all, young people belonged to the Left._**I didn 't believe that. I couldn't accept that. I couldn't just stand by and watch the Left win.** Back then, it was no wonder WHY we were losing young people to the Left...The Conservative movement felt stale... Conservative organizations felt like a snooze... And it felt like no one had an idea of how to reach America's youth... I believed if we were ever going to win young people back for America, we needed excitement. Energy. Passion. And ZEAL for our ideas.**My dream was to launch a conservative youth movement that would inspire young people to stand for truth -- and LOVE this country again.** I didn't know what I was going to call this dream... this feeling... this movement.So, I picked up the phone, called my dad, and said, "I think I'm supposed to start something, but I don't have a name for it..." **He replied...****_"How about Turning Point?"_** And just like that, a fire was lit. Turning Point USA was born. On the promise that we could TURN this country around, one young heart at a time. The early days were brutal.I remember driving across the Chicago suburbs to small Tea Party meetings talking about "generational theft"... They didn't walk out...**They believed. And Peter -- so did patriots like you.**

You see, this isn't my story. This is YOUR story.Because without patriots like you... _there is no Turning Point USA._ Without you... _there is no American Comeback story._ Without you... _there is no cultural shift happening right now in schools, churches, homes, and on every campus across our great nation._ You were there when the campus quads and halls were empty... stood by us when our signs got torn down. You had our backs when the mob showed up -- when they shouted, screamed, and tried to wipe us off the map.**You didn 't give up. I went where I was told a young conservative didn't belong. And I kept going back.

## Discover how the Allied powers won World War II
World War II was the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global conflict in unprecedented ways. This course from Hillsdale College analyzes the investments and strategies of the belligerents that led the Allies to win and the Axis to lose.

[**Secure your special DVD box set of "The Second World Wars."**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9uke4u76g12l4i74vendevqrifooenkash9pg5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjm4p76cdh2bs)

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Our culture has a sick hatred for integrity and achievement
body:
I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo

|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zunv7ne2efd781t0i4so7aj1q5fldi70blraufeg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjmaor6clh2bs) Friend,

I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven't heard about) happened to me.

FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I've never seen before. **Make no mistake:** _They identified this as an opportunity to "cancel" me forever_ and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I've ever stood for.

They failed.

SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech.

**One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society.**

Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization's top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of _The Fountainhead_ by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity.

Which is why I am personally reaching out to you.

I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. [Please consider making an URGENT donation of any amount to The Atlas Society by clicking here.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpasahl4jc9hk541hg4oono7d1q590mg7s0siscg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjmaor6clh2bs)
[Donate >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvs2r3b4qatcjjpj7evb16clcktehdeonde5i1oo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjmaor6clh2bs)
Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country.

_I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I 've EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before._

_**_So keep reading_!**_

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That's where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand's _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand's role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That's where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for "_skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_."
**Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos -- every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The "Draw My Life" videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

**Swimmers:** Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand's shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like "Morals & Markets."

**Deep Divers:** They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand's philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt's Gulch Summit, where I spoke!).
Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate:
[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs8h1a1bjqvf3i4gnsqrd14n5orathqn04nppsk8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjmaor6clh2bs)

[Donate $35 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjbou1l29fnqj181a6cuitjcv4dl2ce3kd8gbbj8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjmaor6clh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za6pf3c8lrf7l20ep3pv6s205as3vesu2fm59d8o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjmaor6clh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z76u1rvj63hbiokue8us4n51vq87b55pugehu2u8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjmaor6clh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zefsiijtsm125v5bg6a841j61fmgep0ohd8p9pqo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjmaor6clh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf51ct5h1s0hf9gkp440dtls4dnqoae7api9f2po_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjmaor6clh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7d3qhi2n9hpjmnsmn49p6h3lnmq4umdve01pr98_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjmaor6clh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr4onc3rrjfgcaj3e7f72rh0tqgfenr9jfcqgukg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjmaor6clh2bs)
Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR:
* Free market capitalism
* Rational self-interest
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST:
* Cancel Culture
* Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism
* Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas
* Big government

I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount.

As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000.

[Here is the link to donate one more time.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6sp7u3f9ktii2gshi6ldub2mucqmm78o1iis5to_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjmaor6clh2bs)

Thank you for everything,

James O'Keefe

P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society's top student leaders.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcr3bt8vnk5it73pmitvt75qb0hah0ngqff9ba98_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjmaor6clh2bs) These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity.

Well, NOT these students.

The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same.

[Please take action by making a donation to The Atlas Society today. You can click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zndukv267vadvreuvkgblprljij3h9obers8paog_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjmaor6clh2bs)

Thank you,

James

_The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible._

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That's where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways. Have you ever read Ayn Rand's Atlas Shrugged or The Fountainhead? These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it. But they are 700+ pages long! Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me: Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today. So, how do we preserve Rand's role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That's where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for "skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers." Skimmers: Social media memes and animated videos -- every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The "Draw My Life" videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration. Swimmers: Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand's shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like "Morals & Markets." Deep Divers: They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand's philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt's Gulch Summit, where I spoke!). Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate: Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR: Free market capitalism Rational self-interest Respect for achievement and success Free speech The future of young people and our great country And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST: Cancel Culture Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas * Big government I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount. As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000. Thank you for everything, James O'Keefe P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society's top student leaders. These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity. Well, NOT these students. The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same. Thank you, James The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible. Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:
Democrats have $63M+ cash on hand and they are getting ready to spend every penny to destroy us

| | **This could get ugly FAST ...**

I just got out of a briefing with my fundraising team and I couldn't believe my eyes. We are pacing _$100,000 behind our May goal._

_I know that may seem like the next election is far off but let me explain why this is our MOST IMPORTANT deadline to date:_
---
* Democrats have $63M+ cash on hand and they are getting ready to spend every penny to destroy us
* Our first major tests in the Virginia and New Jersey elections are in FIVE MONTHS
* Liberal groups are spending more - and earlier - than I've ever seen in my life

---
On top of all that, we have the smallest House Majority in nearly a century! If we aren't ready for the tests ahead, our Majority could slip through our fingers. And with it - all of President Trump's MAGA Agenda.

**That is why our May fundraising deadline is critical. I have been so happy with the work House Republicans have been able to accomplish in just a few short months - including passing Trump's Big Beautiful Bill.

However, we have just _scratched the surface_ of undoing all of the havoc Liberals wreaked over the last four years. And if we lose the House, Democrats will move at record speed to...

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: RE: the FBI
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Writing this is not the "safe" option. But it is the RIGHT option.

But I've never gone with the safe option. I only follow the right option.
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhdgoc3bsi2jv90pef72cimbbfqu281qrrtf7n20_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjm6pb2c1h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
My law licenses have been taken away and I can no longer defend myself in court. I may even face a 20-YEAR prison sentence in a case so severe that President Trump cannot even save me with a pardon.
---
_So, the "safe" thing to do right now would be to keep quiet and not say anything that would anger the powers-that-be._
---
_But that 's not who I am. _
---
**Throughout my life, I 've never gone with the "safe" option. I do what's _RIGHT_.**
---
_And so, I 'm speaking out and I've prepared a memo for you on something deeply troubling. _
---
[**Please read it here: secure.rudygiulianifreedomfund.com/memo-access-for-dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8ot4qkg1jsb7lh7r28685vuvl9pn50lc2qtcqbg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjm6pb2c1h2bs)

name: Fisico via 1600 Daily
subject: How To Stay Asleep All Night (Do This 20 Minutes Before Bed)
body:
Finally, fix your sleep

Tell me if this sounds familiar...

It's 2am and you're still staring at the ceiling...

You just can't seem to shut your brain off...

Your mind races a million miles an hour...

Maybe you can't stop thinking about money issues, health problems, or even something embarrassing you did or said...

Then, perhaps you finally DO fall asleep...

...only to jerk awake at 4am, knowing the next day you're going to feel tired, worn-out, and like a brain-dead zombie.

Does any of that ring a bell?

Well, just months ago... that was me...

I never slept more than 4 hours...

I felt exhausted, groggy, and dog-tired all the next day, downing pots of coffee to get through work...

And I turn into a cranky "you-know-what" when I don't catch my zzz's... so I was getting into all of these stupid little arguments with my wife.

I had to do something... or I would spend the rest of my nights on the couch.

And that's when I stumbled on a discovery from leading MIT sleep researchers... and it changed everything.

You see, this discovery led to my research team and I developing a technique we call the "sleep signal reset."

Just [do this 20 minutes before you hop into bed...](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zupnce9hmn6ifchcn1lfgvaf63nhqlru3re9q670_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjm9oj6clh2bs)

And you'll gently activate your body's "go-to-sleep" hormones...

So you fall asleep faster than a baby riding in a car...

Sleep through the ENTIRE night...

...and wake up fully rested and chipper, ready to take on the day.

Best of all, it literally takes less than a minute...

It requires no dangerous drugs, meditation, valerian root, blackout shades, blue-blocking sunglasses, or any other weird stuff...

Just [do this about 20 minutes before bedtime](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeahr36p8s4nsvatj552i6eq87n0rn6qv91uqeio_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjm9oj6clh2bs) and you'll get the peaceful, restorative sleep you deserve.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkbofusvsg6br9il9ihmnt9ts94eppi7v88vh5j8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjm9oj6clh2bs)

clean_body: Finally, fix your sleep Tell me if this sounds familiar... It's 2am and you're still staring at the ceiling... You just can't seem to shut your brain off... Your mind races a million miles an hour... Maybe you can't stop thinking about money issues, health problems, or even something embarrassing you did or said... Then, perhaps you finally DO fall asleep... ...only to jerk awake at 4am, knowing the next day you're going to feel tired, worn-out, and like a brain-dead zombie. Does any of that ring a bell? Well, just months ago... that was me... I never slept more than 4 hours... I felt exhausted, groggy, and dog-tired all the next day, downing pots of coffee to get through work... And I turn into a cranky "you-know-what" when I don't catch my zzz's... so I was getting into all of these stupid little arguments with my wife. I had to do something... or I would spend the rest of my nights on the couch. And that's when I stumbled on a discovery from leading MIT sleep researchers... and it changed everything. You see, this discovery led to my research team and I developing a technique we call the "sleep signal reset." Just And you'll gently activate your body's "go-to-sleep" hormones... So you fall asleep faster than a baby riding in a car... Sleep through the ENTIRE night... ...and wake up fully rested and chipper, ready to take on the day. Best of all, it literally takes less than a minute... It requires no dangerous drugs, meditation, valerian root, blackout shades, blue-blocking sunglasses, or any other weird stuff... Just and you'll get the peaceful, restorative sleep you deserve. ==> Fisico Inc. 2303 Ranch Road 620 South Suite 160 #307 Austin, TX 78734 Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Our culture has a sick hatred for integrity and achievement
body:
I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo

|
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zumdpj5ji9ko2hjhg29q7php3c7ma4tot4c26hd8_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjm9oj2clh2bs) Friend,

I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven't heard about) happened to me.

FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I've never seen before. **Make no mistake:** _They identified this as an opportunity to "cancel" me forever_ and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I've ever stood for.

They failed.

SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech.

**One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society.**

Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization's top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of _The Fountainhead_ by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity.

Which is why I am personally reaching out to you.

I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. [Please consider making an URGENT donation of any amount to The Atlas Society by clicking here.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuol3fqau8s8kjr2juis2anmhm62nitmt45vjcj0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjm9oj2clh2bs)
[Donate >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zom6dr1fi8p871e3196496hjmmn9i5rpig3cui3g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjm9oj2clh2bs)
Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country.

_I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I 've EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before._

_**_So keep reading_!**_

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That's where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand's _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand's role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That's where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for "_skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_."
**Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos -- every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The "Draw My Life" videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

**Swimmers:** Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand's shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like "Morals & Markets."

**Deep Divers:** They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand's philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt's Gulch Summit, where I spoke!).
Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate:
[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbusghd5q0peuln5f0tns4qjjnec5c91j9n7fm1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjm9oj2clh2bs)

[Donate $35 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvcf8u4m201hn37hcuep8a6c5ogi9gc4s89l2hb0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjm9oj2clh2bs)

[Donate $50 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zec0go3rhe9hoqhd8mid1um8t2pn2r1ginauag08_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjm9oj2clh2bs)

[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3ccq1ic4hrmlob2ve9vhfui7looc8vm0h01aato_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjm9oj2clh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu5i5imnjsriri0mn766lhkdaaiiuc327hajjk9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjm9oj2clh2bs)

[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcnh6n8ntv0aslfmro8tqepik9cnfholu7tqhd18_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjm9oj2clh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zriui3md04fvbjp9n9pkhctru70vk942ge4ntdhg_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjm9oj2clh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zun3e1tq6s8rqgfkg32rl7fcs56f59n1ig9p14oo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjm9oj2clh2bs)
Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR:
* Free market capitalism
* Rational self-interest
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST:
* Cancel Culture
* Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism
* Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas
* Big government

I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount.

As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000.

[Here is the link to donate one more time.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0qfqiqkggrial4pte8sf5ap90446mj3e95n9nog_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjm9oj2clh2bs)

Thank you for everything,

James O'Keefe

P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society's top student leaders.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgrpfqjttedcplt6oo07lje4d1ndbuubgirufsno_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjm9oj2clh2bs) These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity.

Well, NOT these students.

The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same.

[Please take action by making a donation to The Atlas Society today. You can click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2gt2q8ggi4ba2oq0qbthrcto9so53nrbak89kmo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stjm9oj2clh2bs)

Thank you,

James

_The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible._
---

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: A Historic Year Awaits: America’s 250th with President Trump!
body:
Check out what’s happening in 2025!
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** As we look ahead to 2026, America is gearing up for a milestone like no other--our nation's 250th anniversary of independence! Under President Donald J. Trump's bold leadership, this semiquincentennial (yes that's a real word!) is set to be a yearlong celebration of our shared history, unyielding spirit, and bright future.
From coast to coast, 2025 will ignite a renewed sense of pride in what it means to be American. Here are just a few reasons why this historic year will make every heart swell with patriotism:
* **The Department of Transportation 's "Great American Road Trip" officially launched on Thursday, May 29th:** This campaign spotlights the people and places that connect our country.
* **Army 250 Parade - Saturday, June 14th:** All Americans are invited to attend this special event. [**Sign up here.**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794ab7aa260/1edb9794ab75e54e "Sign up here.")
* **Founder 's Museum Launch - June 17th:** This will be a downloadable, ready-to-use community exhibit. It will include printable PDFs featuring photos, bios, QR codes linked to videos, and everything needed to create your own "Founder's Museum" wherever you are.
To find out more about upcoming 250th anniversary events, visit the [**White House 's website.**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794ab7aa260/1edb9794ab75e550)
The celebrations don't stop there! June 14th is Flag Day, and we invite you to support a third-generation, veteran-owned family business at [**theflagshirt.com**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794ab7aa260/1edb9794ab75e552) to help you celebrate in style--and with patriotism!
In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood is trying to turn our children against us
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2i8clnkpdr9bjhej5gjrg0it7ilsat83bi6m988_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stge0p32clh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdb59t6bo0ohog0jtpam6c53d2aveahba793d5bo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stge0p32clh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfuoaf1q480e8vcb9659tv67od8a1gqli3qeik08_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stge0p32clh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6om9a07tlg2a07lk8vdcc2o1cvrlke8iq3j1hvo_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stge0p32clh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zg1qrr37a677vi7tfnaiekf47227baos2c444qa0_rp22sh2s8i6eob0stge0p32clh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
