clean_body: Please – for the sake of all our families | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue’s Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. Introducing: Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you’ve seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television. > Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of Iggy and Mr. Kirk! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special “Thank You” for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. subject: MIT Bans Speaker, Millions of Bees, and Community Backs Grad
body:
The Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT) [banned the 2025 class president](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OtDAMQE8DXZATAgxFiq-hm6_dEplgBu_mByWZQXP7Fau9wXZPtmT5vY_7fEd2HB7_0ZMpW5wDndlRKZRmz2XBkPNB-EXJs3McQ47bMitQnYBegJxXZPeedb2ajUhRW5ORg74Ng2rbrt6NWjR0tGnSkqAbpRpUZ296xHbUcpBQs7muQQ9SAnStbnBBPSLgqG-4ku0rDbRyian5jBzKTpt7xxelxkZfO7OXcuSq_VepqVLTeZ5NWOxlce0rNV1YqemZxS95LuLyEtZhzuJIlHmlUMQj4frEwjEIG72nYMlf8wMd5cKBMYh8ENldJBtQSQDV1smsx3m1yf1QaXh4ZPfzWvlTz5dR3wEAAP__H_CMHw) from Friday's commencement ceremony after she delivered a pro-Palestinian speech during an event Thursday.

## MIT Bans Class President From Ceremony
The Massachusetts Institute of Technology [banned the 2025 class president](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OtDAMQE8DXZATAgxFiq-hm6_dEplgBu_mByWZQXP7Fau9wXZPtmT5vY_7fEd2HB7_0ZMpW5wDndlRKZRmz2XBkPNB-EXJs3McQ47bMitQnYBegJxXZPeedb2ajUhRW5ORg74Ng2rbrt6NWjR0tGnSkqAbpRpUZ296xHbUcpBQs7muQQ9SAnStbnBBPSLgqG-4ku0rDbRyian5jBzKTpt7xxelxkZfO7OXcuSq_VepqVLTeZ5NWOxlce0rNV1YqemZxS95LuLyEtZhzuJIlHmlUMQj4frEwjEIG72nYMlf8wMd5cKBMYh8ENldJBtQSQDV1smsx3m1yf1QaXh4ZPfzWvlTz5dR3wEAAP__H_CMHw) from Friday's commencement after she delivered an anti-Israel speech during the ceremony on Thursday. [Jewish students stormed out](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuu2zAQRL-G6miQ1MsuVKRRd9OmFNbk0t5rPgzuyob_PlCQP7jNNAMczJw_X9sXUKJy-w0ZF4l1K_jmhCLYtkxyhcL8RHhgy5QS1cI1Xjdn3KjNpI3dAlD6bEMXlojosO9wsfNwnmfX92N3X0I8wxgjmOAm622Y7OhiGHt7mebe29DRctDMZKw1ZuyHE1xhuICBy3CGgH5Sg8FAUtvpu1KRO8b0qS9sJ19zl5a7yJNV_0u5Vbm1fJ6V5aiUWw-wcqs5ojfKrTvr459y6ze-ie-aZQ9YhPUb0kPXXTREwaYzifY1ZyweMxbR_yVo8H5nZL0XemFjko-uUQMFKjdN3AAT6xuW6imgcmvXlvB8H-p4mtVgbhko_VsuP9L9WtzfAAAA__-7opcm) of their graduation ceremony Thursday after Megha Vemuri accused the institution of supporting the erasure of _“Palestine from the face of the Earth.”_ She praised her classmates for protesting Israel immediately after Hamas launched a deadly terrorist attack on the Jewish state on Oct. 7, 2023. MIT [defended its decision](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkj9zozAUxD8N7vAISQgoKEgyNsn5z5HYl8QNI8QDlAjkSAKbfPobp7z22vdmd-a3u6_bcsulkkO74z2krtHlABerwDkwZS9dxQdrz8A_wfRSKakHq5uqxAiHPmI-CsqaSzWXdFGnDQAGsoA0iGgcRZiQcNGlouYIBRRzSnBCMYIAxSEijAkmMBGwkOnNDTEUBAiFhC55xWnCEU9ozGsQzKMIaum0WX5oObgOGjXrCcxS6H6h0s65s_VI5uGVh1eXy2U5807r29fDqxuOh1e9dP6NxReKW-ufDVhZw-D8lk_gBwzHOGYMLTvXK4-s2lEIPQ4OjEceAg-zdhRQGmjAmJ8bz5-RyLdsMyekJmI84WQ64ava9Lupeon_VZRWth55yIosy_JNqHdzu1bT9PuN38HpyebxfXldT9c_U1ZM0XuUJeto9flErbb9Nv5uNtvne6v3JGTOQA2bYdaH12vwGH2dw1_D-7ffFQ_7_PAWlbO8M_f78TAefMqrr-44BkDCx_eSHgvIX4YakXotsyKcm12VvMJRH-dHooqo03gvJX75PPVZK4L2-UOe2MKk9fly692yyKOo7blUP7G7_9rKlOK_AQAA__9DQ9OS), saying Vemuri _“deliberately and repeatedly”_ misled commencement organizers and led a _“protest from the stage, disrupting an important Institute ceremony."_
## Overturned Truck Releases 250 Million Bees
Nearly 250 million honey bees caused a buzz in northwestern Washington State on Friday when [a truck hauling hives overturned](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGu2zAMQE9jbwxkWbKTQUMXb79rR4O26IQNJRqWmiC3L9z2Bt0IPOCRjz--5i9k4Xz_jolC3XTO9C5CtdIxJ64L5lJ2wicdiUVYc9Ftma2xHswAppsjsnxm18awEVnqWwrd6K7jaPvet4_Qm3Ho_Nh516OzV7vFeFsoovE9LX4dWg6nzQym64zxvbvggu6GBm_uipHWoXGGIlc9Lj-Vc33QJh990XFZNbUSHrXupem_NXZq7PTUpGfCCRs7nWNjJ9EVpbHTQgTC9CLgCtYb-BcFC1EBUS0EuFU6oFBiKDuLFOB6MozAGd4PrKsmWPVXrh_YVYQyVs73v443cXxi2uFQjO0R4v4-V5RhbJy5J2T5c3b9r1-_gv0dAAD__650l0M) near the Canadian border. Sheriff’s deputies, county public works employees, and several bee experts [responded to the scene](https://www.google.com/search?q=+250+million+honey+bees&sca_esv=dedaa8b7a5fcd1a5&rlz=1C1GCEU_en&sxsrf=AE3TifM2XliCSFQWSqEhuvxDefts-9957A%3A1748701911785&ei=1xI7aNDOL-bNp84PmJfL4Qk&ved=0ahUKEwiQlpSi9s2NAxXm5skDHZjLMpwQ4dUDCBA&uact=5&oq=+250+million+honey+bees&gs_lp=Egxnd3Mtd2l6LXNlcnAiFyAyNTAgbWlsbGlvbiBob25leSBiZWVzMgQQABgDMgQQABgDMgsQABiABBiGAxiKBTILEAAYgAQYhgMYigUyCxAAGIAEGIYDGIoFMggQABiABBiiBDIIEAAYgAQYogQyCBAAGIAEGKIEMggQABiABBiiBDIIEAAYgAQYogRIr1FQrgJY709wBHgBkAEAmAGWAaABmxSqAQQ0LjE5uAEDyAEA-_JcBsgcEMS4yMrgHmhfCBwgyLTEuMTguOMgHxQM&sclient=gws-wiz-serp#fpstate=ive&vld=cid:b21c5bdc,vid:T5GoVO0feLw,st:0), trying to recover and reset the hives after the trailer rolled into a ditch. Authorities hoped to recover the queen bees, whose scent helps attract the honey bees back to the hive. Many were expected to return, while others were [likely to swarm the area](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO4yAURb_G7hzBAwwuKLZJl223tB7wiNnBYBmUKH8_8vzClFdXulfn_HusD0w5ledf3Mn2WNdC75apdzrXPXWHpbWD8IvOPeWcamk1uhUYqInNE-NrwJQ_qxyDjURAYiTLtTRagxBq3KxWzBAPhoOXDoQOzHlwZuFBB6BAY7LXGpsZ54wpIW_oUC7IcJEGA_l5kIxC6vW8_a-p9I1i_tQXnTdf9zHbrfejDeLPAPcB7nhcAFd1hbMnn2mA-1YLfRzR1I6U8_TGtqXy7LVMcTYuaIgOIYIyfiGYVcTgyQsnlB5PG473xd5mPUj23DHln-v-K18vC98BAAD__3k6f4o) and start new hives.
## List: Ranking the Happiest States for Seniors
Utah is ranked as the state where seniors are happiest, [according to a survey](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQRp_GdI7GP0AoXGxDl223REMYB-8ajDyziXj7K-4r3OZrPuno6Px5TA9MOe2v37hRkFimnT6cSYTqtCWZcWc-CP9R3VLOqexc4jxZsK2GToOZFkz5nHyzhEhkyTUUTO_vfW-da5s1zG20Bh3Mdhha56LH-W6gXcD07tkP0KRw0aADYwBa5284ox8QcPB3XOjZKQ-0JCn19rekXVaK-Sxvqrdn2ZocVpGDlful7KjsuJ9HYbkuZccLrOwI1zij7JhTJJYzk7KjrKSlHNqAXvE4ErFoFhRiHUvVTHsqlTXL_-XUjCcrOzY1LMfnCsFdrzy8Nkz520N-FO8d7FcAAAD__10ngp0) by caring.com. Experts analyzed the cost of living, [average life expectancy](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LtuhDAQheGnMR1ofFkuhYs0dJs2JRrwsExibGQ7S_btI_IKqY_0Sef_uE93ZM_h8Y472bLGKdCZPZVCadq5zBhyPgi_KO3sPceQ4zpPCtSthrYGOTlk_5pM5exKpEhXZGVn-q5TWt-qzRo5YK9WQqlcP6-DBt2BXAY0EpZ-gIrtpUELUgLctGlwRjMg4GB6dLS0wgA5LjE1n5FD2Wj1r_ik1Cxxr7zdSjmy0G9CjUKN53k2CyYOj2sWakyU43daKAs1ZgocU73hcXCgnGsOjn6EGqtk3XFeB3PbCQOPHdn_-eVfUZ5W_QYAAP__lhh3Cg), health rates in residents over 60, and the number of senior centers per state. Utah earned the top spot thanks to its supportive environment for seniors and the third-lowest percentage (21.48%) of seniors living alone—a factor that reduces social isolation. Idaho ranked second, followed by Connecticut, Delaware, and Nebraska. S[ee the top 10 rankings here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQRp_GdI7GP0AoXGxDl223REMYB-8ajDyziXj7K-4r3OZrPuno6Px5TA9MOe2v37hRkFimnT6cSYTqtCWZcWc-CP9R3VLOqexc4jxZsK2GToOZFkz5nHyzhEhkyTUUTO_vfW-da5s1zG20Bh3Mdhha56LH-W6gXcD07tkP0KRw0aADYwBa5284ox8QcPB3XOjZKQ-0JCn19rekXVaK-Sxvqrdn2ZocVpGDlful7KjsuJ9HYbkuZccLrOwI1zij7JhTJJYzk7KjrKSlHNqAXvE4ErFoFhRiHUvVTHsqlTXL_-XUjCcrOzY1LMfnCsFdrzy8Nkz520N-FO8d7FcAAAD__10ngp0).

subject: Nancy Mace wants to kick me out of Congress. Bless her heart

| Peter, Two days after Trump’s Justice Department charged me with crimes for engaging in congressional oversight at an ICE facility, MAGA extremist Nancy Mace filed a resolution to expel me from Congress. Bless her heart. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T02e9f94c-cc3b-4127-8359-007733c343a7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Let's be clear about what's happening: Donald Trump and his loyalists in Congress are doing everything they can to silence their political opposition — even if it means weaponizing the Justice Department and the Constitution to punish dissent. [I won’t back down from Nancy’s threats or the fight for our democracy. That’s why we set a goal of 1,000 grassroots donations before our deadline at midnight. Can I count on you to donate $10 or whatever feel right between me and Blue Amp Action?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T735dd787-9dbc-4afa-9024-9013aa6641ae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Any donation amount you can split between me and Blue Amp Action will help us send that message loud and clear.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td54e1412-b3ee-468f-a414-f1be3f953b93/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We're in this together, LaMonica

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T29b618c2-17e8-4f6e-83f5-eaf6f7ee944a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: 90% of people won’t even bother opening this email.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
It may seem like a small thing to open an email like this. But it’s not.

[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDYwMV9CQS04Ni4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2NDc3MjYtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA2MDFfQkEtODYuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjQ3NzI2LTM2MjMifQ/9LfxI2BbaqxxYVgMkuEZRw)Let's be honest: 90% of people won't even bother opening this email.
But you did, Peter, and that tells me everything I need to know.
You're the kind of American Patriot I was hoping to reach today.
It may seem like a small thing to open an email like this. _But it 's not._
The America First movement was built by people like you - grassroots patriots who gave the most valuable thing they had: their time.
And in 2024, that courage paid off:

* We put President Trump **BACK** in the White House.

* We **FLIPPED** the Senate Majority for Republicans.

* We **DEFENDED** our Conservative Majority in the House.

The Radical Left threw everything at us - $2 billion in campaign cash, weaponized federal agencies, and relentless censorship from their media mouthpieces. They outspent America First candidates nearly 2-to-1 in critical battlegrounds.
We were one bad night away from losing our country for good - permanent open borders, gender ideology in every school, political persecution, and $36 trillion in debt dumped on our children.
**2024 wasn 't the finish line. It was ROUND ONE.**
[I'm running for Governor of Ohio to finish the job and bring bold, America First leadership to the state level, where real, lasting change begins.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDYwMV9CQS04Ni4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2NDc3MjYtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA2MDFfQkEtODYuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjQ3NzI2LTM2MjMifQ/39aYh_CESh201YDC8fvTCA)
Here's what I'm fighting for:

* Goal #1: Make Ohio the gold standard for conservative leadership - pro-parent, pro-business, pro-freedom

* Goal #2: Crush the DEI and managerial bureaucracy, restore excellence in education, and end government bloat

* Goal #3: Build a firewall of liberty to protect Ohio from future power grabs by the radical Left in Washington

If we win here, we'll set off a chain reaction - bold, unapologetic America First governors across the country.
But if we lose, the Left will claim the movement is dead and try to drag us back into the swamp.
They know what's at stake. They've already started pouring cash into this race.
[That's why I'm humbly asking if you will stand with me and chip in just a few bucks right now?](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDYwMV9CQS04Ni4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2NDc3MjYtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA2MDFfQkEtODYuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjQ3NzI2LTM2MjMifQ/IyRJRncanaS7AzjqZlAVUA)
Even just a few bucks make a difference. Because this isn't just a campaign -- it's a mission to revive the spirit of 1776, right here in the heart of America.
**[I 'd be honored to have you by my side.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDYwMV9CQS04Ni4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2NDc3MjYtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA2MDFfQkEtODYuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjQ3NzI2LTM2MjMifQ/bwAgcKQ4u3lOe2dvYlilOA)**
Thanks for everything you do for our country. It's inspiring.
Vivek Ramaswamy [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDYwMV9CQS04Ni4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2NDc3MjYtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA2MDFfQkEtODYuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjQ3NzI2LTM2MjMifQ/AgyA9y8-WkyRZI4LCdpNSQ)[CHIP IN A FEW BUCKS
](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDYwMV9CQS04Ni4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2NDc3MjYtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA2MDFfQkEtODYuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjQ3NzI2LTM2MjMifQ/P0GZwT2QqXkjjLLUCJxa0Q)| | |

[https://secure.winred.com/annapaulinaluna/apl-prsp-email-fedup-wama?utm_medium=emailrental&utm_source=lp&utm_campaign=20250530_apl_apl-prsp-email-fedup-wama&utm_content=donate&amount=20.25&recurring=true&_nlid=test123&_nhids=%recipient.hids%&utm_term=lrm-active]

We fought like hell to get President Trump back in office — the
greatest President of our lifetime.

But this Congress?

NO URGENCY. NO BACKBONE. NO RESULTS.

_“We can’t even lock in DOGE spending cuts — an issue we’ve
been complaining about for nearly a decade. It’s embarrassing. We
don’t need more grandstanding, we need results.”_
— @realannapaulina

Trump is doing everything he can to rebuild this country — working
around the clock to restore order, prosperity, and peace.

BUT CONGRESS IS STANDING IN HIS WAY.

The America First agenda is being buried under red tape, weak
leadership, and cowardice.

Why?

Because the Radical Left will burn this country to the ground if it
means stopping Trump — and spineless Republicans are letting it
happen.

Meanwhile, the basics — like DOGE spending cuts — are STILL
stalled.
Cuts we’ve needed for over a DECADE.

IT’S NOT JUST EMBARRASSING. IT’S DELIBERATE. AND YOU ARE THE ONE
PAYING THE PRICE.

I’ve been fighting in the trenches every single day — but I’m
hitting a wall. And now, I need the grassroots to go on offense.

WE NEED TO FLOOD CONGRESS WITH 100,000 SIGNATURES BEFORE MIDNIGHT

## Texas Cities Among Best in Nation for Parks
Plano ranked No. 17 on the list of [America’s most populous cities](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykzzFywyAQQNHTiM6aBSSQCoo07pw2JbOYlc0EGwY2ln37TJIj5AJv_v84-ROmnO6Xd7yR4-dW_J32nomZmq8Z7yUTxt4ZmZie2L9qJ_YK1HwAcwDpI6b88pOILkBcpSAn7bRYO1s9i6tbzDJrigHlqjfaMIQzWNQRLVo5b0Yk94OBASklKKnGYFYdFrkAkkRQ6zABxcSljXz9a9jyqzyojedyE9ldmWsf9NugjoM67vs-cs1jaZdBHSu2z34ujURzse4p59SNHSa43DDlX4D_t_1w6jsAAP__OZ5tUA) by “ParkScore,” making it the highest-ranked city in Texas. Cities were ranked based on five characteristics of their local park systems: acreage, access, investment, amenities, and equity. [Plano scored high](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykzzFywyAQheHTQGfNghCIgiKNOqdNySxmbTODjUZsLPv2mThHyAHeP-_7OsYjllrul0-8UeDnucU77b0SM21xrXhvlTD3zsjE9MT-vXbiqEFPB7AHUDFjqa9oZA4JsleSgnJmdm5y4ySvgSya5KfknaV5NOispxH8nIzLmOksS_iNgQWlFGilh2T9mGY1A5JC0F4YoFy4bQNf_z6c66s9aBtO7SZruDKvXYwfQi9CL_u-D7zWoW0XoZdT4ZfQyxtyeG_lFvK6l1pLt04YuNyw1HeJ_-d_BP0TAAD__5k3b9Q) in acreage and access, with 81% of residents living within a 10-minute walk of a park. The next highest cities were Dallas and Frisco at Nos. 34 and 37, with the two cities having parks near 81% and 71% of residents, respectively. Austin came in fairly low at No. 54 due to a low amenities score, with many more Texas cities falling below their ranking.[ You can see the entire list, including the methodology, here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykzzFywyAQQNHTiM6aBSSQCoo07pw2JbOYlc0EGwY2ln37TJIj5AJv_v84-ROmnO6Xd7yR4-dW_J32nomZmq8Z7yUTxt4ZmZie2L9qJ_YK1HwAcwDpI6b88pOILkBcpSAn7bRYO1s9i6tbzDJrigHlqjfaMIQzWNQRLVo5b0Yk94OBASklKKnGYFYdFrkAkkRQ6zABxcSljXz9a9jyqzyojedyE9ldmWsf9NugjoM67vs-cs1jaZdBHSu2z34ujURzse4p59SNHSa43DDlX4D_t_1w6jsAAP__OZ5tUA).
## Texas Supreme Court Greenlights Paxton Investigation of Migrant Facility
The Texas Supreme Court unanimously granted Attorney General Ken Paxton’s appeal to [continue his investigation of a migrant shelter](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OgzAQhU8DHWg8NhgKF9vQZdst0QQPwZLBCE9CcvtVskfY-un9fT-X8UIhhu32TSs7ec5p3PjMkUX4GPdIW4pMPmchYeEn5fueWUYEbCpoK1CjpxBfoym9u4LvVclOWdNZ21jdlIsja5puZvCTnxrfdgZpZo2m0-QR2qkM7h0GLSilABXW17bX1051QKwIsC8MsA-SjlqWvw1zfKUHH_WU1jK6RWTPhf4qcChwOM-zftGS0lstcHjfKXD4-Kp83w9euZrS_ZDqFh6cq7AFCRQr1AZMr62pF1ljeTi_nyHGkFtbGLitFOKnUP6H6eHwNwAA__-Vs304) in El Paso. The facility is accused of violating state law by “knowingly and purposely” housing illegal immigrants and aiding in their introduction into the United States. The decision followed an appeal by Paxton [after a district court judge prevented Paxton’s office](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOgzAQRL_GdKD1AgYKF9fQ5dor0RKWYMmxkb2E5O9PyX3CNVM9zYzez2W6kPMu3L7pzlaea5wCn9mzCKdp9xSiZ1pyFhIWflI-9swyIWBbgilBTws5_5qaYrEzLIMu2Oqu6buu7eq22Cw2q25Mr3kdeGXouF7atgY2Brg1MxXOvsvAgNYaUGM1m6Gee90DsSbAQTXAi5OYKtn-Pqz-FR-cqmu8F95uIntW9ZfCUeF4nmf1gSS5-QhcxXRTOCJgo3CE7h2ocPwwJftypxxLCuEIV0fiYii3eGQu0_H2onAskl3203nvsulUA7c7Of_Zlv8Ze1j8DQAA__8BoX_m) from shutting down Annunciation House. The court also granted a permanent injunction blocking records requests from the Attorney General. The Supreme Court took no stance on the merits of the overall case outside of overturning the district court’s injunction against Paxton. [You can read the full ruling here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkM1q4zAQgJ9GvsVI47_4oENYMHvJLrSF9mYm0cgRyJKRxnHy9iXuI_Q0H8MwfHyf5_GMzrsw_cOZND9sHANt2RMzpXHxGKInNDkzMjE9MK9LJh5BQnOQ7UGq0aDzz7EujL5I06uCtOrqY9c1XdUUN22NtXVre7SmM-YKTQ22Nq1CJatO9VXh9OuZbKVSSoKC8tL21eWojhJJoYRe1JKM45hKvv04WP-Md0rlNc6F1zfmJYvqJGAQMGzbVu5HyBxToOdEgRL6cop3AUN2TFnAYMji6lnAYJ3fN27GaYclUX7NUwhruDpkF4OABuTfuGba6f3P_4-vnd7WV71yMbZI2iyb897lthO1nGZ0flfk34W9a_gOAAD__8Mwjkw).
## Gov. Greg Abbott Set to Make Decisions on Several Key Bills
The Texas legislative session ends Monday, giving Gov. Greg Abbott until June 22 to sign or veto any [bills sent to his desk](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUb3O2zAMfBp5kyHR_4OGoIWnfp0-oKPBVIytQpEMiYmTpc9e2O4bfAt5xPF4JPjrY_pA512Yf-KdDL9ucQq0ZU_MlKbVY4ie0ObMyMT0wvxYM_EEChqpWqn0ZNH591QX1lyVHXRBRnd133VNVzXFYmxVY6PbvmmxronUrbUAAwD2DbXdFQtn9mGqVVprBRrKaztU1173CkmjgkHUiqzjmEpezh1u_h2flMrf8V54szCvWVQXAaOAcdu2MntfHo3lHJ8CxrxG9m5eWMC4mwkY1R6yCyStI9kPvMhE88NjkplydjFICjbLP49AEoKV_3UCKlFd_orqwvRiUX3_XEhAA-pz9zvQD5pd9siPdDKb8_4ECVcB3_AoLPJJczzSnYgPEOjFZZGMXXehy20najXf0fnjXv7al54G_gUAAP__U-mhVg) in the final 10 days, or they become law by default. Under state law, lawmakers cannot challenge a veto, as only the governor can call a special session after Monday. Gov. Abbott is not expected to call a session for any bill he plans to veto. Two high-profile bills are being closely watched as Monday approaches: [House Bill 1481](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ8GOtB6MQYKF9fQ5dor0RovwdKCEXZC8van5H-Evx7pm5nv3226UZCw3__Sxja_ljjtfCXhnPmcDqE9CpNPKVPmzC9KjyNxnhCwrcBUoCZPQd6TLr114AdVslWd7ruu7Zq2XG2rvWmGAWZol94tmrp2IKKO9awbRFUG-4GBAaUUoMLamaFxveqBWBHgUGhgH3I867z-bFjkHZ981nPcSrFrzkcqmj8FjgWO13XVb1pj_KQFjp87BY4uiFSO9mpmkWONO6fqy6qOh5MwVwobg70BU695k_K0_riCSEimKzTcNwry7cu_s_S0-D8AAP__VaZ78w), which would ban cellphone use in schools, and Senate Bill 3070, which proposes abolishing the Texas Lottery Commission. If the governor vetoes a bill prior to June 2, the legislature can call a session to override it. [You can track any vetoes from Gov. Abbott here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1qwzAUhZ9G3mKufvyjQUMhGApNh3ToaK6ja0egRMK6dZK3L02hL9DtDIdzPr7Pw3jAEMN1eccLOb7PabzSrURipnXMEa8pEvpSGJmY7li-ciEeFahmB-0O5OgxxMdoKu8m8FZW5GRn-q5rOt1UZ9eA1OCNsZO2XWdoNg0YUCfZGJrRUhXczxi0IKUEJVU9tVZPvewBSSIoKwyQD5zWms-_DHN8pI3W-pQuVXRn5lyEfhFqEGo4YQ6cYv0s1kvahBqOlNPK5S_VWPJd6OGNlg8qReh9b49Cta97ofcbcSI_PZa0Vavz-RZiDKXthIHlgiE-X_l_rjanvgMAAP__wrt9nQ).

Texas Supreme Court Greenlights Paxton Investigation of Migrant Facility The Texas Supreme Court unanimously granted Attorney General Ken Paxton’s appeal to in El Paso. The facility is accused of violating state law by “knowingly and purposely” housing illegal immigrants and aiding in their introduction into the United States. The decision followed an appeal by Paxton from shutting down Annunciation House. The court also granted a permanent injunction blocking records requests from the Attorney General. The Supreme Court took no stance on the merits of the overall case outside of overturning the district court’s injunction against Paxton. . Gov. Greg Abbott Set to Make Decisions on Several Key Bills The Texas legislative session ends Monday, giving Gov. Greg Abbott until June 22 to sign or veto any in the final 10 days, or they become law by default. Under state law, lawmakers cannot challenge a veto, as only the governor can call a special session after Monday. Gov. Abbott is not expected to call a session for any bill he plans to veto. Two high-profile bills are being closely watched as Monday approaches: , which would ban cellphone use in schools, and Senate Bill 3070, which proposes abolishing the Texas Lottery Commission. On January 6th, 2021, I went to the Capitol to __**peacefully**__ protest a stolen election. That was what President Trump asked us to do and I saw no problem with that. But as you know, none of that mattered to the Biden Regime. They sent FBI informants into the crowd to purposefully PROVOKE and ENTRAP us. What I didn’t realize at the time was that _that nightmare was only beginning_. **Because what happened next was _even worse._** ** ** I was DRAGGED in front of an Obama-appointed judge. My trial was a JOKE. They didn’t care that I was peaceful. They didn’t care that I never hurt a cop or destroyed property. And looking back, they KNEW it was all a setup all along – orchestrated by _none other than Nancy Pelosi and the FBI_. ** ****Didn’t matter. ** ** ** My FATE was sealed the moment I stepped into that court room. ** ** **Prison was my home now.** **For nearly 100 days, I spent my nights alone in a Biden Gulag.** Solitary confinement too – treated like an animal in a cage. When in reality, I was just a _normal American dad who had bills to pay, a family to take care of, and life to live_. ** ** But this isn’t a sob story... ** ****YOU can help me turn this into a COMEBACK story >>>** ** ** President Trump PARDONED me on January 20th, 2025. name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Big shift on PA college campuses
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ce0c33f9a8&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[‘The place I love has betrayed me’: Haverford professor speaks out on rising antisemitism](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=fbb45572ab&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Beth Ann Rosica_
Hatred towards Jews is not limited to Ivy League campuses — even small, suburban liberal arts schools like Haverford College are experiencing pervasive antisemitism. However, the attacks on this campus, situated on the affluent Main Line, are targeted primarily towards Zionist Jews — those who believe in Israel’s right to exist as a country.

Haverford College President Wendy Raymond had an opportunity earlier this month to set the record straight at a congressional hearing in Washington D.C., but her performance was as abysmal as the former UPenn and Harvard presidents’ testimonies in 2023. Both Liz Magill (Penn) and Claudine Gay (Harvard) resigned as president from their Ivy League universities shortly after their feeble performances.

Thus far, there are no signs of Raymond resigning, either voluntarily or involuntarily; however the college atmosphere is contentious according to several sources.

**Why It Matters**. Barak Mendelsohn is a tenured political science professor at Haverford and is the only Israeli-American faculty member. In an interview with _Broad + Liberty_ , he cited “rampant antisemitism” that the administration fails to address or stop.

Mendelsohn describes a campus where Jewish students are afraid to attend Shabbat dinner at the Chabad House or wear a kippah, a traditional headcovering for men, for fear of being attacked. Some students are afraid to even visit the Chabad House, the Jewish community center just outside campus. He talked about “loyalty tests” where Jewish students are forced to publicly state their position on the state of Israel.

According to Mendelsohn, the so-called “good Jews” — those who reject Israel’s right to exist and wish genocide on half the Jews who reside in Israel — pass the loyalty test and are not attacked or bullied. However, “bad Jews” — the Zionists, those who support Israel’s right to exist, even if supporting a two-state solution — are subject to regular intimidation and hateful behavior.

**Quotable**. Ironically, Mendelsohn describes himself as left-leaning. Despite serving in the Israeli Defense Force (IDF), he said, “I do not defend Israel’s actions, but I refuse to argue about what must be given — Israel’s right to exist.” **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=dcf9842c19&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Shapiro administration withheld rows of metadata on Vereb scandal, unlike in similar case](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=243130d29a&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Todd Shepherd_
Gov. Josh Shapiro’s office withheld rows of metadata in response to a document request from this organization — a striking departure from how it handled a similar request by another reporter well over a year earlier. The inconsistency again suggests that the administration may be selectively applying transparency rules when it comes to scrutiny of the Mike Vereb scandal. The finding comes just weeks after _Broad + Liberty_[ reported](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=26cd67eb27&e=b7b3eddce2) that the Shapiro administration deleted the email account of the young woman deputy who accused Mike Vereb of workplace sexual harassment —[ while preserving](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=80db788849&e=b7b3eddce2) the accounts of other former staffers. Together, the reports raise new questions about whether the administration is selectively withholding or deleting records tied to the scandal. **Why It Matters. ** This practice of deleting entire rows of data rather than redacting them stands in sharp contrast to a records request from Spotlight PA reporter Stephen Caruso. In August 2023, Caruso requested all metadata for a single month for the governor’s chief of staff. In the appeal that followed, the Office of Open Records noted that the metadata log contained in excess of 5,000 entries. The subject line for 255 of those might “reveal privileged communications,” and “four additional subject lines that reflect internal, predecisional deliberations of various topics, and three subject lines that relate to a noncriminal investigation.” Yet for all of that privileged information identified — privilege being the same exemption the office applied to the _Broad + Liberty_ request — it seems clear from the[ OOR final determination](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2d4de8b25a&e=b7b3eddce2) on Caruso’s request that the office only applied redactions. Nothing in the final determination would appear to indicate that the office deleted entire rows of data. Meanwhile, the governor’s office still refuses to answer the key question: When, exactly, was the email account for the aide deleted? **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6da4110082&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: Marco Rubio gets it](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0c5e855000&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: Philadelphia versus the rule of law](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2de25ad83a&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Patty-Pat Kozlowski: The ‘Summertime’ of the ’90s song is now a distant memory](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ae3c94b178&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Christine Flowers: Weaponized words can lead to terror](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b6ac0a023d&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Chris Gibbons: A Memorial Day tribute to “Philadelphia’s own”](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7ecc0f624a&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Karen O’Keefe: It’s time for a sensible approach to cannabis in Pennsylvania](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e2b964aea1&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2cc5439791&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **4\. Making an impact**
This week, Penn Medicine announced that it would [no longer perform “gender-affirming surgeries” on children](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7c475c4c71&e=b7b3eddce2). The change was the result of federal pressure on the issue from the Trump administration, but you might not have known that sex changes for kids were happening at all in Philadelphia if not for reporting from Beth Ann Rosica, including [this story](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0eff61594c&e=b7b3eddce2) from just two days before Penn’s announcement.

Now, we don’t want to claim all the credit — the leveraging of federal dollars is the real force for change here. But it is fair to say that keeping the issue in the public eye, especially when the mainstream media tries to hide it, plays an important role in bringing about positive change in the region. Beth Ann deserves our thanks, as do all of the readers and donors that make her work possible.
---
|
---
|
# **5\. What we're reading**
We at _Broad + Liberty_ have been concerned for some time about the lack of transparency in the governor’s office. But we’re not the only ones. This week at _RealClear Pennsylvania_ , Oliver Bateman asks, “[Does Josh Shapiro have a secrecy problem?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2de49c53fd&e=b7b3eddce2)” Shapiro coasted to victory with the votes and good will of millions of Pennsylvanians, but as Bateman writes, he is burning that credibility “at an alarming rate with a pattern of secrecy that threatens to define his governorship.”************
---
|
---

clean_body: News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | | | | | Good morning and welcome to Broad + Liberty 's Weekly Reads. Stay up to date on all of this and more when you get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | | 1. By Beth Ann Rosica Hatred towards Jews is not limited to Ivy League campuses — even small, suburban liberal arts schools like Haverford College are experiencing pervasive antisemitism. However, the attacks on this campus, situated on the affluent Main Line, are targeted primarily towards Zionist Jews — those who believe in Israel’s right to exist as a country. Haverford College President Wendy Raymond had an opportunity earlier this month to set the record straight at a congressional hearing in Washington D.C., but her performance was as abysmal as the former UPenn and Harvard presidents’ testimonies in 2023. Both Liz Magill (Penn) and Claudine Gay (Harvard) resigned as president from their Ivy League universities shortly after their feeble performances. Thus far, there are no signs of Raymond resigning, either voluntarily or involuntarily; however the college atmosphere is contentious according to several sources. Why It Matters. Barak Mendelsohn is a tenured political science professor at Haverford and is the only Israeli-American faculty member. In an interview with Broad + Liberty , he cited “rampant antisemitism” that the administration fails to address or stop. Mendelsohn describes a campus where Jewish students are afraid to attend Shabbat dinner at the Chabad House or wear a kippah, a traditional headcovering for men, for fear of being attacked. Some students are afraid to even visit the Chabad House, the Jewish community center just outside campus. He talked about “loyalty tests” where Jewish students are forced to publicly state their position on the state of Israel. According to Mendelsohn, the so-called “good Jews” — those who reject Israel’s right to exist and wish genocide on half the Jews who reside in Israel — pass the loyalty test and are not attacked or bullied. However, “bad Jews” — the Zionists, those who support Israel’s right to exist, even if supporting a two-state solution — are subject to regular intimidation and hateful behavior. Quotable. Ironically, Mendelsohn describes himself as left-leaning. Despite serving in the Israeli Defense Force (IDF), he said, “I do not defend Israel’s actions, but I refuse to argue about what must be given — Israel’s right to exist.” | | 2. By Todd Shepherd Gov. Josh Shapiro’s office withheld rows of metadata in response to a document request from this organization — a striking departure from how it handled a similar request by another reporter well over a year earlier. The inconsistency again suggests that the administration may be selectively applying transparency rules when it comes to scrutiny of the Mike Vereb scandal. The finding comes just weeks after Broad + Liberty that the Shapiro administration deleted the email account of the young woman deputy who accused Mike Vereb of workplace sexual harassment — the accounts of other former staffers. Together, the reports raise new questions about whether the administration is selectively withholding or deleting records tied to the scandal. Why It Matters. This practice of deleting entire rows of data rather than redacting them stands in sharp contrast to a records request from Spotlight PA reporter Stephen Caruso. In August 2023, Caruso requested all metadata for a single month for the governor’s chief of staff. In the appeal that followed, the Office of Open Records noted that the metadata log contained in excess of 5,000 entries. The subject line for 255 of those might “reveal privileged communications,” and “four additional subject lines that reflect internal, predecisional deliberations of various topics, and three subject lines that relate to a noncriminal investigation.” Yet for all of that privileged information identified — privilege being the same exemption the office applied to the Broad + Liberty request — it seems clear from the on Caruso’s request that the office only applied redactions. Nothing in the final determination would appear to indicate that the office deleted entire rows of data. Meanwhile, the governor’s office still refuses to answer the key question: When, exactly, was the email account for the aide deleted? | | 3\. Lightning Round | | | 4\. Making an impact This week, Penn Medicine announced that it would . The change was the result of federal pressure on the issue from the Trump administration, but you might not have known that sex changes for kids were happening at all in Philadelphia if not for reporting from Beth Ann Rosica, including from just two days before Penn’s announcement. Now, we don’t want to claim all the credit — the leveraging of federal dollars is the real force for change here. But it is fair to say that keeping the issue in the public eye, especially when the mainstream media tries to hide it, plays an important role in bringing about positive change in the region. Beth Ann deserves our thanks, as do all of the readers and donors that make her work possible. | | 5\. What we're reading We at Broad + Liberty have been concerned for some time about the lack of transparency in the governor’s office. But we’re not the only ones. name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Following up on your Census
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
I’m sending a secure link so you can complete this right away.
| **_FROM THE DESK OF DONALD TRUMP JR._**
---
Peter,
---
The Fake News media has begun running headlines about how my father’s coalition is “fraying” because MAGA voters no longer support his agenda.
---
_I don’t believe that for a second..._
---
But it’s never been more important to make sure he still has the support of the American people as he works tirelessly to Make America Great Again.
---
**And during our most recent data pull, I noticed your 2025 Trump-Voter Census was still incomplete.**
---
_The responses to this vital survey help us determine where we should allocate valuable campaign resources for the midterms._
---
I can’t stress enough how important it is that you take just a moment to fill it out.
---
That is why, with the submission deadline rapidly approaching, I’m sending you a secure link containing your Census so you can complete it right away.
---

clean_body: I’m sending a secure link so you can complete this right away. | FROM THE DESK OF DONALD TRUMP JR. Peter, The Fake News media has begun running headlines about how my father’s coalition is “fraying” because MAGA voters no longer support his agenda. I don’t believe that for a second... But it’s never been more important to make sure he still has the support of the American people as he works tirelessly to Make America Great Again. And during our most recent data pull, I noticed your 2025 Trump-Voter Census was still incomplete. The responses to this vital survey help us determine where we should allocate valuable campaign resources for the midterms. I can’t stress enough how important it is that you take just a moment to fill it out. That is why, with the submission deadline rapidly approaching, I’m sending you a secure link containing your Census so you can complete it right away. Please don’t wait any longer, Peter – use the following secure link to submit your responses. name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Thank you, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
First and foremost, thank you for bearing with a slight uptick in the number of emails and text messages we normally send.
#

First and foremost, thank you for bearing with a slight uptick in the number of emails and text messages we normally send.
We had some fundraising goals to reach for the month of May, we were short of those goals, and it required sending a few more messages than usual.
This is going to be one of the closest and most expensive races of the midterms and winning will not be easy. But nothing worth doing ever is.
So thank you for your continued support, and please know that from Jon to everyone else working daily on this campaign, we are always thinking about what we do not just to raise the money we need to win, but to ensure that every dollar we raise and every donation we receive is well spent.
Thank you,
Team Ossoff

* * *

**👋 Wait! Before you go... 👋**
Jon Ossoff in Georgia is the ONLY Democratic Senator running for re-election in a state Trump won and winning will take a massive grassroots movement able to stand up to record spending in order to defeat us.
Can you take a minute to personally endorse Jon Ossoff's campaign for U.S. Senate in Georgia? It’s a small and simple act, but it speaks volumes about the grassroots support this campaign has.
[**Add your name to say you endorse Jon Ossoff for Senate.**](https://act.electjon.com/signup/ossoff-em-endorse-june25/?source=em250601-1&akid=405%2E5691347%2EQmhajH)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.electjon.com/signup/ossoff-em-endorse-june25/?source=em250601-1&akid=405%2E5691347%2EQmhajH)**

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=405%2E5691347%2EQmhajH) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

# A Long Overdue Update
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=74b0a923ca&e=93b2c2b824)
|
## Announcing Goodwell Foods
---
| For years, I’ve suggested that the best way to navigate uncertainty is to integrate thinking by crossing silos and connecting dots. I’ve often described this method as the “generalist approach” because it prioritizes breadth of perspective over depth of expertise. It is impossible, I believe, to fully appreciate the complexities of our time without combining geopolitical, macroeconomic, regulatory, political, technological, demographic, and social perspectives. At the core of my thinking is a simple belief: _**context matters**_.
And so when I decided to return to the business world last fall, I started practicing what I preached. As I evaluated the many start-up, acquisition, and investment ideas that were swirling around my head, I constantly returned to my analytical framework of trying to understand the context. How, for instance, might a warmer planet impact the demand for HVAC services? Sure, demand for air conditioning might rise, but what about heating? Or how could demographics affect a sawmill’s potential revenue streams? Would aging populations help or hurt the market for building materials? And regardless of industry, I always returned to asking myself about technology. How might technology disrupt the industry, sector, or business I was analyzing?
I evaluated dozens of potential opportunities before homing in on one opportunity that caught my attention. During the summer of 2024, a New Hampshire-based pizza manufacturing operation had suddenly shut its doors, sending several dozen employees to the unemployment lines. Attempting to salvage value, banks and others who lent money to the company took control and began a process to find a buyer for the business. When I learned about the situation, there were several interested bidders looking to buy and restore the company. It wasn’t until those parties failed to make a deal that I began to really dig into the opportunity of entering the pizza manufacturing business.I began my diligence by focusing on the context. Regardless of the unique circumstances of the specific opportunity, I had to answer a simple question: _**Do I even want to be in the frozen pizza business?**_
To answer this question, I started my analysis with a focus on the big picture and the trends that were impacting the...
---
| [CLICK TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=fdd29a7cdc&e=93b2c2b824)
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=06bcc0433b&e=93b2c2b824)
|
# Goodwell: What’s in a Name?
---
|
What’s my favorite book? That’s a question I am often asked, and it’s become harder to answer these past few years. The titles and authors I’ve named for decades come readily to mind, but I’ve started to wonder if those answers are still true. It’s been years since I’ve read some of them, and while they appealed to the teenage or undergraduate version of me, I wondered if they still would now that I am an adult. I have a friend – big Hemingway fan - who recently told me that he never cared for _The Old Man and the Sea_ when he read it in high school, but when he re-read it in middle-age, it landed a lot differently.
And so last summer, at the active encouragement of my good friend Worth Wray, I reread _Atlas Shrugged_. I rediscovered Objectivism and quickly became intellectually obsessed with Ayn Rand’s thinking. I reread the books of my youth, tearing through _Anthem_ and _The Virtues of Selfishness, We the Living,_ and _Capitalism_. Her insights into class warfare, tyranny, freedom, and the distinction between producers and looters now had an urgent relevance that I didn’t recall in my college reading of her work.
In much of Western culture, the capitalist is often portrayed as a villain, exploiting workers for his personal gain. For Rand, the businessman who created and built and hired was the hero of the story; production was the greatest virtue. And Rand saw business as a unique bulwark against tyranny. She [wrote](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=db5018c9a6&e=93b2c2b824) that _**while other professions exist in totalitarian societies – politicians, farmers, teachers, scientists, soldiers – businessmen do not**_. Businessmen are what distinguish capitalist from statist societies, and Rand saw them as the ultimate symbol of freedom. One of her key messages was that there was a massive difference between businessmen who produce and bureaucrats who live off the production of others.
Rediscovering Rand was one of the reasons I decided to start a business last fall, something I wrote about in my last post. I had written and thought and taught about business. I had advised and served on the boards of some of the largest companies in the world. I had even started a few small businesses, usually focused on ideas and the abstract (I had often referred to myself as an “entrepreneur of ideas”). It was time to start and run a business that created something tangible and concrete, while also creating jobs.
And hence I formed [Goodwell Foods](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=38579b5c16&e=93b2c2b824), a private label frozen pizza manufacturer located in Pittsfield, NH that now employs several dozen people. We went from standing still to sprinting...
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [CLICK TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=6a337a249b&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
|
# Other Mansharamani Musings...
---
| As many of you are aware, I’ve returned to writing my weekly newsletter and have been pleased by the rapidly growing interest in my thoughts. As I have in the past, I’m addressing a wide range of topics, ranging from geopolitics and economics to social trends to technology. The overall theme of my work is focused on “navigating uncertainty” and how a generalist approach can help us all make sense of what seems like chaos. If you have not already done so, please consider subscribing! (**It’s Free**!)
---
| [Subscribe to “Navigating Uncertainty” by Vikram Mansharamani](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=f12af79adf&e=93b2c2b824)
---
| Over the past few months, I’ve written about [America’s evolving global role](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=4daa0bf65c&e=93b2c2b824), [egg prices](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=11ce12f1e1&e=93b2c2b824), [Greenland](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=5444a2b84e&e=93b2c2b824), [the downfall of DEI](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=8a83d6d875&e=93b2c2b824), [gold prices](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=ce4f291b95&e=93b2c2b824), [college selection anxiety](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=5ffb963ce6&e=93b2c2b824), [Chile and copper](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=b39d0cc4e7&e=93b2c2b824), [the NFL draft](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=dd7df81eee&e=93b2c2b824), and a lot more!
And if you missed my annual set predictions posted earlier this year, please click on the link below to read them.

I’ve often described this method as the “generalist approach” because it prioritizes breadth of perspective over depth of expertise. It is impossible, I believe, to fully appreciate the complexities of our time without combining geopolitical, macroeconomic, regulatory, political, technological, demographic, and social perspectives. At the core of my thinking is a simple belief: context matters. And so when I decided to return to the business world last fall, I started practicing what I preached. As I evaluated the many start-up, acquisition, and investment ideas that were swirling around my head, I constantly returned to my analytical framework of trying to understand the context. How, for instance, might a warmer planet impact the demand for HVAC services? Sure, demand for air conditioning might rise, but what about heating? Or how could demographics affect a sawmill’s potential revenue streams? Would aging populations help or hurt the market for building materials? And regardless of industry, I always returned to asking myself about technology. How might technology disrupt the industry, sector, or business I was analyzing? I evaluated dozens of potential opportunities before homing in on one opportunity that caught my attention. During the summer of 2024, a New Hampshire-based pizza manufacturing operation had suddenly shut its doors, sending several dozen employees to the unemployment lines. Attempting to salvage value, banks and others who lent money to the company took control and began a process to find a buyer for the business. When I learned about the situation, there were several interested bidders looking to buy and restore the company. It wasn’t until those parties failed to make a deal that I began to really dig into the opportunity of entering the pizza manufacturing business.I began my diligence by focusing on the context. Regardless of the unique circumstances of the specific opportunity, I had to answer a simple question: Do I even want to be in the frozen pizza business? To answer this question, I started my analysis with a focus on the big picture and the trends that were impacting the... | | Goodwell: What’s in a Name? | What’s my favorite book? That’s a question I am often asked, and it’s become harder to answer these past few years. The titles and authors I’ve named for decades come readily to mind, but I’ve started to wonder if those answers are still true. It’s been years since I’ve read some of them, and while they appealed to the teenage or undergraduate version of me, I wondered if they still would now that I am an adult. I have a friend – big Hemingway fan - who recently told me that he never cared for The Old Man and the Sea when he read it in high school, but when he re-read it in middle-age, it landed a lot differently. And so last summer, at the active encouragement of my good friend Worth Wray, I reread Atlas Shrugged. I rediscovered Objectivism and quickly became intellectually obsessed with Ayn Rand’s thinking. I reread the books of my youth, tearing through Anthem and The Virtues of Selfishness, We the Living, and Capitalism. Her insights into class warfare, tyranny, freedom, and the distinction between producers and looters now had an urgent relevance that I didn’t recall in my college reading of her work. In much of Western culture, the capitalist is often portrayed as a villain, exploiting workers for his personal gain. For Rand, the businessman who created and built and hired was the hero of the story; production was the greatest virtue. And Rand saw business as a unique bulwark against tyranny. She that while other professions exist in totalitarian societies – politicians, farmers, teachers, scientists, soldiers – businessmen do not. Businessmen are what distinguish capitalist from statist societies, and Rand saw them as the ultimate symbol of freedom. One of her key messages was that there was a massive difference between businessmen who produce and bureaucrats who live off the production of others. Rediscovering Rand was one of the reasons I decided to start a business last fall, something I wrote about in my last post. I had written and thought and taught about business. I had advised and served on the boards of some of the largest companies in the world. I had even started a few small businesses, usually focused on ideas and the abstract (I had often referred to myself as an “entrepreneur of ideas”). It was time to start and run a business that created something tangible and concrete, while also creating jobs. And hence I formed , a private label frozen pizza manufacturer located in Pittsfield, NH that now employs several dozen people. We went from standing still to sprinting... | | | | | | | | | | | | | Other Mansharamani Musings... | As many of you are aware, I’ve returned to writing my weekly newsletter and have been pleased by the rapidly growing interest in my thoughts. As I have in the past, I’m addressing a wide range of topics, ranging from geopolitics and economics to social trends to technology. The overall theme of my work is focused on “navigating uncertainty” and how a generalist approach can help us all make sense of what seems like chaos. If you have not already done so, please consider subscribing! (It’s Free!) | | Over the past few months, I’ve written about , , , , , , , , and a lot more! And if you missed my annual set predictions posted earlier this year, please click on the link below to read them. | | Want Vikram to speak at your event? | Have an upcoming board meeting, corporate offsite, conference or other event in which you might want to have Vikram share his view about the global economy, geopolitical dynamics, technological developments, or social pressures? name: Ted Cruz for NumbersUSA
subject: Fwd: Trump can’t fix this alone — he needs backup
body:
Birthright Citizenship was never meant for illegal aliens | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=cc9e3be308974b75813a143185aa0f5e&_e=ayT7-MIzVG56oQeXmVMxLvawSXnjVnve7g6bnOoSt9dzEapbbetVkf8_lCxRIPnndpLiMNuWL5M5azxD3hNC7h7flQU9UgpFGBeyRCv_vcu-y4DpvMUwkpIT7Inxk-dkqXT36_b10AXLJKLjRyLCgdrGVlh7o4K7iVVSQKyfbBdtN6VvEp-KPKgQxqrZhLbICkaMeBX9GoJw0lmXNmBetS7d2nQyJPgR_iJVhkJDZrcpjQdxwYowL1zcqb9_tVDFi9O0EBy5PRqE-hYn1JAG_FCjfKNwmN3NpGE5_RBdvl4LM_K6cJNO-1axUe62uA3r-VDHTsRMRtejCtWXVZS_Htr-rpoiRJ813QkdU-mYPYI%3D)
---
| | Peter,Communities across America remain overwhelmed by millions of illegal aliens President Biden waved across the border. The biased media keeps flooding our airwaves with open borders propaganda.And billionaires like George Soros are propping up Leftist NGOS, radical activists, and political puppets to advance the globalist, anti-American agenda of the oligarchs.They want to keep all of Biden’s illegal aliens in this country and turn America into a socialist “Open Society.” For the past fifty years, they’ve undermined American workers, American culture, and the American Dream...But I’m not writing today just to tell you about how open borders have hurt hard-working Americans.You already know that. I’m writing to tell you about the organization that is poised to put the screws to these open borders politicians and reshape the entire public discussion around immigration.That organization is **[**NumbersUSA.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=cc9e3be308974b75813a143185aa0f5e&_e=ayT7-MIzVG56oQeXmVMxLvawSXnjVnve7g6bnOoSt9dzEapbbetVkf8_lCxRIPnndpLiMNuWL5M5azxD3hNC7h7flQU9UgpFGBeyRCv_vcu-y4DpvMUwkpIT7Inxk-dkqXT36_b10AXLJKLjRyLCgdrGVlh7o4K7iVVSQKyfbBdtN6VvEp-KPKgQxqrZhLbICkaMeBX9GoJw0lmXNmBetZjI8BuWkDrgZqmGEx9s8nOm9GAzzDJR-FNzvAC_E1s4dzP3WE_HfLL4qpE_DtRmCOVBDSDFao-e-r1Iz8z8zRwpG4qySuLUmBZMW1CK1ZfOSBeYabcutdlE2vWlJxd_FSNPSuTy83XUGDaqdur16ag%3D)** You may not have heard of them before, but since I took office in 2013, I’ve seen time after time how powerful they are in exerting public pressure on wishy-washy politicians.**NumbersUSA** harnesses the power of over 8 million grassroots members all focused on one issue: immigration.They are the voice on Capitol Hill for an America-first immigration agenda.And they grade every member of Congress to show who truly puts America first on immigration and who just talks a big game on the campaign trail. I’m honored that, after twelve years of service, **NumbersUSA** calculates I’ve earned an “A” on my career immigration report card. This sort of pressure and public accountability are vital if we want to execute President Trump’s immigration agenda. You see, many of my colleagues don’t have deeply held convictions like you, me, and President Trump.They just go whichever way the political winds blow.That’s why the Radical Left has dominated this issue from as far back as I can remember. They’ve outraised us...They’ve outspent us...And then they’ve strong-armed spineless officials into selling out the American people.Frankly, if we want to take our country back, we need **NumbersUSA** to rally American patriots from across our great land. That’s why I wanted to drop in this little note today to accompany the letter from Roy Beck, the founder of **NumbersUSA**.He’ll tell you all about the wonderful work they’re doing, and I’d ask you to consider supporting them however you see fit. We have a narrow window to make a difference, and we need your help now more than ever. God Bless you and God Bless America!
---
**Senator Ted Cruz** for **NumbersUSA**
---
P.S. **Roy’s email to you is included below.** It will help explain how we can fix our national embarrassment of an immigration system. This couldn’t be coming at a more critical moment, so please read it and [get back to him and the folks at **NumbersUSA** as soon as you can!](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=cc9e3be308974b75813a143185aa0f5e&_e=ayT7-MIzVG56oQeXmVMxLvawSXnjVnve7g6bnOoSt9dzEapbbetVkf8_lCxRIPnndpLiMNuWL5M5azxD3hNC7h7flQU9UgpFGBeyRCv_vcu-y4DpvMUwkpIT7Inxk-dkqXT36_b10AXLJKLjRyLCgdrGVlh7o4K7iVVSQKyfbBdtN6VvEp-KPKgQxqrZhLbICkaMeBX9GoJw0lmXNmBeteY3CWa22vh6P8CglDU6J9vc8GG7pGIs6JMpIHer-QE4qVfqtzNyZ69FXwcwNxoxDXj5qQYTxIToD7CGy2kHweXELAC0rMj-h9evIkxYFDWxL-RhxUbjS8ZMRygt22MDlFyAs9fjedlsPuehKnIomdY%3D)
---
| | |
---
Begin Forwarded Message:**From** : Roy Beck, NumbersUSA
---
My Fellow Fighter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness.** ****And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my _Birthright Citizenship Survey_.** **[Would you be able to set aside five minutes to fill out the survey linked here?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=cc9e3be308974b75813a143185aa0f5e&_e=ayT7-MIzVG56oQeXmVMxLvawSXnjVnve7g6bnOoSt9dzEapbbetVkf8_lCxRIPnndpLiMNuWL5M5azxD3hNC7h7flQU9UgpFGBeyRCv_vcu-y4DpvMUwkpIT7Inxk-dkqXT36_b10AXLJKLjRyLCgdrGVlh7o4K7iVVSQKyfbBdtN6VvEp-KPKgQxqrZhLbICkaMeBX9GoJw0lmXNmBetbCi9eEOPcdGIUpodjTqUbyKaBfTFRTJHVeJ8o1O9fxcN7gjeZxbjPy1qlu-Fpqg1M97lgMJRA4cYqFLO-6v4WnTyrrY0k4--c3fqs7QLH74XmGWCA3btoiRgS9ltDIk4B5fD49dhSvFGB_Ykqh6vUA%3D "https://numbersusa.revv.co/rcl8f50335bb65ae?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250527_BDG_NUSA_BRCSTC_REV_RCL-RCL&utm_term=GAP")** We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship......and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens.As Ted Cruz says, "politicians go wherever the wind blows." **So if you want action on immigration in this session of Congress, Senator Cruz needs your help to rally the troops and put pressure on his colleagues.** **[And that all starts with this Birthright Citizenship Survey that I’m asking you to complete today.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=cc9e3be308974b75813a143185aa0f5e&_e=ayT7-MIzVG56oQeXmVMxLvawSXnjVnve7g6bnOoSt9dzEapbbetVkf8_lCxRIPnndpLiMNuWL5M5azxD3hNC7h7flQU9UgpFGBeyRCv_vcu-y4DpvMUwkpIT7Inxk-dkqXT36_b10AXLJKLjRyLCgdrGVlh7o4K7iVVSQKyfbBdtN6VvEp-KPKgQxqrZhLbICkaMeBX9GoJw0lmXNmBetUrPRX0cUM91HVXq_L-W-KDjHdod36ZNWRjZOVqKj98RW4kofXEcA_dXJ_PicwZpIJabmILvqStu3l3jeOZtLLWYojkD1PUXDtLwWoK6omEoOMOifP35nTCBzffp2x9MaSjyTNAF31A9hqfob_AfjDQ%3D "https://numbersusa.revv.co/rcl8f50335bb65ae?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250527_BDG_NUSA_BRCSTC_REV_RCL-RCL&utm_term=GAP")** Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...**And it was _definitely not_ for illegal aliens.**In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, **_AND_** subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...**In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000.** These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.**_But Trump can’t do it alone._**
---
[ **Take the Survey** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=cc9e3be308974b75813a143185aa0f5e&_e=ayT7-MIzVG56oQeXmVMxLvawSXnjVnve7g6bnOoSt9dzEapbbetVkf8_lCxRIPnndpLiMNuWL5M5azxD3hNC7h7flQU9UgpFGBeyRCv_vcu-y4DpvMUwkpIT7Inxk-dkqXT36_b10AXLJKLjRyLCgdrGVlh7o4K7iVVSQKyfbBdtN6VvEp-KPKgQxqrZhLbICkaMeBX9GoJw0lmXNmBetVYvxlZGPq3r0vaFH47ohkr6f_QXtYkBuHTxqtvNi5VNJy_2YE1YjQ0qQgrTlEOhOOgG74ZNjP9QGyJVPpFFTRcBk5o-0LNQuBbTf4wMq3XzUK4YVf8Pp9mNnevIEaHTnw4I001pRZObI-hzOGdNxj0%3D)
---
**Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best.** Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly. In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard.The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won. Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country.To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck. It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it.We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level. But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.**In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you.** And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me, or the great folks at NumbersUSA, or even Senator Ted Cruz—**no, it’s the unmistakable _DEMAND _of the American people.**And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage. Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. **[So after you fill out your survey, please make a generous donation of $35, $50, $100 or even as much as $500 or $1,000.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=cc9e3be308974b75813a143185aa0f5e&_e=ayT7-MIzVG56oQeXmVMxLvawSXnjVnve7g6bnOoSt9dzEapbbetVkf8_lCxRIPnndpLiMNuWL5M5azxD3hNC7h7flQU9UgpFGBeyRCv_vcu-y4DpvMUwkpIT7Inxk-dkqXT36_b10AXLJKLjRyLCgdrGVlh7o4K7iVVSQKyfbBdtN6VvEp-KPKgQxqrZhLbICkaMeBX9GoJw0lmXNmBetXvugELdFl7RcdGhDZFtt6eoNGkf1qIXboAt_OxoiJaxZfkNcCyskbxIrYc68qxTfEGIjHrhpu91lWWdLeeeWzCYRIYcuJ_YFuy5s-35mdoG7yhOJG0yWSQu7zaMoJwiB1tY_O0XXr63Pnk_JGzgQXg%3D "https://numbersusa.revv.co/rcl8f50335bb65ae?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250527_BDG_NUSA_BRCSTC_REV_RCL-RCL&utm_term=GAP")** **If you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91.** We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation.
