clean_body: Birthright Citizenship was never meant for illegal aliens | | | | | | | | Peter,Communities across America remain overwhelmed by millions of illegal aliens President Biden waved across the border. The biased media keeps flooding our airwaves with open borders propaganda.And billionaires like George Soros are propping up Leftist NGOS, radical activists, and political puppets to advance the globalist, anti-American agenda of the oligarchs.They want to keep all of Biden’s illegal aliens in this country and turn America into a socialist “Open Society.” For the past fifty years, they’ve undermined American workers, American culture, and the American Dream...But I’m not writing today just to tell you about how open borders have hurt hard-working Americans.You already know that. I’m writing to tell you about the organization that is poised to put the screws to these open borders politicians and reshape the entire public discussion around immigration.That organization is You may not have heard of them before, but since I took office in 2013, I’ve seen time after time how powerful they are in exerting public pressure on wishy-washy politicians.NumbersUSA harnesses the power of over 8 million grassroots members all focused on one issue: immigration.They are the voice on Capitol Hill for an America-first immigration agenda.And they grade every member of Congress to show who truly puts America first on immigration and who just talks a big game on the campaign trail. I’m honored that, after twelve years of service, NumbersUSA calculates I’ve earned an “A” on my career immigration report card. This sort of pressure and public accountability are vital if we want to execute President Trump’s immigration agenda. You see, many of my colleagues don’t have deeply held convictions like you, me, and President Trump.They just go whichever way the political winds blow.That’s why the Radical Left has dominated this issue from as far back as I can remember. They’ve outraised us...They’ve outspent us...And then they’ve strong-armed spineless officials into selling out the American people.Frankly, if we want to take our country back, we need NumbersUSA to rally American patriots from across our great land. That’s why I wanted to drop in this little note today to accompany the letter from Roy Beck, the founder of NumbersUSA.He’ll tell you all about the wonderful work they’re doing, and I’d ask you to consider supporting them however you see fit. We have a narrow window to make a difference, and we need your help now more than ever. God Bless you and God Bless America! Senator Ted Cruz for NumbersUSA P.S. Roy’s email to you is included below. It will help explain how we can fix our national embarrassment of an immigration system. This couldn’t be coming at a more critical moment, so please read it and | | | Begin Forwarded Message:From : Roy Beck, NumbersUSA My Fellow Fighter, I’m writing to you today because I believe you’re an America First Patriot who’s sick of the open borders madness. And that’s exactly who I’m hoping to reach with my Birthright Citizenship Survey. "" We’re launching a nationwide campaign to educate and activate American patriots on the real intention of Birthright Citizenship......and the real disaster it has become for American workers and American citizens.As Ted Cruz says, "politicians go wherever the wind blows." So if you want action on immigration in this session of Congress, Senator Cruz needs your help to rally the troops and put pressure on his colleagues. "" Despite what the mainstream media and too many low-level judges are saying, Birthright Citizenship for tourists and illegal aliens is not written into the Constitution.Rather, the 14th Amendment that contains Birthright Citizenship was enacted to grant full citizenship to the slaves freed by Abraham Lincoln — along with their children and their children’s children. It was not meant to apply to foreign visitors...And it was definitely not for illegal aliens.In fact, the text of the 14th Amendment clearly states that it only applies to “persons born or naturalized in the United States, AND subject to the jurisdiction thereof.” But over time, government bureaucrats stretched the 14th Amendment and automatically gave U.S. citizenship to every birth to illegal aliens, and even to foreign nationals vacationing in the United States.Now, the situation has gotten completely out of hand...In 2023 alone, there were roughly 350,000 births to illegal aliens in the U.S. Tourists gave birth to another 40,000. These so-called “anchor babies” can keep illegal alien parents from getting deported and give a legal basis for a whole chain of migrants to push their way into America.Is it any surprise that human traffickers and even high-end birth tourism companies are making billions of dollars?This is not by accident – it’s by design. In fact, the Obama State Department changed U.S. visa rules to explicitly allow women to travel to America for the purpose of giving birth in 2015!Thankfully, the Trump administration overturned this rule and pushed back on illegal immigration on a number of fronts.But Trump can’t do it alone. Fortunately, grassroots organizing is what NumbersUSA does best. Over the past thirty years, we’ve grown from a small staff into the largest single-issue advocacy group in the United States.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of grassroots voters faxing elected officials directly. In 2007, when Ted Kennedy (remember him?) was trying to grant amnesty to millions of illegal aliens, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard.The New York Times “blamed” NumbersUSA as the key factor in blocking Kennedy’s decades-long mass amnesty dream.It was a real David-and-Goliath struggle, and we won. Fast forward to 2025, and our populist immigration position is gaining traction in Washington.The DC power brokers are now calling us when they need to mobilize America-First patriots across the country.To be clear, that’s not because they want to talk to me, Roy Beck. It’s because they know that NumbersUSA is the connection point for 8 million members who understand how our immigration system is utterly broken......and what it will take to fix it.We’ve never had a President like Donald Trump who gets this issue on such a visceral level. But it takes more than just one man to reverse this open borders insanity. He needs a lot of congressional action to back him up and to make improvements permanent.In our decades on Capitol Hill, we have learned that nothing grabs attention like fired-up American patriots just like you. And there’s no denying the impact when a mountain of responses pours in from across the country.It proves that the immigration action we’re calling for isn’t just coming from me, or the great folks at NumbersUSA, or even Senator Ted Cruz—no, it’s the unmistakable DEMAND of the American people.And at that point, a politician doesn’t need one ounce of courage. Just a pinch of common sense will be enough to realize that voting against the American people is a “one-way ticket to Palookaville.”That’s how you take a nationwide network of Patriots and turn it into victories at the ballot box, in Congress, and for generations of Americans to come.That’s what NumbersUSA is all about. We have the experience, we have the playbook, but we need your help to execute on Birthright Citizenship and many other key immigration issues.Since we don’t take a penny from dark money, corrupt NGOs, or the government, we rely on patriots just like you to transform our vision into concrete action. "" If you can’t make a larger donation at this time, I hope you’ll just cover the cost to process your survey—$3.91. We’ve run enough of these campaigns on Capitol Hill to know that it takes a veritable army of American patriots to get through to these elected officials.And the only way to assemble an army is with a call that goes out all across the nation. "" Thank you and God bless you today! | | Roy Beck Founder and PresidentNumbersUSA | | | P.S. I need to hear what you’re seeing where you are — and how you’re thinking about Birthright Citizenship and immigration as a whole. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T59e2db88-524f-42cf-bd7d-eaa71440441e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Brave Books
subject: Help Brave Books Fight Back Against the Woke Agenda in Kids’ Media
body:
|
---
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e212761/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvU2ZBR3h6RjRRdQ/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA2MDE/LbmNsdlJldW9COQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNLS0J1bHh5SEU5bjZscyZfbmxpZD1WSzZrbkdOREtSJl9uaGlkcz1uY0tLQnVseHlIRTluNmxz/gaDxhvw/s7rd6258e5c)
| |
---
Dear Friend, **[I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll make a $35 contribution to BRAVE Books today to help us stand against the government-backed, woke entertainment giants like Disney, Netflix, and PBS.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)** My name is Dr. Trent Talbot, and I founded BRAVE Books because I couldn’t sit back and watch the Left use media to poison the hearts and minds of our children. We’re in the middle of a culture war — and for too long, conservatives haven’t fought back nearly hard enough. Every day we fail to engage, we lose more of our children — and more of our country — to the progressive agenda. Just look at what they’re pushing:
---
* **PBS Kids** aired a special called _“PRIDELAND,”_ promoting LGBTQ+ identity to toddlers.
* **Netflix for Kids** featured a non-binary bison explaining pronouns in _Ridley Jones._
* **PBS** livestreamed the “Transgender Day of Visibility” rally directly into American homes.

---
| | **BRAVE Books is the antidote.** We are fighting back against these woke, pro-transgender, anti-truth platforms by creating faith-based, patriotic content that promotes childhood innocence, Christian values, and American liberty. But unlike Disney or PBS, we don’t receive taxpayer dollars or billion-dollar subsidies. We rely on freedom-loving Americans like you. **[That’s why I’m asking you to make a $35 contribution to BRAVE Books today.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)** Under the Biden administration, Disney+ received funding through USAID. PBS continues to receive federal funding while pumping out content designed to reshape your family’s values. That’s why we are leading the charge to fight back with:
---
* **See You at the Library Day** – countering Drag Queen Story Hour with prayer, pledges, and patriotic book readings.
* **_Iggy and Mr. Kirk_** – a wholesome new series teaching biblical values and American freedoms.
* **BRAVE+** – our own streaming platform offering God-honoring, family-friendly shows like _Liberty’s Kids_ and BRAVE Books exclusives.

---
We’re doing everything we can to push back against the Left’s billion-dollar propaganda machine — **but we need you in this fight**. [**Will you chip in $35, $50, $250, or more to help us fight back and take ground for truth?**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.) This is going to be a long battle — **Disney, Netflix, PBS, HBO, Amazon, Apple...** they all want to shape the next generation in their image. But with your help, BRAVE Books can be the alternative parents are desperately searching for.
---
Thank you for standing with us,
---
| | **Dr. Trent Talbot**
Founder, Brave Books
---
| [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
| | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
**Dr. Trent Talbot**
Founder, Brave Books
---
|
---
| | **P.S.** As Elon Musk recently said, “NGOs are synonymous with money laundering.” The truth is, **your tax dollars have been funding Left-wing indoctrination for decades.** Disney alone received $718 million in public subsidies in 2011. It’s time to stop subsidizing the destruction of our culture—and start rebuilding something better. [**Make your gift today and help BRAVE Books fight back.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---

108 S Washington St. Suite 200

Thank you for standing with us, | | Dr. Trent Talbot Founder, Brave Books | | | Dr. Trent Talbot Founder, Brave Books | | | P.S. As Elon Musk recently said, “NGOs are synonymous with money laundering.” The truth is, your tax dollars have been funding Left-wing indoctrination for decades. Disney alone received $718 million in public subsidies in 2011. It’s time to stop subsidizing the destruction of our culture—and start rebuilding something better. | | If you would like to support Brave Books and our mission by making a gift through the mail then to print out your very own mail form. | Peter, I have some good news to share.

We hit our May fundraising goal and are starting the new month in a strong position. I truly can't thank you enough for the trust and support you've put into our campaign.

_But we can't take our foot off the gas._

June will be our biggest month yet, and this first week will set the tone. On top of new polls and new ads, we have a pair of Virginia state fundraising deadlines coming up — on the 5th and 30th.

That means _even more_ attention will be paid to how much money we raise than usual.

So, I'm asking each person reading this to dig deep and give what they can: [_**Will you join the thousands who've donated to emails like this one and pledge your first $25 to our campaign today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108782369/548997439/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-06-01_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNThlNWQ0NWYtZjUzZS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=trmr0vyoNeZpxZdqJaIm92RcdmeMz8f0Bi0SvDic82c=)

clean_body: We hit our May fundraising goal and are starting the new month in a strong position. | = | Peter, I have some good news to share. We hit our May fundraising goal and are starting the new month in a strong position. I truly can't thank you enough for the trust and support you've put into our campaign. But we can't take our foot off the gas. June will be our biggest month yet, and this first week will set the tone. On top of new polls and new ads, we have a pair of Virginia state fundraising deadlines coming up — on the 5th and 30th. That means even more attention will be paid to how much money we raise than usual. name: NPR + PBS Protection Alert via Our Revolution
subject: Breaking: The hits to NPR and PBS just keep coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

BREAKING: The moment we've been fearing has arrived: the White House
confirmed it will send an official request to Congress to defund NPR and
PBS NEXT WEEK. And House Speaker Johnson has vowed to act quickly to bring
it to a vote.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/30875?source=email-20250601&t=1011&akid=8588%2E5885482%2E0o-X0i ]Headline: Trump to ask Congress to codify DOGE cuts, hitting PBS and
NPR

Make no mistake: Trump's attempt to silence our public broadcasters is a
direct attack on independent journalism and educational programming that
millions across America rely upon. We CANNOT let it happen!

The good news is Congress KNOWS just how popular and vital public media is
to our communities, and even some Republicans have expressed concerns with
Trump’s war on PBS and NPR.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/30876?source=email-20250601&t=1012&akid=8588%2E5885482%2E0o-X0i ]Now it’s up to ALL of us to overwhelm our representatives with demands
to save public media. Click here RIGHT NOW to tell Congress: Vote no on
Trump's dangerous DOGE cuts package!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/30876?source=email-20250601&t=1013&akid=8588%2E5885482%2E0o-X0i ]ADD YOUR NAME

The White House just confirmed that Trump’s DOGE package – which will claw
back $9.4 billion in funding that Congress ALREADY approved – will be sent
to the Hill early next week.

If these reckless cuts pass, communities across America will lose vital
public broadcast stations – the sole providers of in-depth, independent,
community-oriented reporting in many regions.

We don’t have much time, which is why we need to flood lawmakers’ inboxes
immediately with a clear message: we will not stand by as Trump claws back
critical funds in the name of "government efficiency." Speaker Johnson is
betting on minimal resistance – let's prove him wrong and stop this
reckless plan in its tracks.

Click below to send an urgent message to your representatives today
demanding they vote NO on Trump’s dangerous DOGE package – and protect
public broadcasting for millions of Americans depending on it every day.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/30876?source=email-20250601&t=1014&akid=8588%2E5885482%2E0o-X0i ]Tell Congress: Defend NPR & PBS – Vote against Trump’s reckless funding
cuts!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/30876?source=email-20250601&t=1015&akid=8588%2E5885482%2E0o-X0i ]ADD YOUR NAME

This isn’t just a battle about financial allocations – it’s a defense of
independent media that holds politicians accountable, investigates
injustices, and keeps us connected, educated, and engaged.

Our movement has come together time and time again to defend public media
– and we’re not stopping now.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Team DNC
subject: A thank you, and a note on a key race this week
body:
---
Derek – First of all, thank you. Because of supporters like you, we met our important end-of-month fundraising goal in May, which helps us ensure we’ve got the resources to elect more Democrats in races up and down the ballot nationwide. **Now, one of those key races is rapidly approaching: An election this week will determine the leadership of the fourth-largest city in the nation, and the stakes couldn't be higher.** This Saturday, voters in San Antonio will elect their next mayor. This election is truly a referendum on Donald Trump and an opportunity to weaken Republicans’ power. To win races like this one, the DNC is making historic investments in traditionally red states like Texas. **But Texas Democrats need a surge of support right now to reach as many voters as possible before polls close in just a few short days. So we’re asking:** [Can you split a donation now between the Texas Democratic Party and the DNC to help support voter outreach in this key election and in elections to come? ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-tx-split?refcode=em_20250601_3609_fr&amount=10&refcode2=3609_22930333_Tx2c5w&akid=3609%2E22930333%2ETx2c5w) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between the Texas Democratic Party and the Democratic National Committee instantly._ | | | **[Donate $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-tx-split?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_20250601_3609_fr&refcode2=3609_22930333_Tx2c5w&akid=3609%2E22930333%2ETx2c5w)**

It's more American than apple pie.

# _Opinion_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/946efc22-dd33-4961-856d-b6c7a2254187?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Tucker Carlson talks to Forbes about his new nicotine pouch venture.
Before the first apple pie was baked in an American hearth, tobacco and its derivative chemical compound nicotine was waking the American mind.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..OJ-lx6PRAHomFZHYydM1jAakFLAgAsyM5rUNZVHywKc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164841709)
The Native Americans--who have been smoking the stuff for thousands of years--know as well as any other red blooded American that upon breaking the blood-brain barrier, the drug causes the mind to drum like the wings of a an eagle as the first rays of morning sunlight dry its feathers from the cold dew. The technology to deliver nicotine has evolved significantly since those first puffs wafted through a peace pipe under a wigwam somewhere in the virgin American wilderness. How the first shaman decided to take a plant and smoke it is a mystery as old as time, but thank God that he did.
After the Europeans arrived, tobacco was industrialized into cigarettes that captured (and clogged) the hearts of the nation. Then, after it was discovered that cigarettes can cause cancer, it was the vape with its fruity flavored nicotine juice that caused an entire generation of Zoomers to go gaga.
But while millions puffed their electric vape sticks, another, better vice was creeping its way into the bloodstreams of those in the know... no puffing required. All one has to do is to place this product in between the gum and lip (you can choose whether you want to go upper or lower deck, personally I like to rotate) and voila! Nicotine in the veins!
Some of you may be familiar with dip, an older form of smokeless tobacco that required the spitting of rancid juice. As a hockey player, I was a dipper in high school and college, but now even the smell of the stuff makes me feel sick. Then there was Swedish Snus, which came in little pouches and was less messy than dip, but was still made from tobacco and tended to stain teeth brown.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..OJ-lx6PRAHomFZHYydM1jAakFLAgAsyM5rUNZVHywKc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164841709)
But these newfangled lip pillows provide a pleasant, less potent buzz for up to an hour; they are made from nicotine salt so they don't brown the mouth, and there's no spitting required!
So if you are interested in getting involved in some action, where would you start? Sure the long-term effects of this product are untested but what isn't killing you these days, anyways? The following should not be construed as legal advice, although my brother is a doctor and he uses them every day.
Thanks to healthy market competition there are now a variety of products to choose from. There's VELO, ZYN, ZONE, ROGUE; even **[Tucker Carlson got into the game](https://substack.com/redirect/5179210d-5c9a-4d39-8558-cd4b83a0dca6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with his own nicotine pouches called ALP. Full disclosure, ALP is now a sponsor of this newsletter, and you can expect a review just as soon as we get some free samples lining the gums (wink wink, send me some free ALPacinos, Tucker and Neil).
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together with ALP](https://substack.com/redirect/0b9e35c0-53d3-4dd5-8497-822089bb0b72?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# ALP Nicotine Pouches by Tucker Carlson
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0b9e35c0-53d3-4dd5-8497-822089bb0b72?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Founded by Tucker Carlson, ALP isn't just a product; it's a movement. With a dedicated community of users who value freedom, adventure, and innovation, ALP is already the fastest-growing nicotine pouch brand in the world.
ALP is revolutionizing the nicotine pouch industry by creating **[a product that's bold, high-quality, and designed for those who demand more.](https://substack.com/redirect/0b9e35c0-53d3-4dd5-8497-822089bb0b72?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Unlike traditional, dry pouches that leave you wanting more, ALP delivers a moist, flavorful experience with every use, offering a superior alternative to the stale options on the market. With a range of 5 premium flavors including Chilled Mint, Mountain Wintergreen, Sweet Nectar, Refreshing Chill, and Tropical Fruit, ALP caters to a variety of tastes, ensuring there's something for everyone.
Each ALP product is 100% tobacco-free and crafted with the consumer in mind. Available in three nicotine strengths (3mg, 6mg, and 9mg), you can customize your experience to match your needs. Whether you're on the go or kicking back, ALP ensures a smooth, satisfying experience every time.
**[Join the ALP movement today,](https://substack.com/redirect/0b9e35c0-53d3-4dd5-8497-822089bb0b72?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and experience the freshest, boldest nicotine pouches available. Get yours now and see why ALP is changing the game one pouch at a time. Must be 21+ to purchase.
[Join the ALP Movement](https://substack.com/redirect/e1e9f53a-73c4-4036-8485-62f31ecce5a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Continued)**
For now, the most important factor to consider when starting out is dosage: they typically come in 3, 6, and 9 mg pouches. Personally I'm a sixer guy. I like to ride the line between a hefty head buzz of a 9 and the faint forgiveness of a 3. But I know some folks who regularly use 3 millies and occasionally upgrade to 6 or 9 when they need an extra punch.
If you're going to grab a can, please keep this in mind. And yes, this part is definitely professional advice: This drug is highly addictive and will make you extremely productive.
I pop upper deckies when I'm covering protests and usually go lower deck when I clack the keyboard for you folks. My coworker Matt Miller just got hooked on the stuff; it gets him jacked up like he just drank ten cans of Mountain Dew.
For proof of product, in the amount of time it took me to rip through a lip pillow, I just scrawled this article on a notepad while waiting for security to let me into the White House. Maybe I'll ask The President if he can mandate the use of lip pillows in our federal bureaucracy.
* * *

name: Chris Pappas
subject: What Pride means to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
We’ve come so far since I was a kid, but it wasn’t always easy.
Peter,
**I’m Chris Pappas, Democratic candidate for U.S. Senate in New Hampshire.** Heartland Patriots said I could reach out to you today with a special message about Pride.
Growing up in New Hampshire, I often wondered if there would be a place for me here — if I’d be able to live openly and authentically in the state I love. I certainly never imagined I could one day be elected to public office as my authentic self.
But after I finished college, I came home and ran for the state legislature because I wanted to give back to the community that had given me so much.
**And somewhat to my surprise, not only did my community accept me, they gave me their trust and sent me to Concord to serve them in the legislature.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89390?refcode=em20250601-8980&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8980%2E614464%2ETlVRME) _Celebrating with supporters on Election Night 2018_
I’ll never forget the first speech I made from the State House floor. At the time marriage equality was far from the law of the land, and the legislature was debating a bill that would have prohibited New Hampshire from recognizing same-sex marriages performed in other states.
I urged my colleagues, Republicans and Democrats alike, to vote this bill down.
I told them that it ran counter to the “Live Free or Die” spirit we’re so proud of in New Hampshire. And that we shouldn’t be legislating based on fear or hate or trying to punish people for who they love.
Unfortunately the bill passed, and we lost that fight. **But we didn’t give up.**
We persevered, and not long after we passed a new bill recognizing civil unions between same-sex partners. And a few years after that, New Hampshire became the first state in the nation to legalize marriage equality through legislative action.
**Then in 2018 I was elected to Congress as New Hampshire’s first openly gay member** — part of a rainbow wave that ushered in the most pro-equality majority in congressional history.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89390?refcode=em20250601-8980&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8980%2E614464%2ETlVRME) _Delivering my victory speech on Election Night 2018_
**That’s the spirit of Pride, Peter.** It’s not just about celebrating — it’s about persevering in the face of what can seem like overwhelming odds and refusing to give up, even after a devastating loss.
**And although we’ve come a long way since I was growing up, we have to keep persevering today.** Because right now anti-equality extremists are renewing their attacks on LGBTQ+ rights, targeting trans kids, banning books, and spreading fear to divide us.
That’s one of the reasons I’m running for U.S. Senate. New Hampshire needs a voice in Washington who will stand strong for equality, dignity, and freedom — a voice who will continue to uphold our state’s “Live Free or Die” motto.
**I’ll never forget the trust my community has placed in me over the years, and I’ll _always_ keep up the fight to make sure every single person in New Hampshire and our country has the freedom to live openly, authentically, and with pride.**
**[If you’re with me, I hope you’ll split a donation to support my campaign and Heartland Patriots today. New Hampshire is going to be one of the most closely-watched races in the country, and I’m counting on your help to win.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89390?refcode=em20250601-8980&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8980%2E614464%2ETlVRME)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89391?refcode=em20250601-8980&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=8980%2E614464%2ETlVRME) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89391?refcode=em20250601-8980&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=8980%2E614464%2ETlVRME) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89391?refcode=em20250601-8980&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=8980%2E614464%2ETlVRME) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89391?refcode=em20250601-8980&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=8980%2E614464%2ETlVRME) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89391?refcode=em20250601-8980&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=8980%2E614464%2ETlVRME) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89391?refcode=em20250601-8980&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=8980%2E614464%2ETlVRME) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89390?refcode=em20250601-8980&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=8980%2E614464%2ETlVRME)
---
We’ve come a long way, Peter. But we’re not done yet. So let’s keep persevering together.
In solidarity,
Chris Pappas

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Republicans in Congress have no idea why we won the Election
body:
| | | | |
---
Peter,
If you’re sick and tired of** _do-nothing Republicans who talk a big game before every election and then lose all their courage when it’s time to pass laws_** ...
If you’re sick and tired of **_RINO’s begging for your money everyday only to disappear the instant a tough fight begins_** ...
If you’re sick and tired of spending your time and money to help **_politicians who turn their backs on you the moment their plane lands in DC_** ...
**Then you feel exactly the way I do.**
[STAND WITH MTG](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/QbIGEibvKGNw6BZEqix_pfqLfDDieks3YeMPcBPhhd_eMNx9nWmWUHPClZoFx_cpDwDPfIvZk-WaDQLsC_CoZNMwxckDXuBfqbuibsKOTAKENiMrjKkaczcZdvNU1z4_Nb4LzadibWz9zoGlA3iMwXHnDF9l3kh-lOUMbzw_rsSBuStVnQ0Rsf7n8zlYbhJgvpydDHtf_P0TJXmXlVNbPNjRpqQcP-ACdJudIxwQbDJLWcmEVxYbNamWXLwB5PUiZ_eSjv27aOpuX9a5DaKBqOds1yLMFq2E1K78wvlyxYPZnhMDEUFAUT-gvFxH-FhZ85OSPPg6W-s8IkhA_SyeJvWnWIrLQfUqm-JNFLwMzWgcqhTMOsgxB6f1yB9Nmi5qDMPNyB0TRISEIQG1YQNQ4I8oM6_YKDvDVT9F-veG2r3lSGc8kpziL7ZUDjpnHfh8MfP0vCr0upHlTEczmVc6guceLHCEDMl4q0lh7nPt5TOr/wZ2EY_4pMYbRAaeXYD3pSbzsjIzgZx5G/9)
It’s time for Republicans in Congress to get it through their heads that we won an historic landslide election in November on the coattails of President Trump and his America First agenda, and that the Republican base, and the American people, expect swift action.
**Republicans need to get serious about:**
* Making the DOGE cuts permanent.
* Making it a felony to do sex change operations on children.
* Investigating and prosecuting those responsible for the Republic-ending lawfare waged against President Trump and his allies.
* Stopping the blank checks to Ukraine.
* Holding the COVID tyrants at the CDC accountable.
* Passing NO tax on tips, overtime, and social security.
* Reigning in the rogue federal judiciary.

If we don’t take bold action on these priorities, voters will justifiably lose faith in Congressional Republicans and they will punish us at the ballot box in the midterm elections.
**I’m sending a wake up call to Republicans in DC: **
**When MTG is upset, the base is upset.**
We have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to save our country and if we blow it we deserve to lose the next election.
That’s why I’m holding the establishment’s feet to the fire in the fight to codify President Trump’s agenda.
The powers in Washington are going to punish me for saying this but let me be clear: I don’t care. I don’t work for the Establishment, Special Interests, or the Corrupt Swamp. **I work for YOU.**
**_[That’s why I’m so proud to fund my political operation $10, $25, and $50 at a time from patriots across this country like you who are sick and tired of the status quo](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/6zZzSeA0D5jiQLp6qlG4o5aOsnHpMGpXwj8SjgX6o_F0n2k-BbMSP5tWPnsM9RPyG9uBhggY3SntHc4GD-gaK-N_PSXaAV_8fSq9h-G_zYQ1gRlKpf8OaVVl-yFqgk4TvpUP1GKSER3BBIqkOnqQclMcL7C5vnCwo7X8_BJU9cKBZM0vA2pGXzaPG074KTKqVIV9cbMBQ7yhrFy6lBcdY-EUosVibbakTkRYb_WYvKQRol-TlWwlKjEPZOCoyBjFm3U3LugRRpy58Z_WajOYmEmqdVqFIfi_2O22QGBSYllSROWbU-ZEsy9u3_ooRe0BwOv6lbivmGbvRCJO_qZ7KEYUbP66c4c7yetXk36rC5y4oL07XrQVj39UW1pBTb6ILg61ZPM7MAElluS2u7UxiDS7ws4J-IW00qWdrpUIQ7LyvMqwT7R4M5w9x7f1C2yhQVhNwnnbTbamd8yrUvP9KqC6PmZBvrCLDOiWMgZGXVdl/ff_q8DkJoi3TjN5DrXNLr9qKPl_5VNei/9)_.**
I didn’t come to Congress to make friends, I had enough before I got here.
I came to Congress to deliver for the American people, to truly REPRESENT the interests of **_We The People_**.
**_[And that’s exactly what I’m doing](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/0H7Y8EP7x-5l7oEBY7xsFIrjwzr5WZT39kmPpPrFL3NTemyufHBZ2rXg55zNLjNQ3VIFtdInq8aUTtbtsRvCTN1aPmmg4bdo3m4Pa_fkEqV72yUe289nwNldJ3soKsrfHg6OhAd4TXwsIjzbeij0Ji3KOqpKEDj4TlVOuMr6DkrsgEpbW5NUqEmQF7xSOH9XhcDWbG3FPCuHeX98C45Vy9vIUuh_yJkCny6lKIzBc1r3BNKV-IeI5JG8nHECyHux_zuOYw--sP-VoGk076_HIgGxvSUvlpSciYqLeRuuXM3AKsh3WZogTpmEi-B2UVDmktyhR4OQosjjS6utM-HOmNJzwc23FzvMb8jcS88Pl9C7S0hFbZbhxlT2o2yXZhkfXbQrbRwAB1H_lXIhMyGsfIls6kojXWcuvuVKdOEyFpd5cEEIJqHRTkN3ewHbBno6fT6Xo8luk__PT5AxrxSbRW8jnsd8dyY3qudJj1HhgE7V/Kq-D0cGk7kceDt6jpbQAtON35Sm5VIsC/9)_.**
With urgency,
[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/Nvg0cNcPOfK09pe_0PitbORYIGJyIsgVcik4qD1MMH0OT9RoS3wtJT1V76y77R5KQhbi1pVi-fmwXK-iI0z1g-EMpsaXuYvH79EQTz6UYUPSvms2P2lSi6i_Ezwuf_SZjQ1sZTwu-bK9Ns4Ssjo2NwYG0S_l1Va4aMh3ustim3WPaDofAVP_aSyGUxg1d99_26pP2nd2nBdHjDpjTnmHPAZtyTwEx_YdFtmK8p0r0C2roHd52BmlnvGWgqlkZ0HLZpRLTmlM1as1RrAWNdAWDZGDP6sww-fpALGll-EdeB9vQOUW0NWRSc5TRLQCV2k4iX_D0vJrtIgGOaWPeOrkEdHRdMcIWc1bRFK12vbmUpEhnVbhvk9xD2TRiDMptdqxL--NxqDHjFVZzIhESuADM5FfVX2BnT66TZoiqfvA_W_p_M95R9nTkgGwv3OY1cyIhqhyThIFh-YyIrrs8BOMGUpnEa1i2Ix8AsttI0GUeglA/mKiv7Y-1k1X7b5SaAVtgMXcvQRmGaPzX/9)
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/Ww51sHeg5fvdiBoDlTiHYrr1JdcSJp3FMiR_SZxl-oEa9iFIqmvK059FvGRHsFZ19rIN4c50sS96o6-hCXsu-bpb0vChE2wNZqK5ldW1XvdORFmIs-67dDf1P_KOUqy0mONInnvoA_PPpgPi4CZdESMS-zEPu1d3c_7fqHNUiSaRWi2g70_-xey2qQkIcMt3kya7oQky0don2Sg0CRgtVMr6X8eze7NSwSrOFaaTmUpJh7xvqzsVX_gxZsWGaKN3smKHk5V8ybMAhV73rJik2IKpKqoK5v6Uqg1wdrltQl9UAqdZRg_fOn7XMRbcf_ITKZSAZ_7j7jgImdinqu4MADHQBNsfDgr32nLYnKsz706853SOGJg1r11f6kmLAchH5cE5x4mdL_UTz7ArxxhhYNUSfNXVNWFGL3nmtu8ebNlhhDCAdCePBIWwmxO4Ra-MmFt8vmsgP1EENgmoXz7vVtjH29bSOYBLCejQXOs-kPZ4/y8YpPZ9jfVCrJVXWXKNZXHra0oCp9Xdy/9)

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Following up on Peter’s Census
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
I’m sending a secure link so you can complete this right away.
| **_FROM THE DESK OF DONALD TRUMP JR._**
---
Peter,
---
The Fake News media has begun running headlines about how my father’s coalition is “fraying” because MAGA voters no longer support his agenda.
---
_I don’t believe that for a second..._
---
But it’s never been more important to make sure he still has the support of the American people as he works tirelessly to Make America Great Again.
---
**And during our most recent data pull, I noticed your 2025 Trump-Voter Census was still incomplete.**
---
_The responses to this vital survey help us determine where we should allocate valuable campaign resources for the midterms._
---
I can’t stress enough how important it is that you take just a moment to fill it out.
---
That is why, with the submission deadline rapidly approaching, I’m sending you a secure link containing your Census so you can complete it right away.
---

name: Derek Marshall, Local Democracy Project
subject: MAGA: to dismantle democracy we must attack education.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Local Democracy Project
body:
| | |
MAGA mastermind and convicted felon Steve Bannon astutely noted that the path to power runs through our school boards.
School boards are pivotal battlegrounds where the integrity of our education system—and, by extension, our democracy—hangs in the balance.
Bannon's assertion ignited a MAGA movement aimed at undermining public education through the recruitment and training of candidates aligned with their radical, destructive agenda. This strategy has gained traction within right-wing circles, posing a serious threat to our democratic values.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsCgbBF5rm9TF3OCm2PlAzc830mH0SaEU79yenHkofnNxmYVU0KaNelsGDLQBgZYnw_TLU4ud3LTKaTO7PuapHWBtSwDuHOU_1PJDmfavtIPlF2DWsCxH7jXWh3IHLaizEc_a4pw1ME_NDSqkG_gG75m138g1wT45KRYXIKqgLKMeLAV3nTXhsvF1GhUecVWXIHFeqRYKc7Q0iNzlRn2oamy6MzggQG1K_4BD3yOp3mIsoYxEXuLi4XiVhnZjxM2bM5Is_woA6rt-giMkRW3CbKbL2opx_LzepmIF3FZJ1awyiqwQdZQu1dhZMs_8zJrpHm8jqOIAcyvECwsJ_7DWAgUQfyqkLymfj76c5JOWKy_A/4gz/9ufNxwuYSu-_z2xrpxwBYA/h0/h001.fpo63-qa2M9zc1apdVf2oQDNKy5gtjZnQ8sU6rUoVz4)

clean_body: | | | MAGA mastermind and convicted felon Steve Bannon astutely noted that the path to power runs through our school boards. School boards are pivotal battlegrounds where the integrity of our education system—and, by extension, our democracy—hangs in the balance. Bannon's assertion ignited a MAGA movement aimed at undermining public education through the recruitment and training of candidates aligned with their radical, destructive agenda. This strategy has gained traction within right-wing circles, posing a serious threat to our democratic values. We are fighting back- funding local candidates, establishing networks, mapping local power structures, and creating campaigns designed to inspire and empower individuals LIKE YOU to run for local office. **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Local governance shapes our communities, influences our schools, and profoundly affects our lives. By empowering individuals to engage in these critical local elections, we can combat misinformation and extremism... and save democracy! However, we cannot do this alone. We are tirelessly organizing grassroots efforts, educating voters, and supporting candidates who prioritize public education and community well-being. Thank you for your support. —Local Democracy Project supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. We’re rebuilding democracy from the ground up. To donate by check, please mail to: Local Democracy Project PO Box 720800 Pinion Hills, CA 92372 Paid for by Local Democracy Project. name: Jena Griswold
subject: We’re building something strong- together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2506-q2-jg?refcode=250601-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2506-q2-jg?refcode=250601-email]
Friend,
I want to take a moment to say thank you.
Because of your support last month, we raised the resources we need to keep growing this campaign and to take our message across Colorado. Your dedication to this campaign means everything, and it shows the power of grassroots energy in this race.
I’m running for Attorney General to protect the Colorado way of life—to stand up to extremists, defend our freedoms, and fight for justice. And with your help, we’re building the campaign it will take to win.
If you aren’t already, make sure you are keeping up with our campaign on social media:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/ [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/] https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold [https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold] https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social]
Thank you for being with me. Let’s keep going.
– Jena Griswold
Jena Griswold is running for Attorney General because Colorado needs a strong, proven leader in this critical moment. She'll stand up to Donald Trump to protect our rights and freedoms. She’ll fight for working- and middle-class Coloradans, hold big corporations accountable, and safeguard our land, air, and water.

name: Katie Porter
subject: June is our most important month yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
I’m asking you personally.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39769%2E3422442%2El0XpaX)
Dear Derek,
Our finance report is due at the end of June. That means we’ll have to report for the first time how much we’ve raised since launching this campaign.
Here’s why that’s important. Everyone from other campaigns to outside groups will be looking to our fundraising numbers as a show of strength or weakness.
**Good numbers can help us gain momentum and signal to others that they should take our campaign seriously, while numbers that fall short will narrow our path forward.**
**[Derek, I’m asking you personally. Will you please chip in $5 today to help us kickstart our June fundraising?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250601_1_ak?refcode=em20250601-39769&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39769_3422442_l0XpaX&akid=39769%2E3422442%2El0XpaX)**

Thanks for being with me,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250601-39769&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39769_3422442_l0XpaX&akid=39769%2E3422442%2El0XpaX)**

body:

Peter,

**[BIG NEWS:](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=41dd038812384c47baf8d605d94e5868&_e=PrMC56tgPboLPNupRYyDWWY4rhTRWHn-dnmUJYyB25OgTIxpKvM08HYntpzdITRec1AO7215LO-5BX_jc177lTB1L66e3S9M2UypWotcXZ-77Sm-e7pBBovIJpPi0_rJB60ek4qkAcm8sluMeOiRmoG-SYwuQ7I4Ffj7baq7DPIEC5zpMwy1tt7yLQ6FLsaOnN6SFkvxUuX_Nc5URmi-9D0Sfl-pCKUkNYSCnB8DVBqj0R6Tsye3QoTok7y12egO1xRrfENhy9Flb4D4Vq-X9Hv4KBGWuBYNITm9QdYVDFImRhrgjVk2b_5vYR4PmHmGfD-tHfl6WxMJYdaaA_mnswX91GtzhovLsFNmhGzciGjOBF4dmsRVrUb-xG8DxsXSOV7oqwASc_RmcBPdLyQS1aG87WWTTYz_LOFG4MQG-2S0UlGvBjqpdLtiiFBoAgh4B-BkWyB_NcYk5yHxxMqhqIWPRerE72CFYRhgcBlZMaTGe4zHzNG_7cu3CO8npzWh) **Republicans now have an 8-POINT LEAD over Democrats for control of the House and Senate.

But here's the thing...

_... None of that matters unless EVERY Republican completes and verifies their Voter Profile for 2025._

_We can have the best polls and the highest enthusiasm, but without a complete and verified voter census from every state in the nation, we 'll lose to the Democrats._

name: Maud Maron
subject: I humbly ask for your help today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAUD FOR MANHATTAN
body:
The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape.| | |
---

---
| | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bfe221dc1d574e57b501b682e715df9e&_e=CR4HGQMYsC-OmRoOp3ib0iDYfxo-hnLdaO9w8JSq9zWsC0ayjXKWlijioiums1f7o3uE1ZjCDKC5HNjgbtd8IYeRyDqZ6_TjiCKQ2jDi9GuGpSowNTNNBdBjmiOk0kQA8112CkI_hnIE7JA7yKwgiXostDjnag_ZuISM_koMp-i0gu0o2e_NBYgVq8TGjrtEfVZVN3aE1_W178JOuCYdZpTRLWAi_QhiiEBb_2AGnp5S-E43ggAe9i87WuLCAQiKa3oecaCbcPz2ue-buC13udFVf-xTdUxYTjWQqnwbE_8G3_rNLcKVpWydG5CMmcTMMQBX_u67vvXVgPrFEw6SMv-LCmQ8f5oy-9cFNN3Qn5L9qyMctmd8CifEH_34ltQGazfnG7FMIWitHdabRlX4sg%3D%3D)
---
| | My Dear Friend, [**My name is Maud Maron, and I need your help to defeat Alvin Bragg and replace him as the District Attorney of Manhattan.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bfe221dc1d574e57b501b682e715df9e&_e=CR4HGQMYsC-OmRoOp3ib0iDYfxo-hnLdaO9w8JSq9zWsC0ayjXKWlijioiums1f7o3uE1ZjCDKC5HNjgbtd8IYeRyDqZ6_TjiCKQ2jDi9GuGpSowNTNNBdBjmiOk0kQA8112CkI_hnIE7JA7yKwgiXostDjnag_ZuISM_koMp-i0gu0o2e_NBYgVq8TGjrtEfVZVN3aE1_W178JOuCYdZpTRLWAi_QhiiEBb_2AGnp5S-E43ggAe9i87WuLCAQiK5pIZvqTu-9KFlDtEylOqgGFVB4XgBYMiBoRFWSPvn-tnPoyxWA-1QndSajBPZ2HbNImH1-NKkc0bzBC5PQo4uVrT8ODGH8elRZbUDeNvqCYnEuOcmi7i1Mh44l6c2g4Zcad29AkWEdVgSX8pbr0HZw%3D%3D) You know Alvin... The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape.If you think that sounds too dramatic, just look at a few examples of what Alvin Bragg’s “weak-on-crime,” Trump-obsessed tenure has brought to the law-abiding citizens of New York:
---
* An innocent woman set on fire by a Guatemalan Illegal Alien who had already been deported at least once before...
* A mob of Illegal criminals caught on video assaulting two New York City Law Enforcement officers outside a “Migrant Shelter,” all **released without bail by Alvin Bragg!**

---
Instead of working for the last 4 years to make the Citizens of New York safe and secure, Alvin has been on a singular, sick, twisted mission and one mission only -- TAKE DOWN DONALD TRUMP.That’s what he ran on...Those were his marching orders from George Soros and his Radical donors...And those are orders he dutifully followed -- at the expense of not only those of us who live in New York, but every single American that deserved to vote in a fair election not tainted by a ridiculous set of trumped-up charges made up out of thin air.New Yorkers deserve better...Americans deserve better.That’s why -- whether you live right here in Manhattan, a thousand miles away in Des Moines, Iowa, or anywhere else in our great country -- I hope you’ll help me defeat Alvin Bragg. **[Would you consider helping my campaign with a one-time $28 contribution today?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bfe221dc1d574e57b501b682e715df9e&_e=CR4HGQMYsC-OmRoOp3ib0iDYfxo-hnLdaO9w8JSq9zWsC0ayjXKWlijioiums1f7o3uE1ZjCDKC5HNjgbtd8IYeRyDqZ6_TjiCKQ2jDi9GuGpSowNTNNBdBjmiOk0kQA8112CkI_hnIE7JA7yKwgiXostDjnag_ZuISM_koMp-i0gu0o2e_NBYgVq8TGjrtEfVZVN3aE1_W178JOuCYdZpTRLWAi_QhiiEBb_2AGnp5S-E43ggAe9i87WuLCAQiK9GLgOgaTPRLT-D_TtlAyTe8aYhw1jGBpudevvE-_Fg0skUhJjQ-wsWHA-0W2LmPaVQHacvrGOSCuW5BHFxSLy3hF9ZUIt-OdWO8cGYEWZjQwH6iV8WgVYvGNBJfV1h_A1VdsqA_rhXaK1hv88V1ENg%3D%3D)** I could really use your help.Alvin Bragg has millions of dollars pouring into his campaign by the same Radicals who put him there the first time around...
---
* George Soros
* Hollywood Celebrities
* Elites right here in New York and Hollywood
* The deep pockets of the Democrat election machine

---
I don’t have any of that on my side -- but I hope I’ve got YOU on my side.To have any chance of beating the Democrat machine funding Alvin Bragg’s run for re-election, I need a nationwide army of Americans to rally by my side...A nationwide army of Americans who understand how toxic it is having a Radical like Alvin Bragg in charge of the criminal justice system of one of our largest cities...Who know how close Alvin Bragg came to knocking Donald Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election and what that would have done to our country... Who watched in disgust as Alvin Bragg conjured up a 34-count felony conviction against a man whose only real crime was trying to Make America Great Again!This is our chance to send a clear message not only to the people of New York -- but the nation -- that these Radicals put into place by George Soros to do his bidding are not invincible...That they CAN be defeated! Alvin Bragg is the perfect example of why I left the Democrat party.I think it all started when my 11-year-old got COVID... We were told to mask in the house and give my son meals in his room for 10 days. Instead, we cuddled up & watched TV together -- unmasked in the living room and ate our meals as a family at the dinner table. That was a watershed moment for me.What were we doing?When did the United States of America turn into a place where the Government told us how to live?When I dared to suggest that it may not be the best idea for biological boys to participate in girls’ sports, I was all but run out of town on a rail... Then I dared suggest that the complete failure of our school system might be due to something other than racism, I -- after a lifetime of considering myself a liberal Democrat -- was labeled a “Right Wing Extremist” by the New York Times!The blinders came off -- suddenly, I realized that if simply acknowledging the truth, calling out corruption and challenging the long-held beliefs of the Democrat machine disqualified me from being a Democrat.The truth will set you free -- and it’s an honor to represent you on the “Freedom Side” of the wall.I’ve been in their camp.As a former Democrat and as a mom raising four kids in Manhattan. I know how much they are getting wrong. And how bad it is for our children. **[That’s why I’m asking good folks like you to help me.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bfe221dc1d574e57b501b682e715df9e&_e=CR4HGQMYsC-OmRoOp3ib0iDYfxo-hnLdaO9w8JSq9zWsC0ayjXKWlijioiums1f7o3uE1ZjCDKC5HNjgbtd8IYeRyDqZ6_TjiCKQ2jDi9GuGpSowNTNNBdBjmiOk0kQA8112CkI_hnIE7JA7yKwgiXostDjnag_ZuISM_koMp-i0gu0o2e_NBYgVq8TGjrtEfVZVN3aE1_W178JOuCYdZpTRLWAi_QhiiEBb_2AGnp5S-E43ggAe9i87WuLCAQiKX6hfsSNrdFDmc2rLclmo9UonvltP3pS-RfpzljriZT13lJ3_EJaXhlkqeITr3SwkJy4cbHZvTsSSTlQDL9ySOHijbb3bcwdop4qw9P_82NJgZxnLbWqLzNyXs2HLnRWDwr1_cqAC0XsyPwecatJeDw%3D%3D)** It’s going to take all of us to take down Alvin Bragg -- but this has been a season of political miracles!I humbly ask for your help today. I hope you’ll find it in your heart to send a one-time $28 contribution to help me pull off one more political miracle......and send Alvin Bragg back to obscurity where he belongs.He’s bad for New York...He’s bad for America...And he needs to go.One last favor...I know not everybody is going to be able to give that I write to today. **[So if you think you could spare a larger gift -- of $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more, a few of those would really help right now.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bfe221dc1d574e57b501b682e715df9e&_e=CR4HGQMYsC-OmRoOp3ib0iDYfxo-hnLdaO9w8JSq9zWsC0ayjXKWlijioiums1f7o3uE1ZjCDKC5HNjgbtd8IYeRyDqZ6_TjiCKQ2jDi9GuGpSowNTNNBdBjmiOk0kQA8112CkI_hnIE7JA7yKwgiXostDjnag_ZuISM_koMp-i0gu0o2e_NBYgVq8TGjrtEfVZVN3aE1_W178JOuCYdZpTRLWAi_QhiiEBb_2AGnp5S-E43ggAe9i87WuLCAQiKKDbF8LKFGxRwAz56wdvqishLMiLgToo7BlB4nsO92nRtgHmBRBB9PpKVlnMvySsfjJHFB0XkQmH8LSiAxGO2_ITy1SMaQWOjimFtOrdWjUMYUzIs_EQwktMImQ7cmD2EFoHAMGR2A61c07_dx5nHfQ%3D%3D)** We need a good, strong launch -- and without a few of those larger gifts, we’ll already be behind.Please just send what you can, My Friend.Just reading my email today is a tremendous favor, and I really appreciate it.Thank you, Wish Me Luck, and God Bless You!
---
---
**Maud Maron**

P.S. I guess Alvin Bragg has just been too darn busy to concentrate on the wave of crime and violence washing over New York...While he has spent the last 4 years prosecuting and persecuting President Trump, New York has become a third-world hellscape!New York deserves better...Our Country deserves better...

Will you help me take the place of Alvin Bragg by supporting my campaign to become the District Attorney of Manhattan?**[If so, please rush a one-time gift of $28, $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more -- I could really use your help!](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bfe221dc1d574e57b501b682e715df9e&_e=CR4HGQMYsC-OmRoOp3ib0iDYfxo-hnLdaO9w8JSq9zWsC0ayjXKWlijioiums1f7o3uE1ZjCDKC5HNjgbtd8IYeRyDqZ6_TjiCKQ2jDi9GuGpSowNTNNBdBjmiOk0kQA8112CkI_hnIE7JA7yKwgiXostDjnag_ZuISM_koMp-i0gu0o2e_NBYgVq8TGjrtEfVZVN3aE1_W178JOuCYdZpTRLWAi_QhiiEBb_2AGnp5S-E43ggAe9i87WuLCAQiKyXAv9zP0MHZT1Tw8OsyAXGB87E8QIskXXh4Bg7-2gliILRiKTI6JniY50RSoECPZiPFyFTwc1M-f8Tkn3XYbrC-jHuTKDWNah-E7YnLpa6z6m6H_vkCpAiULhX0gpAYefhOF1lHC3EiDoEMP8PkyuA%3D%3D)**
---
|
---
| | PAID FOR BY MAUD FOR MANHATTAN
---
P.O. Box 274New York, NY 10013-0274
---
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=bfe221dc1d574e57b501b682e715df9e&_t=EL1wU5afFaX1-xilH8r9sEKAhKgxSL4mh6JXT1cq6vcvh6fd1tj1ZZ8xdWdE7-dqga3U1XbxEo1c2F9rAr6hY4EBz8IbmUJ2PQNXBeDHRCvvscbwrynkdRbE9WfvT6RR)

body:

| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[I need you to take AMAC Action’s PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM right now.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b0ae1385f04d4288999b15cffc6ad0db&_e=oQON2dtSLd9yALr0C7wgZ-RgD5kHbUpbpUWX0z44bkk9iDtINXle1UUjZtK_7LBgR0d-m3chXrTiava9r-LGoKZ96ipCHnxOhDDbozraiaOVkGCClMCR-MygGiyR4NSHApSsN9om-s43ZpZkCgFGSmVgMZZne7sUIJizlzbGvQjIAqOpYh6-DlP9aLh61TdS04Bo8hQ0wzdkqLFt4ShcMxaOUUBmc7UZG2kbxEIwp5v5IZkw5twolD7G1w0Jj-UGb_qHuzXnoAWkE_m87MmRR00VrIk4g1_LfIEh4xY7HSZBGo8lV4_Tdjnuj0WO-9gbe18iT1Vyvc58Mfci2yKwioDj8Z-KdhNtLe7QN09A5LE%3D)** Because “pro-trans” organizations are pushing the **false narrative** that the majority of Americans **_are backing the radical transgender movement and_** **_want to block President Trump’s executive orders._** This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights. The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.**But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children.** This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found **_“High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”..._**
---
_“Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)”_
---
Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations:
---
* “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”.
* “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.”
* 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care.

---
As a senior how do you feel about their findings? _Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker-rooms”?__**_Or_**_**...****Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults _WHO ARE_ right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls?** _Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?”_** __Or_ ..._****Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,_and be injured by,_ a biological male?** _Are you worried that_ 38% _of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_**__Or_ ..._****** **Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?****I know what side I stand on. I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children.** **And that’s why I need your immediate response:[Take your AMAC Action PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM _right now_ to stand with conservative seniors who want to protect America’s children _._](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b0ae1385f04d4288999b15cffc6ad0db&_e=oQON2dtSLd9yALr0C7wgZ-RgD5kHbUpbpUWX0z44bkk9iDtINXle1UUjZtK_7LBgR0d-m3chXrTiava9r-LGoKZ96ipCHnxOhDDbozraiaOVkGCClMCR-MygGiyR4NSHApSsN9om-s43ZpZkCgFGSmVgMZZne7sUIJizlzbGvQjIAqOpYh6-DlP9aLh61TdS04Bo8hQ0wzdkqLFt4ShcMzTXF_g509IUW45bVWqJe-edtX0wiAdKooGXKJwjXKEt7ZJZQECPlw2iMyV9nkGDDFtd-ar2SvVpIAXFNTDcQdXKtd0icbf_xUI7sG3S6j9uYitgPUy4tr6doRhnGw73rpnv9cTJVfWT_ks6gEm0dp0%3D)**
---
[ **TAKE THE SURVEY** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b0ae1385f04d4288999b15cffc6ad0db&_e=oQON2dtSLd9yALr0C7wgZ-RgD5kHbUpbpUWX0z44bkk9iDtINXle1UUjZtK_7LBgR0d-m3chXrTiava9r-LGoKZ96ipCHnxOhDDbozraiaOVkGCClMCR-MygGiyR4NSHApSsN9om-s43ZpZkCgFGSmVgMZZne7sUIJizlzbGvQjIAqOpYh6-DlP9aLh61TdS04Bo8hQ0wzdkqLFt4ShcM42hfbq8_CpXQOpBoKVDSbyT1XX9IaEYgWnyYXHTqm1wmqtS-cT9KPPweaK63Op5N9AI81rxqmJip_8mKi9nqnh3O39Hp74wOwwtBv5W9AplNaLqZ8xyVijWHnyLoyKEuQK1pt48Ca79R1hdGnG6Xr8%3D)
---
**My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. **** ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for. **With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates make our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** **[And today I’m asking you to stand with us to correct the narrative being pushed by radical organizations.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b0ae1385f04d4288999b15cffc6ad0db&_e=oQON2dtSLd9yALr0C7wgZ-RgD5kHbUpbpUWX0z44bkk9iDtINXle1UUjZtK_7LBgR0d-m3chXrTiava9r-LGoKZ96ipCHnxOhDDbozraiaOVkGCClMCR-MygGiyR4NSHApSsN9om-s43ZpZkCgFGSmVgMZZne7sUIJizlzbGvQjIAqOpYh6-DlP9aLh61TdS04Bo8hQ0wzdkqLFt4ShcM367TlQsLe2iKXYwsVj_DMQy4DXtg7qMZoCk9xX2KAf3p3RDNxrpA117gOruXD2U_ptMW0oEHkVnuo8R_egBSccXjHeM54u0sW_HKhUnqCOsWBdWUX-qopQJPzD-3rk3WzYp75ZNLsxwHekvAlxMjoY%3D)** At AMAC Action we know that patriotic Americans like you and I are horrified by stories of school administrators “socially-transitioning” children at school without so much as a phone call to their parents...We’re horrified by the laws being passed by states like Colorado that deem “misgendering” a form of child abuse... And we’re horrified by court rulings like those in California that have barred parents from joint custody because one parent does not want to allow a child to “transition.”It’s happening all around us—but AMAC Action is committed to fighting **_AGAINST_** the madness.But powerful left-wing organizations across the country are fighting **_FOR_** it...The terrifying reality is that **_the radical ACLU alone has over $200 million to spend each year_** fighting for “transgenderism” and other left-wing radicalism in the courts.And they aren’t just _pushing_ the Leftist transgender movement, they are aggressively _forcing_ it on us and our children. From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- **_transgender ideology is everywhere._** They want to make us believe WE are the radicals for wanting to protect kids.Enough is enough. ****AMAC Action is countering this radical misinformation from the Trans activists with PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM.**** While President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female... ...he needs all the help he can get to take on the radical judges and left-wing officials in states like California and Maine who are fighting every single one of his executive orders.During President Trump’s last term, the ACLU bragged about filing over 400 legal actions against the Trump administration.And I fear that this term their sabotage will be much worse. We need definitive proof that the American people are on his side on this critical, common-sense issue.**[I'm counting on you to take AMAC Action’s PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b0ae1385f04d4288999b15cffc6ad0db&_e=oQON2dtSLd9yALr0C7wgZ-RgD5kHbUpbpUWX0z44bkk9iDtINXle1UUjZtK_7LBgR0d-m3chXrTiava9r-LGoKZ96ipCHnxOhDDbozraiaOVkGCClMCR-MygGiyR4NSHApSsN9om-s43ZpZkCgFGSmVgMZZne7sUIJizlzbGvQjIAqOpYh6-DlP9aLh61TdS04Bo8hQ0wzdkqLFt4ShcM9qMMM27tcH1lZ3e8uKeJqRwNgzpSEerEdpAjr7uArQ2IpmuVGJokDV62FgkQxkUN_tkd7g1pjKDkA3h1GbAsqg7JJkuqbRWNP9ylze-xTswGKFNhzixQqiFXUJN0icKvH3A2mYIlH3A6ReSSjU47Do%3D)**

[ **TAKE THE SURVEY** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b0ae1385f04d4288999b15cffc6ad0db&_e=oQON2dtSLd9yALr0C7wgZ-RgD5kHbUpbpUWX0z44bkk9iDtINXle1UUjZtK_7LBgR0d-m3chXrTiava9r-LGoKZ96ipCHnxOhDDbozraiaOVkGCClMCR-MygGiyR4NSHApSsN9om-s43ZpZkCgFGSmVgMZZne7sUIJizlzbGvQjIAqOpYh6-DlP9aLh61TdS04Bo8hQ0wzdkqLFt4ShcM5L_RPhJzRYa4ndUuo1Yj63phUt-dc3K2n9pgtMx3AFGxY8jIifRe_8H6g-JddghlxiezRqf3oEk7l0dpRJzONWojYLzUQz8w93ZGBvw6Y6YbIaGBTAHMrP0XLOjxB6-or_ANDP27r-JMPtZHQ8Vp1M%3D)

Behind this ideology lies a massive, billion-dollar industry that’s pressuring parents into allowing life-altering surgeries for their children—surgeries that leave kids unable to have children of their own and turn them into lifelong medical patients.We will call this what it is—abuse.We will call them what they are–enablers of abuse and enablers of child mutilation.And we need to know that America’s seniors stand with us in this fight.**To secure parental rights, and protect children from radical transgender ideology,[we need your answers to the AMAC Action PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b0ae1385f04d4288999b15cffc6ad0db&_e=oQON2dtSLd9yALr0C7wgZ-RgD5kHbUpbpUWX0z44bkk9iDtINXle1UUjZtK_7LBgR0d-m3chXrTiava9r-LGoKZ96ipCHnxOhDDbozraiaOVkGCClMCR-MygGiyR4NSHApSsN9om-s43ZpZkCgFGSmVgMZZne7sUIJizlzbGvQjIAqOpYh6-DlP9aLh61TdS04Bo8hQ0wzdkqLFt4ShcMyynC5NaKFyIxTu2BdURdGzlt_qRE3QRCz476ttDfayhNblF47sFnN8proKyHmjZcUKnOxN904BCazIlI78HOPY0F313naZNwqCV1nvPo6eoxc2giQR6w20QrQnCN6jdW0nB7QkErHIke2r2LOf44Yc%3D)**Thank you in advance for your help.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**

This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found “High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”... “Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)” Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations: “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”. “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.” 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care. As a senior how do you feel about their findings? Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker-rooms”?_Or...**Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults WHO ARE right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls? Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?” Or ...Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,and be injured by, a biological male? Are you worried that 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_Or ...** Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?**I know what side I stand on. I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children. And that’s why I need your immediate response: My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for. With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates make our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. At AMAC Action we know that patriotic Americans like you and I are horrified by stories of school administrators “socially-transitioning” children at school without so much as a phone call to their parents...We’re horrified by the laws being passed by states like Colorado that deem “misgendering” a form of child abuse... And we’re horrified by court rulings like those in California that have barred parents from joint custody because one parent does not want to allow a child to “transition.”It’s happening all around us—but AMAC Action is committed to fighting AGAINST the madness.But powerful left-wing organizations across the country are fighting FOR it...The terrifying reality is that the radical ACLU alone has over $200 million to spend each year fighting for “transgenderism” and other left-wing radicalism in the courts.And they aren’t just pushing the Leftist transgender movement, they are aggressively forcing it on us and our children. From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- transgender ideology is everywhere. They want to make us believe WE are the radicals for wanting to protect kids.Enough is enough. **AMAC Action is countering this radical misinformation from the Trans activists with PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM. While President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female... ...he needs all the help he can get to take on the radical judges and left-wing officials in states like California and Maine who are fighting every single one of his executive orders.During President Trump’s last term, the ACLU bragged about filing over 400 legal actions against the Trump administration.And I fear that this term their sabotage will be much worse. We need definitive proof that the American people are on his side on this critical, common-sense issue. Behind this ideology lies a massive, billion-dollar industry that’s pressuring parents into allowing life-altering surgeries for their children—surgeries that leave kids unable to have children of their own and turn them into lifelong medical patients.We will call this what it is—abuse.We will call them what they are–enablers of abuse and enablers of child mutilation.And we need to know that America’s seniors stand with us in this fight.To secure parental rights, and protect children from radical transgender ideology, you in advance for your help. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman**AMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 |

We’re in the middle of a culture war — and for too long, conservatives haven’t fought back nearly hard enough. Every day we fail to engage, we lose more of our children — and more of our country — to the progressive agenda. Just look at what they’re pushing:
---
* **PBS Kids** aired a special called _“PRIDELAND,”_ promoting LGBTQ+ identity to toddlers.
* **Netflix for Kids** featured a non-binary bison explaining pronouns in _Ridley Jones._
* **PBS** livestreamed the “Transgender Day of Visibility” rally directly into American homes.

---
| | **BRAVE Books is the antidote.** We are fighting back against these woke, pro-transgender, anti-truth platforms by creating faith-based, patriotic content that promotes childhood innocence, Christian values, and American liberty. But unlike Disney or PBS, we don’t receive taxpayer dollars or billion-dollar subsidies. We rely on freedom-loving Americans like you. **[That’s why I’m asking you to make a $35 contribution to BRAVE Books today.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8uOmzAYhZ_G7Izs3zdYsIACUVW1ldJRpK6Qg83EUxyIuSlvX4GibLw4_o6PP-3H3nXPDKkCAdycmRAAYjkCePzdfFi-_I8TfsjN4of85cV-C99e6Apv-N5qkxcLX7--s6lIVDtet2qlb3x-jvYNv0Zj67Xr91SVkclYZwiPbEYVT1TKqBLRLeNtqq1WllGVEGGugiibMEmYUNLKVEcuAwKCSEKpEFRAbACkASq7lBAjjEKcHDux9ja4VtNp3nQIw-DjdvBRn93meZyOj9UI6sm2S7CxvlszzDuBoL4GvVp8HYZ_E4K6SwQnWmrcUZ1gnvAOa5NIzCW3HadAmVT7W6xeZt9MwxJai1hZlCd8ri4I5B57a9ziESurn6-k1X7U7vOOWHkYCUaaojw1xTm_VE1d_M7rj-ZcXZo_H_kZ78erONvgj5JIRbMFFoXMjJvrezfJ3f7zsN9d1wz-BwAA__9BYJM2)** Under the Biden administration, Disney+ received funding through USAID. PBS continues to receive federal funding while pumping out content designed to reshape your family’s values. That’s why we are leading the charge to fight back with:
---
* **See You at the Library Day** – countering Drag Queen Story Hour with prayer, pledges, and patriotic book readings.
* **_Iggy and Mr. Kirk_** – a wholesome new series teaching biblical values and American freedoms.
* **BRAVE+** – our own streaming platform offering God-honoring, family-friendly shows like _Liberty’s Kids_ and BRAVE Books exclusives.

---
We’re doing everything we can to push back against the Left’s billion-dollar propaganda machine — **but we need you in this fight**. [**Will you chip in $35, $50, $250, or more to help us fight back and take ground for truth?**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8uOmzAYhZ_G7Izs3zdYsIACUVW1ldJRpK6Qg83EUxyIuSlvX4GibLw4_o6PP-3H3nXPDKkCAdycmRAAYjkCePzdfFi-_I8TfsjN4of85cV-C99e6Apv-N5qkxcLX7--s6lIVDtet2qlb3x-jvYNv0Zj67Xr91SVkclYZwiPbEYVT1TKqBLRLeNtqq1WllGVEGGugiibMEmYUNLKVEcuAwKCSEKpEFRAbACkASq7lBAjjEKcHDux9ja4VtNp3nQIw-DjdvBRn93meZyOj9UI6sm2S7CxvlszzDuBoL4GvVp8HYZ_E4K6SwQnWmrcUZ1gnvAOa5NIzCW3HadAmVT7W6xeZt9MwxJai1hZlCd8ri4I5B57a9ziESurn6-k1X7U7vOOWHkYCUaaojw1xTm_VE1d_M7rj-ZcXZo_H_kZ78erONvgj5JIRbMFFoXMjJvrezfJ3f7zsN9d1wz-BwAA__9BYJM2) This is going to be a long battle — **Disney, Netflix, PBS, HBO, Amazon, Apple...** they all want to shape the next generation in their image. But with your help, BRAVE Books can be the alternative parents are desperately searching for.

Thank you for standing with us,

name: Chris Murphy
subject: Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I am not taking a day off in our efforts to fight back against Trump and the gun lobby.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250601-1-no&t=1&akid=10511%2E3935704%2EF4XuD2)
---
Friends, it’s Senator Chris Murphy.
I was proud to help lead the fight in 2022 for the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act -- the most important national gun law in decades. **But it was your efforts as part of this grassroots movement alongside GIFFORDS that got this bill across the line and signed into law.**
I saw this firsthand. Republicans were forced to realize that our movement was -- and remains -- more powerful than the gun lobby.
We just marked the third anniversary of the horrific tragedy in Uvalde. During those 30 days between the shooting and the passage of the law, our movement owned the media space, shaped the debate in Washington, and dominated the phone lines.
YOU made this happen -- and that is how we passed a law that has already saved countless lives.
**Today, we must apply these same lessons to our fight to stop the Trump administration from rolling back our hard-fought progress.**
In President Trump’s first months in office, he’s shown he cares more about the corporate gun industry’s profits than our communities’ safety.
He disbanded the White House Office of Gun Violence Prevention. He ordered a review of the gun safety measures we fought for and won during the Biden-Harris administration — including overwhelmingly popular actions that expanded background checks. And every day, his administration is pulling every lever they can to enrich their gun industry allies.
Our job is to flood the zone just like they’re doing — to be there every single day to rebut their lies, correct the record, and remind Americans why the daily epidemic of gun violence is happening.
**And we must put the White House and the gun lobby on the defensive about why they want more families to experience the trauma of gun violence firsthand.**
We have to be in this fight every single day. A day off is a day we’re losing. I am not taking a day off in our efforts to fight back against Trump and the gun lobby, and I hope you won’t either. Because GIFFORDS needs you now more than ever.
[**If you can, please make a contribution to support GIFFORDS PAC’s efforts to fight for a world free from gun violence. Whatever you can spare will help them hold the gun industry accountable.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250601-1-no&t=2&akid=10511%2E3935704%2EF4XuD2)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-may25.u1Lybj&amount=3&refcode=em250601-1-no&t=21&akid=10511%2E3935704%2EF4XuD2)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-may25.yeliDC&refcode=em250601-1-no&t=22&akid=10511%2E3935704%2EF4XuD2)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-may25.6Aau9J&refcode=em250601-1-no&t=23&akid=10511%2E3935704%2EF4XuD2)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-may25.hX5Ig4&refcode=em250601-1-no&t=24&akid=10511%2E3935704%2EF4XuD2)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-may25.pzzzTg&refcode=em250601-1-no&t=25&akid=10511%2E3935704%2EF4XuD2)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-may25.u1Lybj&refcode=em250601-1-no&t=26&akid=10511%2E3935704%2EF4XuD2)**
---
****
The reality is this: While the Trump administration wants to roll back gun safety laws and re-open loopholes, they haven’t acted as quickly and aggressively as they have on other issues because they recognize that our movement is strong.
The minute they perceive us to be weak or think that we’re asleep at the wheel is the minute they will pounce.
Let’s not give them that chance.
Instead, let’s spend every day reminding them that we’re here and stronger than ever. Our power does not come from Washington. It comes from you and the millions of people like you who are in this fight.
We have the American people on our side. And as long as we show the strength we have -- and our willingness to use it -- we’ll have the upper hand.
**GIFFORDS is made for this moment with a plan to take on the Trump Administration and build bipartisan support for commonsense measures to reduce gun violence.**
[**Please donate to GIFFORDS PAC today. This is a critical moment. Take it from someone who sees your impact on the floor of the United States Senate — your activism and generosity make all the difference in the world.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250601-1-no&t=27&akid=10511%2E3935704%2EF4XuD2)

---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-may25.yeliDC&refcode=em250601-1-no&t=47&akid=10511%2E3935704%2EF4XuD2)**
