clean_body: I am not taking a day off in our efforts to fight back against Trump and the gun lobby. Friends, it’s Senator Chris Murphy. I was proud to help lead the fight in 2022 for the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act -- the most important national gun law in decades. But it was your efforts as part of this grassroots movement alongside GIFFORDS that got this bill across the line and signed into law. I saw this firsthand. Republicans were forced to realize that our movement was -- and remains -- more powerful than the gun lobby. We just marked the third anniversary of the horrific tragedy in Uvalde. During those 30 days between the shooting and the passage of the law, our movement owned the media space, shaped the debate in Washington, and dominated the phone lines. YOU made this happen -- and that is how we passed a law that has already saved countless lives. Today, we must apply these same lessons to our fight to stop the Trump administration from rolling back our hard-fought progress. In President Trump’s first months in office, he’s shown he cares more about the corporate gun industry’s profits than our communities’ safety. He disbanded the White House Office of Gun Violence Prevention. He ordered a review of the gun safety measures we fought for and won during the Biden-Harris administration — including overwhelmingly popular actions that expanded background checks. And every day, his administration is pulling every lever they can to enrich their gun industry allies. Our job is to flood the zone just like they’re doing — to be there every single day to rebut their lies, correct the record, and remind Americans why the daily epidemic of gun violence is happening. And we must put the White House and the gun lobby on the defensive about why they want more families to experience the trauma of gun violence firsthand. We have to be in this fight every single day. A day off is a day we’re losing. I am not taking a day off in our efforts to fight back against Trump and the gun lobby, and I hope you won’t either. Because GIFFORDS needs you now more than ever. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | The reality is this: While the Trump administration wants to roll back gun safety laws and re-open loopholes, they haven’t acted as quickly and aggressively as they have on other issues because they recognize that our movement is strong. The minute they perceive us to be weak or think that we’re asleep at the wheel is the minute they will pounce. Let’s not give them that chance. Instead, let’s spend every day reminding them that we’re here and stronger than ever. Our power does not come from Washington. It comes from you and the millions of people like you who are in this fight. We have the American people on our side. And as long as we show the strength we have -- and our willingness to use it -- we’ll have the upper hand. GIFFORDS is made for this moment with a plan to take on the Trump Administration and build bipartisan support for commonsense measures to reduce gun violence. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for all you do. I am so proud that we’re in this together. Every best wish, Chris Murphy United States Senator ** Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: JanePAC Newsletter
subject: 🙌 It’s here: Your very first edition of the JanePAC Monthly!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
You’re getting the inside scoop on Jane and the movement.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108791631/549023331/1328794144?refcode=ea.6cee283c-073f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.6cee283c-073f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjZWUyODNjLTA3M2YtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nlrrikrd3XQ4fvtK_AnR2uyhWwAlLTwkg6obEjn5a9g=&emci=4e2e2740-6f3d-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6cee283c-073f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)
---
Exciting news! You’re reading the very first edition of **_The JanePAC Monthly_** , and we’re so glad you’re here. We’re pulling back the curtain and giving you front-row access to the climate fight — straight from the team that's organizing and taking action with Jane Fonda. We’ll be landing in your inbox **the first Sunday of every month,** so keep your eyes peeled 👀 This is where you’ll find the stories you may have missed in the news. The victories we’re winning on the ground. The threats we’re fighting in Washington. And the people — like you — who make it all possible. Let’s dive in. 👇
* * *

**⚠️ DONALD TRUMP’S EPA CUTS HIT HOME**
In case you missed it: Trump’s EPA is moving to eliminate the Energy Star program — one of the most cost-saving, climate-friendly initiatives in modern history. Since the ’90s, it’s helped Americans save over half a trillion dollars in energy costs and cut billions of tons of emissions, all while guiding consumers toward smarter, more efficient appliances.
Now, that program is on the chopping block, and you can expect higher utility bills, dirtier air, and fewer tools to fight the climate crisis — just so fossil fuel donors and corporate polluters can keep cashing in.

**✊ HOW DEMOCRATS ARE FIGHTING BACK**
News broke this week that **sixteen Democratic-led states are suing the Trump administration over brutal cuts to scientific research.**
The lawsuit, filed by Attorneys General from New York, California, Colorado, and 13 other states, challenges Trump’s decision to slash more than **$200 million in National Science Foundation (NSF) research funding.** This is about who gets to shape the future of science in this country. Trump’s trying to erase progress. These states are drawing the line.

clean_body: You’re getting the inside scoop on Jane and the movement. | Exciting news! You’re reading the very first edition of The JanePAC Monthly , and we’re so glad you’re here. We’re pulling back the curtain and giving you front-row access to the climate fight — straight from the team that's organizing and taking action with Jane Fonda. We’ll be landing in your inbox the first Sunday of every month, so keep your eyes peeled 👀 This is where you’ll find the stories you may have missed in the news. The victories we’re winning on the ground. The threats we’re fighting in Washington. And the people — like you — who make it all possible. Let’s dive in. 👇 📰 JANE IN THE NEWS Last month, Jane received the prestigious Rachel Carson Award from the National Audubon Society — an honor reserved for women who have made extraordinary contributions to environmental leadership. Jane’s rallied thousands, faced down politicians, even been arrested for the planet (more than once!), and she’s just getting started. | 📚 REQUIRED READING Time Magazine covered Jane's travels to the Ecuadorian Amazon earlier this year, where she stood with Indigenous leaders resisting oil drilling on their ancestral lands. Her message is more urgent than ever: If we lose the Amazon to oil, we lose the future. This is a movement we all have to be a part of. ⚠️ DONALD TRUMP’S EPA CUTS HIT HOME In case you missed it: Trump’s EPA is moving to eliminate the Energy Star program — one of the most cost-saving, climate-friendly initiatives in modern history. Since the ’90s, it’s helped Americans save over half a trillion dollars in energy costs and cut billions of tons of emissions, all while guiding consumers toward smarter, more efficient appliances. Now, that program is on the chopping block, and you can expect higher utility bills, dirtier air, and fewer tools to fight the climate crisis — just so fossil fuel donors and corporate polluters can keep cashing in. 🏆 CELEBRATING A MAJOR JANEPAC VICTORY Austin Fölnagy just WON reelection to the Lane Community College Board with 65% of the vote! JanePAC was proud to endorse Austin — a true climate champion who lost his home in the 2020 Holiday Farm Fire, and has never stopped fighting for bold climate action. ✊ HOW DEMOCRATS ARE FIGHTING BACK News broke this week that sixteen Democratic-led states are suing the Trump administration over brutal cuts to scientific research. The lawsuit, filed by Attorneys General from New York, California, Colorado, and 13 other states, challenges Trump’s decision to slash more than $200 million in National Science Foundation (NSF) research funding. This is about who gets to shape the future of science in this country. Trump’s trying to erase progress. These states are drawing the line. That’s it for the first edition of The JanePAC Monthly. Thank you for showing up. If you want to stay plugged in between newsletters, follow us on social media for daily updates and more behind-the-scenes moments with Jane and the team: Together, we are building a movement they cannot ignore. And we’re just getting started. In solidarity, – Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: DOGE Alerts
subject: NPR & PBS
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj2051zqfkgwmtegpf2xrjsaudulktgmykmj7opye7h3ij6xyjj5cdtwu072kgj769lnsn8tqqizlyshlic5y&__stmp=sx6slx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sx6slx&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jei10cl0a0y03tdbyboa15w8zn74lgosko73igdu5k14jl1ag71g423os0o0lgl65y8ckel1emt2qadwcjc8m7efm53eok43s8usbtgn7ys8kqs4c9j0hp3s4xwafuqy31n05a9n5tdvpmepgsp8&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sx6slx&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sx6slx&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sx6slx&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sx6slx&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jei10cl0a0y03tdbyboa15w8ik9x7ymnc9qvy155omyle9dywqb0mxvgyvrcssq81vn2loqigknpcetrw2g3ig2vl1id9ir3olpnvlgjw2td9o5ne70zuobbfugymnk6rn0ok4in0vt8glhae4fw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sx6slx&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sx6slx&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
| | | As we celebrate the start of Pride Month, we’re remembering how MAGA Delegate Ian Lovejoy skipped two votes to support same-sex marriage.
He wasn’t absent.
He was sitting in the Virginia House of Delegates chamber on February 13, 2025, refusing to vote.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6He5A0VlVGWQZ6JyE4c0RSi4O6FGBgnMBCVvEGSeYx9DyINH_2RuzS-rhizKZeaWSU4rOfMcxxsEeehogsRy1tQEGFBWdYLyIVZGr2AnuLuY9eINr6jJRdQhyLhUF7OQBirrhK7H0NUAEgwqs34lpjchHr_348Zbk371sxZOcawcq1rigu-imTOjCQhGmGmC6AZytHKV93em4q_EJJ3T00nWkFdUsAPVGpfa5SfdYvBB/4gz/FL32fKhPS7aRAS-D_ebc7g/h0/h001.r_We8Gq9TzSgWll9QENIsj5ovmp0LjhIVfq1hJxDSD0)_Lovejoy speaking on the floor that day._

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Electing the next generation of leaders
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
These examples are proof that our work is important.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250601-1&t=1&akid=2206%2E587540%2EpTIfXM)
**Do you know what each of these leaders have in common, Peter?**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250601_1_youngleaders?refcode=em20250601-2206&amount=5&refcode2=2206_587540_pTIfXM&akid=2206%2E587540%2EpTIfXM)
These folks have more in common than just being great Americans. **Each of these bold leaders began their political careers by the time they were 35 years old.**
⭐ President Abraham Lincoln was elected to the Illinois legislature at just 25.
⭐ President John F. Kennedy was first elected to Congress in 1946 at age 29.
⭐ President Lyndon B. Johnson won his first congressional election at just 28.
⭐ President Barack Obama was only 35 when elected to the Illinois Senate.
⭐ Stacey Abrams was just 32 years old when she was first elected in Georgia.
**These examples are proof that the work we’re doing is important, Peter.** The future presidents and party leaders of tomorrow are getting their start today. And Leaders We Deserve is here to support the young candidates running for their state legislatures and Congress – because they’re our next generation of leaders.
**[If you’re in a position to do so, will you make a $5 contribution today to support our mission? We can only elect young progressives with your support.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250601_1_youngleaders?refcode=em20250601-2206&amount=5&refcode2=2206_587540_pTIfXM&akid=2206%2E587540%2EpTIfXM)**

Thank you for joining our fight for the future,
Leaders We Deserve

Recently, senate Democrats introduced a bill that would shift control of the U.S. Marshals Service from Trump's Justice Department to a new special board whose members include the Chief Justice of the United States and other members of the Judicial Conference, a committee made up of judges.
The move is being made out of fear that Trump could have the U.S. Marshals conduct mass arrests of the judges in their protection with a single order \- a fear only made possible because of Trump and MAGA's consistent attacks on our courts in this second rendition of his fascist regime.
---
| [](https://thmnyxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nLTGE05ZkjkxUXXmqYwRAFIUKDsO9tbtC47GyELDViQuRaiY9YUic5v3eioczdJkzAjroAEeC3kmjhQZYuMAOx4tnPI1M9RPCPd0mtNbhGWzi_N5uIhUpYoI2iBpeyOqy0Sg3BxEpf-2W_Xe_3ZcE1M_vmyMBjDnZLWvMxouhqkvv51HwACKPN34dXrxJ6S7LkdProGbpf5NSyMp-pSh8S1Se8W0hWpB&c=QIGEqFqd9XFIFLbIQwAdUv44JwER_1h628uN4Y-E4coMzGl-x5z0yw==&ch=lbHAOQEAmJ1tlnM9LqgzUld4aa4N7moYJ6L3sz-PrgC9NxTUdFKMyg==)
---
This shouldn't happen in America. Our founding fathers designed our federal government to have co-equal branches of government and checks & balances to prevent things like this from ever happening.
But under Trump, our constitution is being torn to shreds as he arrests political opponents & judges, defies court orders, and has made moves to strip the American people of their constitutionally protected rights of speech and assembly.
It should be no surprise then that Trump is taking his war on judges to the state where the constitution was drafted - Pennsylvania.
Right now, MAGA extremists and right-wing billionaires like Elon Musk are trying to take down the three Democratic justices on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court in their 2025 retention election. Their goal is to replace these judges with loyalists who will let Trump act as a dictator and ensure PA elections are no longer fair or competitive turning it deep red.
[Defend Our Courts is launching a counter attack in Trump's war. PA law limits the ability of state Supreme Court justices to campaign - so we are stepping up in their stead. Can you split a donation between Defend Our Courts & National Ground Game PAC to protect Pennsylvania's Supreme Court majority?](https://thmnyxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nLTGE05ZkjkxUXXmqYwRAFIUKDsO9tbtC47GyELDViQuRaiY9YUic5v3eioczdJkzAjroAEeC3kmjhQZYuMAOx4tnPI1M9RPCPd0mtNbhGWzi_N5uIhUpYoI2iBpeyOqy0Sg3BxEpf-2W_Xe_3ZcE1M_vmyMBjDnZLWvMxouhqkvv51HwACKPN34dXrxJ6S7LkdProGbpf7RNrUT0dm6l4itwqp1wr2Y&c=QIGEqFqd9XFIFLbIQwAdUv44JwER_1h628uN4Y-E4coMzGl-x5z0yw==&ch=lbHAOQEAmJ1tlnM9LqgzUld4aa4N7moYJ6L3sz-PrgC9NxTUdFKMyg==)

clean_body: The move is being made out of fear that Trump could order the U.S. Marshals to arrest the judges in their protection at any moment - a fear only made possible because of Trump and MAGA’s consistent at | | | | | == | Friend Trump's war on judges has caused senate Democrats to take an unprecedented action: | | == | Recently, senate Democrats introduced a bill that would shift control of the U.S. Marshals Service from Trump's Justice Department to a new special board whose members include the Chief Justice of the United States and other members of the Judicial Conference, a committee made up of judges. The move is being made out of fear that Trump could have the U.S. Marshals conduct mass arrests of the judges in their protection with a single order \- a fear only made possible because of Trump and MAGA's consistent attacks on our courts in this second rendition of his fascist regime. | == This shouldn't happen in America. Our founding fathers designed our federal government to have co-equal branches of government and checks & balances to prevent things like this from ever happening. But under Trump, our constitution is being torn to shreds as he arrests political opponents & judges, defies court orders, and has made moves to strip the American people of their constitutionally protected rights of speech and assembly. It should be no surprise then that Trump is taking his war on judges to the state where the constitution was drafted - Pennsylvania. Right now, MAGA extremists and right-wing billionaires like Elon Musk are trying to take down the three Democratic justices on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court in their 2025 retention election. Their goal is to replace these judges with loyalists who will let Trump act as a dictator and ensure PA elections are no longer fair or competitive turning it deep red. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | Thank you for your support, Defend Our Courts Fighting for Justice. name: General John King
subject: Shot & stabbed in the line of duty
disclaimer_text: Paid For By John King For Senate Inc
body:
During my career in law enforcement, I locked up drug dealers, arrested and deported criminals here illegally, and did everything I could to keep the community safe. |
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=51d00836fb70472795aea168bba634c2&_e=2_7nmJfKMB1lQk6GiiqJlf_yncL7Y8-Fr45IqOTzGqbPMVjbzrWbBib6JtUYU40apvRl4ph02HIeHTXz6FoxmlC1tiYG_NRKcZ7X-cing3hu40gBD0hK-9Plt2pw21Z_veUAyNohAtyHKoYMikipxBZDhsukdGhvkTBjlNCEnyfJnCotFTn5gUTK4u5U2B0qZbbSgXAutMpLLLl2LIJTLg0__b5154VrppJsRXWr9FrXi3CC4T8DZxyNOT6fOJO0VA_axYY5qRv1eMu0cLXdNptz4bY1XBCf4EuNQ-aubKTtVdftUYCXAWb0vmDxmcZKiG2nBBMMVieN2gTyQSsPECCddlaBlYb49G9q6s2A-JEYymL6sKD5fEdQqfi2g4lwoNNMjfh0FIfAWjmBroqSxA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative, four decades ago, I joined the Atlanta Police Department as a beat cop.

My first assignment was walking high crime foot patrol on Auburn Avenue. Eventually, I became chief of police in Doraville, a small community northeast of Atlanta. During my career in law enforcement, I locked up drug dealers, arrested and deported criminals here illegally, and did everything I could to keep the community safe.

**I have some scars to show for it: I was shot and stabbed in the line of duty.**

That didn’t break me; it strengthened my resolve. During my career as a law enforcement officer, I busted criminals, yes, but I also built bridges with diverse communities and saw neighbors helping neighbors.

**I know how important it is to support law enforcement and first responders.

Soft-on-crime policies and weak leadership make our communities less safe. In the Senate, I’ll always Back the Blue and work with President Trump to make our country safer and more secure.**

[**But I can’t do it without your support.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=51d00836fb70472795aea168bba634c2&_e=2_7nmJfKMB1lQk6GiiqJlf_yncL7Y8-Fr45IqOTzGqbPMVjbzrWbBib6JtUYU40apvRl4ph02HIeHTXz6FoxmlC1tiYG_NRKcZ7X-cing3hu40gBD0hK-9Plt2pw21Z_veUAyNohAtyHKoYMikipxBZDhsukdGhvkTBjlNCEnyfJnCotFTn5gUTK4u5U2B0qZbbSgXAutMpLLLl2LIJTLg0__b5154VrppJsRXWr9FrXi3CC4T8DZxyNOT6fOJO0lLkkaSK-CkbPKZ85c7fTohZVFQwAAO1X55vYEk3YqDX5by1awSGjPT-uv2RNiNlXdL5k_mqv8KwFd7C0IAwXQ6ZbhkIcWOXGeRFSTEmlXyvLwPAYv3VizEneK5Npu7LetO2cm62kmMwy3uJXd5WflA%3D%3D)

When it comes to supporting law enforcement, Jon Ossoff has been totally AWOL. He refuses to call out his own party’s insane anti-police policies, and he refused to speak up when __**"Cop City"**__ protesters threatened Atlanta’s police training center.

He must be defeated.

[**Whether it’s $10, $25, or $100, your donation will help me bring determination, resolve, and support for our law enforcement officers to the U.S. Senate.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=51d00836fb70472795aea168bba634c2&_e=2_7nmJfKMB1lQk6GiiqJlf_yncL7Y8-Fr45IqOTzGqbPMVjbzrWbBib6JtUYU40apvRl4ph02HIeHTXz6FoxmlC1tiYG_NRKcZ7X-cing3hu40gBD0hK-9Plt2pw21Z_veUAyNohAtyHKoYMikipxBZDhsukdGhvkTBjlNCEnyfJnCotFTn5gUTK4u5U2B0qZbbSgXAutMpLLLl2LIJTLg0__b5154VrppJsRXWr9FrXi3CC4T8DZxyNOT6fOJO00nMiFW_X6qQkvD7z5GPmgIr6pUU_kwVT9pFCGo4dx1ikPsNgS3q3EyY3Hu7AS8a8om75DMqpbwzN0iEWVS1sUrOSAGNoEFYOjGHmgRNOLkmToT8irS4MbDXvDuAtuAHHHrNtzTnpkefOQkfbpP79uw%3D%3D)

##### Key points:
1. This season is expected to be [more active than normal](https://substack.com/redirect/36afebd2-ff2d-4c14-aa61-d5c7cadb38d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: SIGN THE THANK YOU LETTER (VPP)
subject: Justice Sotomayor just issued a stark warning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You need to read this
| **Justice Sotomayor just issued a dire warning about where our country is headed:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90609?t=6&akid=20060%2E878179%2Ews_-l8) Sonia Sotomayor has been on the frontlines of the fight against Trump — from SLAMMING the immunity decision to standing up for reproductive rights!

[**As one of the few defenders of our democracy left on the Supreme Court, we’re sending Sotomayor a letter thanking her for her incredible work. ONLY 30 SPOTS LEFT: SIGN YOUR NAME NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90609?t=7&akid=20060%2E878179%2Ews_-l8) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90609?t=8&akid=20060%2E878179%2Ews_-l8)
---
TO: Justice Sonia Sotomayor
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Justice Sotomayor,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy against Donald Trump’s increasingly extremist agenda and unconstitutional power grab.**

Your scathing dissent against the MAGA Justices’ immunity decision was historic, and you haven’t backed down even a little bit since then.

**As Trump tries to seize more and more control from Congress and the courts, your resilience is needed now more than ever.**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting him off scot-free — so I’m doing everything in my power to elect Democrats and ensure we appoint more amazing Supreme Court Justices like YOU in the near future.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90609?t=9&akid=20060%2E878179%2Ews_-l8) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90610?t=10&akid=20060%2E878179%2Ews_-l8)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
—The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20060%2E878179%2Ews_-l8). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20060%2E878179%2Ews_-l8).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20060%2E878179%2Ews_-l8) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=20060%2E878179%2Ews_-l8). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20060%2E878179%2Ews_-l8)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=20060%2E878179%2Ews_-l8)

Friend, Trump's war on judges has caused Senate Democrats to take an unprecedented action:
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0iiCTskQAiHtepF4i-T0vEvvjtCt34DrrHAYjRLovkOb8i4jhKGhp6DAid-XgxzPN6dTumKbSGJNBXlf_bI3He1-DG9yx9io3OOt84HaRjhK3dIE63ZYWHmCkdVcwWeNXiDvSIDr8lqyjDgKJz8zD3DZjQlX1BKJ8zYj7MWl0F1glxYLOgFbbSVQdphACS2-DAUip3XenBGDCFCJPGXJjHL-pt2mMMbTszJ67X5iEQSU4mf-fIDHwODpCbzmUS--ShF7glef_zV3ZBNuMbJWy38RYOoAd8ofwwC4aZQTLjjihl5obwnt5ZkiAadzx8UGKUKsfJqIAMKzWmKSGvPZR/4gz/-gjPcnKZS0WOXRFsi5pb2A/h1/h001.TTAzW1LEx5VVoYsa6G5kg0QkulyrSF7hdzMZtwfzIR8)
---
Senate Democrats introduced a bill that would shift control of the U.S. Marshals Service from Trump's Justice Department to a new special board whose members include the Chief Justice of the United States and other members of the Judicial Conference, a committee made up of judges.**

The move is being made out of fear that Trump could have the U.S. Marshals conduct mass arrests of the judges in their protection with a single order** \- _a fear only made possible because of Trump and MAGA 's consistent attacks on our courts in this second rendition of his fascist regime._

---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0iiCTskQAiHtepF4i-T0vEvvjtCt34DrrHAYjRLovkBxn-dzWvvvj-Qo8pAHOfKUpMexhsvsdWztUjkeJpfNXrPxZamcovZ-cJ3GDWf2RqCHycV7RpAETlPPfROW368S6xeKw5MaAnBhFG9YWAMEs2qjGBcWzXc3U8w5SZaXLBKpNsshCShnFU0OVhtssp7XxLwzwLamUpSpHNKEl889nQUxbeIej53HB-fral6O2SDhbih3NrNCSo_PBf0gx_R7ztcUWdvQ4EfSPFA_wwe1K4_O1kakWl8DkWAJrK4Lc1IIH5NLKrWYne6CSx0VHs-rOqqmP8M2BAC6Q2nwnGud1/4gz/-gjPcnKZS0WOXRFsi5pb2A/h2/h001.IePWPDxo4FsChHEI3dBj4f2LwZcoyeWRjcjdfofa9Xk)
---
This shouldn't happen in America. Our Founding Fathers designed our federal government to have co-equal branches of government and checks & balances to prevent things like this from ever happening. **But under Trump, our Constitution is being torn to shreds as he arrests political opponents & judges, defies court orders, and has made moves to strip the American people of their constitutionally protected rights of speech and assembly.** It should be no surprise then that Trump is taking his war on judges to the state where the Constitution was drafted - _Pennsylvania_. Right now, MAGA extremists and right-wing billionaires like Elon Musk are trying to take down the three Democratic justices on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court in their 2025 retention election. **Their goal is to replace these judges with loyalists who will let Trump act as a dictator and ensure PA elections are no longer fair or competitive - turning it deep red.** **[Defend Our Courts is launching a counter attack in Trump's war. PA law limits the ability of state Supreme Court justices to campaign - so we are stepping up in their stead. Can you chip in whatever you can spare between No Dem Left Behind and Defend Our Courts to help us protect Pennsylvania's Supreme Court majority?](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0iiCTskQAiHtepF4i-T0vEvvjtCt34DrrHAYjRLovkI4Q83OhGHda66roxNwwKYA3Xu_gNciuZk9NBzR4Dj_HSDcY72dZ-rb9RPsOsN56lhAKUwVNCR77YoaZbLq4Pqv8Jv_YmJPXPSnL7bSfbgCQc9bQ2BlE5no8T3E5FEv5GSjP4OCAUNXHIydJLNq1ix6J_RuUAPS-YAakZ7Y7Fny-f1YsPqs9nJtDSwLfyvyWsTKe2pAaFTFozJ-5u_iVZOC2PBf7aEAyGXxkeXNqXRj7SmauLvvGddn3SxCI8q1KbdQ7QcK4d6vvmejTpJh0xODvXXy20Xknwi2hykk-QfZ8/4gz/-gjPcnKZS0WOXRFsi5pb2A/h3/h001.nYds-_l9Frvba_QhW1zgTwF0-6-Re_UgsQWVGvyF7gM)**

# [Documenting the Death of Our Republic](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=164946166&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY0OTQ2MTY2LCJpYXQiOjE3NDg4MDIyMzcsImV4cCI6MTc1MTM5NDIzNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.RsRQdipxEabqjsip18mTrg0jZI4Yyx0dKHrI-51vNFM)
### How Trumpism & Billionaires Are Degrading Our Democracy One Fascist Policy at a Time
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Jun 1
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

Marco Rubio has just announced that the Trump regime will deny visas to any foreign nationals who criticize the state Israel. Elon Musk's so-called "DOGE" policy cuts can now be tied to at least 300,000 deaths, and counting. The Supreme Court just criminalized 500,000 documented immigrants, because Trump asked them to. And MAGA Senator Joni Ernst mocked her constituents who shared their fear of dying due to the new GOP budget bill, then told them to accept Jesus.
It is imperative we recognize the right wing fascism consuming our government, and continue to work to counter its destructive impact. **Let 's Address This.**
**Support** _**Let 's Address This**_**as a paid subscriber and let 's continue to build this movement for justice together.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..I0VVAqU31UwYYzpTl0p68qjrCq-8rc10JJQb0cMSTyI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=164946166)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/32445262-4369-4404-9da9-0a6af82462c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Sect of State Rubio, who once wrote that he would break immigration law to protect his family. And billionaire Elon Musk, who was an undocumented immigrant but apparently that doesn't matter because he's white.
## People Have Rights, States Don't
Marco Rubio has announced that the Trump regime will deny visas to any foreign nationals who criticize Israel--claiming its to "combat antisemitism." I wonder when Rubio will demand accountability for Trump? Or has Rubio forgotten Trump's long and sordid history of antisemitism himself? This is the man who said there were "very fine people on both sides" after neo-Nazis marched through Charlottesville chanting, "Jews will not replace us." This is the man who dined with Holocaust deniers. This is the man who has repeatedly trafficked in antisemitic tropes and conspiracies. So for his regime to now claim the mantle of defending Jewish people against antisemitism is not just hypocritical, it is grotesque.
But there's an even deeper issue at hand here. Yes, hate against Jewish people for being Jewish is despicable and must be condemned with full force. Because people have rights. States, meanwhile, do not. Therefore, criticizing the State of Israel for injustices committed by the State of Israel is not antisemitism--it is an act of democratic accountability. It is what people committed to justice do. And, most importantly, it is what the First Amendment of the United States Constitution protects.
Marco Rubio is ripping up the Constitution in real-time to defend a foreign State that is committing genocide. Again, States do not have rights. People have rights. Human rights exist to protect people, not States--and especially not States that are committing genocide. The Trump regime is eviscerating free speech, and weaponizing immigration law to silence criticism of a foreign government, all under the absurd pretense of fighting antisemitism. This isn't democracy. This is dictatorship. This is fascism.
And as a human rights lawyer, I will not hesitate to call it exactly what it is.
Right, center, or left--if you value free speech, the Constitution, and a functioning Republic, you must reject this policy with every fiber of your being. Because if they can ban critics of Israel today, they can ban critics of the U.S. government tomorrow.
## Death and Devastation from DOGE
And speaking of criticizing the U.S. Government, remember when Elon Musk promised to "cut $2 trillion from the federal budget" by "running the government like a business?" As his "special" government job now concludes, he leaves behind a trail of carnage and devastation. According to new scholarship, Musk's approach to governance has already resulted in the deaths of 300,000 people--most of them children--by gutting U.S. humanitarian aid.
Brooke Nichols, an associate professor of global health at Boston University, estimates that Musk's budget cuts have already caused 300,000 deaths, and will likely cause significantly more by the end of the year. That is what Elon Musk's foray into politics has accomplished: mass death through manufactured austerity.
The fact remains that billionaires don't know how to govern. They know how to exploit. They know how to avoid taxes. They know how to consolidate power. And until we tax them out of existence, they will continue to use their wealth to kill the most vulnerable among us. Stop trusting billionaires. Start taxing them.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..I0VVAqU31UwYYzpTl0p68qjrCq-8rc10JJQb0cMSTyI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164946166)
## Criminalizing Immigrants to Advance White Supremacy
Then there's the Trump regime's latest victory at the Supreme Court: a ruling that just rendered 500,000 previously documented immigrants undocumented overnight.
Politico reports that the Trump regime can now cancel a Biden-era humanitarian program that allowed immigrants from Cuba, Haiti, Nicaragua, and Venezuela to live and work legally in the United States. And leading this charge is none other than Marco Rubio--the son of Cuban immigrants himself.
Rubio, who once said that if he had to break immigration laws to care for his family, he would, is now criminalizing immigrants who followed the law to the letter. They did things the "right way," and still they are being made criminals. This is cruelty for cruelty's sake. It's yet another reminder that whenever MAGA cultists claim they only oppose "illegal" immigration and not "legal" immigration, they are lying. Their opposition has never been about the law. It has always been about race. It has always been about upholding white supremacy. MAGA is not a political ideology--it is a white supremacist cult. And it is worth noting the hijacking of Christianity to make their cruel policies seem divinely sanctioned.
## Joni Ernst to Constituents: Stop Whining About Us Killing You
Iowa MAGA Senator Joni Ernst is a reminder of why we need separation of religion and state, and why we need term limits (Ernst is up for re-election in 2026 for those wondering). Rather than delve into her unhinged and cruel remarks to a constituent, here's my video rebuttal to her absurdities.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/472f6be1-c752-496d-a5aa-7766b9a05eb2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Conclusion
This is not just about policy disagreements. This is about the comprehensive degradation of our democracy, our Constitution, and our most basic shared values. From banning speech, to criminalizing humanitarian aid, to turning legal immigrants into undocumented targets, to cruelly mocking working people genuinely concerned about whether they can feed their children--we are watching Trumpism transform the United States into an authoritarian state before our eyes.
We can stop this. But we must call it what it is. And we must act. Please continue to support independent journalism. Share this post. Organize in your communities. Speak truth loudly and often.
We still have power. Let's use it before it's too late.

This is the man who said there were "very fine people on both sides" after neo-Nazis marched through Charlottesville chanting, "Jews will not replace us." This is the man who dined with Holocaust deniers. This is the man who has repeatedly trafficked in antisemitic tropes and conspiracies. So for his regime to now claim the mantle of defending Jewish people against antisemitism is not just hypocritical, it is grotesque. But there's an even deeper issue at hand here. Yes, hate against Jewish people for being Jewish is despicable and must be condemned with full force. Because people have rights. States, meanwhile, do not. Therefore, criticizing the State of Israel for injustices committed by the State of Israel is not antisemitism--it is an act of democratic accountability. It is what people committed to justice do. And, most importantly, it is what the First Amendment of the United States Constitution protects. Marco Rubio is ripping up the Constitution in real-time to defend a foreign State that is committing genocide. Again, States do not have rights. People have rights. Human rights exist to protect people, not States--and especially not States that are committing genocide. The Trump regime is eviscerating free speech, and weaponizing immigration law to silence criticism of a foreign government, all under the absurd pretense of fighting antisemitism. This isn't democracy. This is dictatorship. This is fascism. And as a human rights lawyer, I will not hesitate to call it exactly what it is. Right, center, or left--if you value free speech, the Constitution, and a functioning Republic, you must reject this policy with every fiber of your being. Because if they can ban critics of Israel today, they can ban critics of the U.S. government tomorrow. Death and Devastation from DOGE And speaking of criticizing the U.S. Government, remember when Elon Musk promised to "cut $2 trillion from the federal budget" by "running the government like a business?" As his "special" government job now concludes, he leaves behind a trail of carnage and devastation. According to new scholarship, Musk's approach to governance has already resulted in the deaths of 300,000 people--most of them children--by gutting U.S. humanitarian aid. Brooke Nichols, an associate professor of global health at Boston University, estimates that Musk's budget cuts have already caused 300,000 deaths, and will likely cause significantly more by the end of the year. That is what Elon Musk's foray into politics has accomplished: mass death through manufactured austerity. The fact remains that billionaires don't know how to govern. They know how to exploit. They know how to avoid taxes. They know how to consolidate power. And until we tax them out of existence, they will continue to use their wealth to kill the most vulnerable among us. Stop trusting billionaires. Start taxing them. Criminalizing Immigrants to Advance White Supremacy Then there's the Trump regime's latest victory at the Supreme Court: a ruling that just rendered 500,000 previously documented immigrants undocumented overnight. Politico reports that the Trump regime can now cancel a Biden-era humanitarian program that allowed immigrants from Cuba, Haiti, Nicaragua, and Venezuela to live and work legally in the United States. And leading this charge is none other than Marco Rubio--the son of Cuban immigrants himself. Rubio, who once said that if he had to break immigration laws to care for his family, he would, is now criminalizing immigrants who followed the law to the letter. They did things the "right way," and still they are being made criminals. This is cruelty for cruelty's sake. It's yet another reminder that whenever MAGA cultists claim they only oppose "illegal" immigration and not "legal" immigration, they are lying. Their opposition has never been about the law. It has always been about race. It has always been about upholding white supremacy. MAGA is not a political ideology--it is a white supremacist cult. And it is worth noting the hijacking of Christianity to make their cruel policies seem divinely sanctioned. Joni Ernst to Constituents: Stop Whining About Us Killing You Iowa MAGA Senator Joni Ernst is a reminder of why we need separation of religion and state, and why we need term limits (Ernst is up for re-election in 2026 for those wondering). Rather than delve into her unhinged and cruel remarks to a constituent, here's my video rebuttal to her absurdities. Conclusion This is not just about policy disagreements. This is about the comprehensive degradation of our democracy, our Constitution, and our most basic shared values. From banning speech, to criminalizing humanitarian aid, to turning legal immigrants into undocumented targets, to cruelly mocking working people genuinely concerned about whether they can feed their children--we are watching Trumpism transform the United States into an authoritarian state before our eyes. We can stop this. But we must call it what it is. And we must act. Please continue to support independent journalism. Share this post. Organize in your communities. Speak truth loudly and often. We still have power. Let's use it before it's too late. Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is made possible by you --the thoughtful person reading this. Join us & subscribe ❤️ | | ---|---|--- Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement.** | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

Andrews House • 39 West Winter Street • Delaware, OH 43015**
You can register for the winning workshop here: [**REGISTRATION INVITATION LINK**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=30f3a7b44f&e=5c740fa3e2)

* **Member Registration $0.00 (not a member, consider become a member - its free!!! Join the Fight | Moms for Liberty )**

**Why Attend?**

**Grassroots leaders & members** – walk away knowing how you can more **effectively help your preferred candidates RUN and WIN** for your school boards with resources like our Campaign Kit!

**Candidates or Potential Candidates** – you’ll work through our **Campaign Kit** – our premier Primer & **Done-for-You** tool, **custom-created** for first-time, less-experienced, or previously unsuccessful school board candidates to successfully **RUN and WIN!**

If you have any **questions** , feel free to contact **Sarah Simon** at [**sarah@momsforliberty.com**](mailto:sarah@momsforliberty.com). Also, if you know a possible school board candidate or grassroot leader that could benefit from this training, please forward the invite.

# MARCELL STRBICH
FOR OHIO SECRETARY OF STATE
FIRST CAMPAIGN FILING DEADLINE:
**JUNE 30TH!**
---
|
**MARCELL STRBICH IS RUNNING FOR
OHIO SECRETARY OF STATE
AS A REPUBLICAN POLITICAL OUTSIDER!**
[**strbichforohio.com**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=bf8b0e0e8d&e=5c740fa3e2)
Many across Ohio already know: Marcell is the right person for this job. He’s a combat veteran, devoted family man, God-fearing patriot, and a proven election integrity advocate. Marcell has been instrumental in drafting nearly every meaningful election integrity bill proposed in Ohio—legislation that’s been deliberately ignored by two consecutive General Assemblies.

Until we see real campaign finance reform, grassroots Ohioans are going to need to dig deep, open their wallets, and be willing to make a personal financial commitment.

_**"In politics, money talks, and campaign filings are how that message gets delivered—loud and clear."**_

It’s important for political candidates to show strong fundraising success in their required government filings because, WHETHER WE LIKE IT OR NOT, money signals momentum, viability, and power—both to insiders and voters. Here’s why it matters:
* Big fundraising numbers make a candidate look like a serious contender. Media, party leaders, donors, and voters all use these filings to gauge who’s competitive and worth taking seriously. Strong fundraising hauls get picked up in headlines: “Candidate Raises $250K in First Quarter”. This creates free publicity and positions the campaign as rising or dominant.
* Party insiders, elected officials, and political organizations often withhold endorsements until they see who can raise money and win. High fundraising can trigger snowball support from power brokers who want to back a winner. Strong numbers can scare off challengers, who may not want to go up against a financially strong opponent.
* Grassroots supporters want to feel they’re backing a campaign that has momentum and a path to victory. Public fundraising reports serve as a psychological boost to volunteers and potential new donors.
* Fundraising equals field operations, advertising, legal support, and more. A candidate who’s raising well is seen as having the infrastructure to compete.

Fundraising filings are more than compliance—they’re performance scorecards. They influence media, endorsements, donor psychology, and even the ballot itself.

**Marcell's first deadline is June 30th.** Shortly after that, his filings are due and the public, including potential donors & the media, will gauge Marcell's financial competitiveness.

**BECAUSE OHIO ONLY REQUIRES A JUNE 30TH AND DECEMBER 31ST FILINGS THIS YEAR, MARCELL WILL NOT HAVE THE OPPORTUNITY TO SHOW FUNDRAISING MUSCLE TO THE PUBLIC UNTIL 2026!**

**THIS IS WHY IT'S IMPORTANT THAT IF YOU'RE GOING TO DONATE YOU DO IT NOW, AND DONATE AS MUCH AS YOU CAN!**

Here's how to donate:

**DONATE ONLINE:**
[**https://secure.anedot.com/strbichforohio/donate**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=a9f95a1e22&e=5c740fa3e2)

**DONATE BY CHECK:**
**Strbich for Ohio
PO Box 21174
Roanoke, VA 24018**

Please text 614-499-0599 if you need ACH or wire transfer information.

_**Maximum donation is $16,615.67.**_

**THANK YOU! **

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person

body:

|
---
**Jamie Raskin just gave you 2 options, Peter:** | **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108797168/549040879/784203583?refcode=DOTL_20250601_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZmMGMwMjc1LTE2M2YtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dLTYJ7x52UT_Ih_GKjSp2TRzXm7leWEwpFy_g8P4Jms=&emci=14d65752-793d-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ff0c0275-163f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=14887570)** | **[SIGN THE PETITION TO HOLD DONALD TRUMP ACCOUNTABLE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108797169/549040881/784203583?refcode=DOTL_20250601_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZmMGMwMjc1LTE2M2YtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dLTYJ7x52UT_Ih_GKjSp2TRzXm7leWEwpFy_g8P4Jms=&emci=14d65752-793d-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ff0c0275-163f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=14887570)**
---
**Option 1:** Stay silent while Donald Trump spreads lies, dodges justice, undermines democracy – leaving champions like Jamie Raskin to fight alone. [No Action Required]

**Option 2:** Stand with Jamie Raskin. Speak out, demand Donald Trump’s impeachment, and show that no one is above the law. **[[CLICK HERE TO SIGN THE PETITION AND CHOOSE OPTION 2>>] ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108797170/549040884/784203583?refcode=DOTL_20250601_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZmMGMwMjc1LTE2M2YtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dLTYJ7x52UT_Ih_GKjSp2TRzXm7leWEwpFy_g8P4Jms=&emci=14d65752-793d-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ff0c0275-163f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=14887570)**
**Jamie Raskin is leading the fight in Congress to ensure Trump’s crimes do not go unanswered, but he needs the strength of the people behind him.**

**[That’s why we’re launching an urgent petition calling for full accountability for Donald Trump, no expectations, no delays. We need 10,000 citizen signatures this week to show the country, and Congress, that Americans will not accept two sets of rules. If you’re with us, add your name now:](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108797171/549040886/784203583?refcode=DOTL_20250601_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZmMGMwMjc1LTE2M2YtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dLTYJ7x52UT_Ih_GKjSp2TRzXm7leWEwpFy_g8P4Jms=&emci=14d65752-793d-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ff0c0275-163f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=14887570)**
**[SIGN THE PETITION TO HOLD DONALD TRUMP ACCOUNTABLE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108797172/549040888/784203583?refcode=DOTL_20250601_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZmMGMwMjc1LTE2M2YtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dLTYJ7x52UT_Ih_GKjSp2TRzXm7leWEwpFy_g8P4Jms=&emci=14d65752-793d-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ff0c0275-163f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=14887570)**
---
Jamie Raskin has never backed down from the truth.

He led the impeachment efforts after January 6. He stood firm against lies, conspiracy, and corruption. And now, he’s calling on all of us to rise to the moment.

The stakes couldn’t be higher. If we let this pass, we let Trump escape accountability again, and we risk allowing lawlessness at the highest level of power.

**That’s why we’re asking you to stand with Jamie Raskin and add your name to our petition demanding Donald Trump’s impeachment.**
**[Sign to show you believe in justice. Sign to show you believe in the Constitution. Sign to show that no one – even the president – is above the law:](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108797173/549040890/784203583?refcode=DOTL_20250601_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZmMGMwMjc1LTE2M2YtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dLTYJ7x52UT_Ih_GKjSp2TRzXm7leWEwpFy_g8P4Jms=&emci=14d65752-793d-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ff0c0275-163f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=14887570)**

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Thank you, thank you, thank you, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I wanted to reach out to say how grateful I am for your support as we worked to reach our May fundraising goal.
Thank you, thank you, thank you, Peter!
I wanted to reach out to say how grateful I am for your support as we worked to reach our May fundraising goal. Thanks to supporters like you, we crushed our goal and raised the funds we needed to continue powering this movement.
**Since my first campaign for Congress, I haven’t taken a dime from corporate PACs, and I don’t seek out billionaires to use as ATMs._Everything_ we do is powered by grassroots supporters like you.**
With so much billionaire money behind Donald Trump and his MAGA movement, it’s not always easy to fight back — but together we’ve proven that when we come together, we can do what it takes to win.
Every dollar you donate helps us power our year-round organizing efforts so we can reach as many voters as possible across the country, and it’s critical that we stay at it every single day between now and the next election.
[**If you’d like to help us get a start on our June fundraising goal, please click here to pitch in $3 or any amount that works for you today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250601?refcode=em20250601-5108&amount=3&refcode2=5108_420207_9_mBYb&akid=5108%2E420207%2E9_mBYb)
And thank you again for everything you do to support this movement,
Pramila Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250601-5108-footer&t=1&refcode2=5108_420207_9_mBYb&akid=5108%2E420207%2E9_mBYb)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Paid for by Pramila for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=5108%2E420207%2E9_mBYb).
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111

| **Meet Jim:** Congressman Jim Baird is a decorated Vietnam War Veteran and the proud representative for Indiana's 4th Congressional District in our nation's capital. A lifelong resident of West Central Indiana, Jim grew up on his family's farm and had the values of faith, family, and hard work instilled in him at an early age. He is an unwavering defender of America's Constitutional liberties and has spent the vast majority of his life serving our country. After earning both his bachelor's and his master's at Purdue University, Jim was assigned to the 523rd Transportation Company at Cha Rang Valley in Vietnam. He fought in two of the deadliest battles of Operation Lam Son 719 and lost his left arm during a convoy ambush in March of 1971. In a true embodiment of American sacrifice and patriotism, Jim Baird has put his life on the line time and time again fighting communism abroad. His belief in the American Dream and our American way of life go far beyond words. For the entirety of his life, Jim has fought the good fight for our country both physically and spiritually. And he wears his love for the world's greatest country on his sleeve each and every day that he shows up for work in Washington, D.C. Previously, Jim Baird spent eight years in the Indiana House of Representatives serving District 44 from 2010 to 2018. Prior to that, he was Putnam County Commissioner from 2006 to 2010. A fiscal conservative and America First Republican, Jim is incredibly proud to fight every day in DC to advance the best interests of Indiana's families through Congress. A loving husband to his wife Danise, a devoted father to his children, and the world's best pop-pop to his grandkids, Jim spends most of his free time in the company of his loved ones or tending to the family farm.

| **A personal message from Rep. Jim Baird:** Peter, serving as your Representative in Indiana's 4th Congressional District has been the honor of my life. For nearly all the time I've been on this Earth, all I've wanted to do is serve the country that has given everything to me. So when it comes to my service in Washington, it's the people's best interests that dictate every single decision I make on Capitol Hill. I can't thank you enough for your continued support in the good fight to restore glory to the world's greatest country in 2025 and beyond. clean_body: |MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | | | | |ARCHIVE| | | | | | | | Peter, | D.O.G.E. leader Elon Musk is stepping away from the department at the end of May. But there 's one major objective Elon is looking to deliver on before he leaves D.O.G.E. | | | | With over saved since the department's founding this past January, Elon Musk has cemented himself in history as a true American patriot. Voters have been clamoring for an OVERHAUL of reforms in our nation's capital for decades now. And finally, the American people are getting exactly what they voted for. | | | Thank you for supporting the D.O.G.E. mission. For America, Team Baird | | | | | Meet Jim: Congressman Jim Baird is a decorated Vietnam War Veteran and the proud representative for Indiana's 4th Congressional District in our nation's capital. A lifelong resident of West Central Indiana, Jim grew up on his family's farm and had the values of faith, family, and hard work instilled in him at an early age. He is an unwavering defender of America's Constitutional liberties and has spent the vast majority of his life serving our country. After earning both his bachelor's and his master's at Purdue University, Jim was assigned to the 523rd Transportation Company at Cha Rang Valley in Vietnam. He fought in two of the deadliest battles of Operation Lam Son 719 and lost his left arm during a convoy ambush in March of 1971. In a true embodiment of American sacrifice and patriotism, Jim Baird has put his life on the line time and time again fighting communism abroad. His belief in the American Dream and our American way of life go far beyond words. For the entirety of his life, Jim has fought the good fight for our country both physically and spiritually. And he wears his love for the world's greatest country on his sleeve each and every day that he shows up for work in Washington, D.C. Previously, Jim Baird spent eight years in the Indiana House of Representatives serving District 44 from 2010 to 2018. Prior to that, he was Putnam County Commissioner from 2006 to 2010. A fiscal conservative and America First Republican, Jim is incredibly proud to fight every day in DC to advance the best interests of Indiana's families through Congress. A loving husband to his wife Danise, a devoted father to his children, and the world's best pop-pop to his grandkids, Jim spends most of his free time in the company of his loved ones or tending to the family farm. | | | A personal message from Rep. Jim Baird: Peter, serving as your Representative in Indiana's 4th Congressional District has been the honor of my life. For nearly all the time I've been on this Earth, all I've wanted to do is serve the country that has given everything to me. So when it comes to my service in Washington, it's the people's best interests that dictate every single decision I make on Capitol Hill. I can't thank you enough for your continued support in the good fight to restore glory to the world's greatest country in 2025 and beyond. | | | If you're NOT in a position to donate, please refrain from doing so. I would never want you to cause financial strain for yourself or your family. There are a multitude of other ways you can contribute to the fight for IN-04 and the American people. Please click the link below and sign up to VOLUNTEER for Team Baird today! | | | OUR STORE IS OPEN! We have great deals running all year long on official Team Baird merch. Shop today and don't apologize for being loud and proud in your love for our great country! | | | | | | If you would like to donate by mail, please write the check out to: Committee to Elect Jim Baird PO Box 203, Greencastle, IN 46135 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C). All rights reserved. | |

name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: I'm a pediatrician. I'm scared. And I'm running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
I need your help to defeat Lindsey Graham and protect our kids.
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T44c409be-a769-4eac-8524-3c22bfdaf489/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta7eaaf8b-f501-453d-adcb-2551c56307e0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [I'm a pediatrician. I’m pissed. I’m scared. And I need your help to defeat Lindsey Graham in the U.S. Senate >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T58a9b023-b7ba-46dd-afcb-0f5f299b8a31/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’m not the “monsters-under-the-bed” kind of scared. I’m the “I’ve watched children suffer from preventable illness and injury while politicians do absolutely nothing” kind of scared. I’ve treated kids who’ve been shot. Kids whose families struggle to afford their medications. Kids who live with mold that causes asthma attacks, miss school for climate disasters, and watch politicians use them as political pawns. And now? Trump is causing chaos and Lindsey Graham is right by his side. And Medicaid — the program that keeps half our pediatric patients insured, healthy, and...alive — is on the chopping block to pay for tax breaks for billionaires. So yeah, I never planned to run for Senate. But I’m scared. I’m pissed. I’m motivated. And I’m 100% in. [I’m running for Senate in South Carolina to defeat Lindsey Graham and to fight for the kids no one in D.C. seems to be thinking about. So I need you with me on day one. We need to hit 10,000 donations before midnight to prove that this campaign can go the distance. Can I count on you?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T76ead84f-db4c-4460-a433-3360891263b5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE NOW →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2dbb405e-5a03-40d7-a0c9-d563becdc516/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I’m running because the Republican Party, led by people like Lindsey Graham, is dismantling the very systems that keep our kids safe here in South Carolina. I’m running because the issues I care about — children’s healthcare, vaccines, gun violence, public education, Social Security, Medicaid and Medicare — are under direct attack right now. And I’m running because I consider it my professional duty as a pediatrician — to give children a strong voice at the national level. Too many are comfortable on the sidelines. That won’t work for me. We need bold leaders who aren’t afraid to fight. I’m ready. Even though the path will be hard, I know Lindsey Graham must be held accountable. He certainly doesn’t deserve a free pass back to D.C. for six more years. [That’s why I’m running for US Senate. To defeat Trump’s lapdog and fight for everyday Americans. But, I need your support today. Can you rush a split donation of $10 (or whatever you can spare) between Blue Amp Action and me to become a Founding Donor to my campaign? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T661a9169-ecdf-4b76-b91b-36884ba74564/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10 →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T368807a1-e97c-43a7-88d7-ca43c8e5af11/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $25 →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T82279f5a-f05f-4cf5-b8a3-e7bc53e2c376/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE MORE →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf86a2909-c1b7-471d-b8bf-d184e70c1e11/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| Thank you for believing in this campaign, Dr. Annie Andrews

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T974c42a0-3775-4863-bd98-9cd818089af9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
