###### **Elon Musk sports a bruise over his right eye.**
`Independent Media For $1.32/Week!`
_**We 're running a special! *Full Access* to Blue Amp for only $1.32 per week!**_
_**Please support our work covering stories monopoly media ignores. And amplifying indy media to create a viable, powerful, media ecosystem independent of corporate interests!**_
_**Amplify Good. Support Indy Media!**_
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.bGHMRatW6b7t2eOzFesJjmYuq8Y6zdqKUUu_Pf9_6K0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164950751)
**by Brian Karem**
The big news out of the Donald Trump/Elon Musk "Press Conference" in the Oval Office on Friday had to do with Musk's five-year-old son.
Musk showed up with a black eye and explained he had encouraged his son to take a swing at him. I won't venture to guess why. But, according to a few D.C. wags, Musk's son did what millions, if not billions of people on the planet would like to do - he punched his dad in the face.
During most of his appearance with Trump in the Oval Office, Musk stood silently sporting a black cap, t-shirt and jacket. He looked like a second base Little League umpire who had a tough call to make. Trump who sat at the Resolute Desk in the Oval Office, presented him with a gold key and thanked him for his service to government.
It seemed like the press forgot about the part where Musk insulted Trump's "Big Beautiful Bill," saying he was "disappointed" because it would increase deficits. A member of the press could've asked about this, an important story. But, you would've had to locate a real journalist there to do it.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/60f4f07d-2d1f-4537-8ca0-3292dd6fa053?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The president referred to the public appearance as a "Press Conference". But it wasn't. It was a press pool availability event featuring around two dozen reporters and technicians, handpicked by the administration to attend the gathering in the Oval Office. The _open_ Press corps rarely has access to Trump, and to be a press conference you have to have people asking you far more important questions than what kind of marital advice would you give the President of France?
At one point I thought Trump and Musk were taking subtle swipes at each other. Trump highlighted the fact that Musk is an immigrant and Musk said the Oval Office "finally has the majesty it deserves thanks to the President." No. I'm sure he meant that as a compliment. After all, Trump would love to be called "Your Majesty."
They talked reverentially about the Oval Office and how honored Musk was to give his labor in a job that was "only supposed to last 134 days." I had him at 100 -105 days in the pool. My friend Mark had him at 130-135, so he's going to get a big bottle of coca cola to celebrate - along with a bag of Starburst and Tootsie rolls.
Musk bragged about how DOGE is on track to save "$200 billion" which is far less than the trillions of dollars in waste he claimed he would find. The sad part of this is that after spending 134 days at the White House, Musk, the richest man on earth, can only successfully claim that he's managed to take a baseball bat to government, displace workers and potentially make government databases more vulnerable to attack.
The amount of money he saved the government? Who knows if it is true (there are numerous analyses already showing it's going to COST us more than it saves)? But, if it is, to put it in perspective, Musk could donate $200 billion of his own wealth to the government and he'd still be the richest man on earth with $28 billion more in wealth than Mark Zuckerberg, the second richest person in the world.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e278b1f9-e6b3-4ee7-a654-27affb3f036b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hell, Musk, "who gave so much to the government," along with Zuckerberg and Jeff Bezos, the third richest person on the planet, could jointly donate more than $500 billion to the causes of hunger, education and healthcare in the United States and still have close to $500 billion among the three of them.
Both Trump and Musk fumbled through about a half hour of questions and answers. Trump in answering a question from Fox reporter Peter Doocy said he'd never use the autopen like former President Joe Biden did. He also said he would rely on "Your newspapers" to inform him if someone had issued an executive order without his knowledge. "I would be able to see it because the next day or sooner I'd be reading about something I knew nothing about," he said acknowledging the value of the press he often denigrates. I wonder if he would call it "Fake News" then?
After Trump spoke, Musk preached a little about the "banal evil of bureaucracy," and somehow managed to evoke visions of the Trump administration and Musk's own business practices as he said bureaucracies were ["largely of an uncaring nature,"](https://substack.com/redirect/3337c2ea-8202-4f0b-a7f9-04dc54ae991e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and that money "is worst spent when it isn't your money and it's spent on people you don't know."
`Independent Media For $1.32/Week!`
_**We 're running a special! *Full Access* to Blue Amp for only $1.32 per week!**_
_**Please support our work covering stories monopoly media ignores. And amplifying indy media to create a viable, powerful, media ecosystem independent of corporate interests!**_
_**Amplify Good. Support Indy Media!**_
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.bGHMRatW6b7t2eOzFesJjmYuq8Y6zdqKUUu_Pf9_6K0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=164950751)
Doocy got a laugh when he asked Trump if he had any marital advice for the President of France, following an incident with his wife that was caught on tape this week. Then Doocy followed it up with a question about a Democratic plan to avoid losing "every battleground state" by commissioning a $20 million study to see how to talk to the American people.
I had no idea the President was a member of the Democratic party and could speak to the nuance of that party's strategy, but apparently I alone missed that entry in Trump's expansive resume.
Trump spoke about money. "You shouldn't have to hire consultants to see what Americans need," he said. "I could tell you what they did wrong."
Then without prompting, he continued. "We won the popular vote. We won everything. . .They spend money to find out what they did wrong. I can tell you what they did wrong. I can tell you every one of their programs. Men playing in women's sports, I would say that's not a winner. When they say 'Transgender for Everybody,' I think that's not isn't a winner. When they say 'Open Borders so the entire world's populations of criminals can pour into our borders', that's not a winner. . . I gave them that for free, but I don't see them changing," the President said.
Let's dissect that shall we? Trump is right when he says you shouldn't need a consultant to tell you what people need, nor is he in error when he says that people don't like the things he describes. That covers most Democrats, Republicans and all the druids.
The problem is that it isn't an accurate representation of his opposing party's policy stance. They are Trump's shorthand _interpretation_ of those policies he uses to trigger his supporters, and the Democrats are absolutely horrible about cleaning up Trump's lies. The Democrats think that in their "knowledge and wisdom" they can talk _factually_ to someone who's been conned _emotionally_ to change their mind _logically_.
Asked about the Sean "Diddy" Combs trial and possibly pardoning him, Trump said Diddy "used to like me a lot" before veering off into stating that being the President of the United States is not a popularity contest. He also didn't know he had taken an oath to defend the United States Constitution, so give him a break. After all, he said he might give Diddy one.
Trump then used a question about tariffs to defend the destruction of both Habeas Corpus and Congress. He said we wouldn't have a country left "if we waited on Congress" to do its job and then said he must be "fast and nimble." Those are two words _no one,_ not even his greatest fans have ever used to describe Donald Trump.
He praised Elon Musk building "tunnels underground" as opposed to above ground I suppose before he was thankfully cut short with a question about his "One Big Beautiful Bill." He careened off topic into gibberish about numbers and terms we've heard in every stump speech. "A number nobody has heard of before," and "The largest we've ever had. No one has ever seen anything like this," before stumbling into other "amazing things," and ending with giving himself credit for all the great things on the planet while the rest is Joe Biden's fault.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6b7b246a-cdac-4090-afd5-bc2333b48cac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Of course he insulted Harvard before saying he wants people to go to trade schools "to fix motors and engines where people learn how to build rocket ships," while Musk nodded in the affirmative. I guess without the higher education, all of those motors and engines and rockets will be designed somewhere else.
Maybe he wants to make sure we all go to trade schools because he figures we can't handle college.
And then Doocy, kicking into gear, asked Trump whether in retrospect he wouldn't rather be a judge since everything he does ends in court? The way Doocy framed it, he didn't ask if Trump had done anything wrong to prompt the action, but gave Trump the impression he was being asked whether he thought the courts had a right to defy him. Trump proceeded to preach in defense of the very separation of powers in the constitution[ he's trying to nullify](https://substack.com/redirect/9f9e8908-1437-4ab5-8aaa-71df24785bd8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) - while blaming the Judiciary for doing it's job. The fact is, there would be fewer judgments needed if the administration were more competent. It isn't a judge's fault that Trump continues to defy the law. That's on Trump.
Trump stayed on the attack disparaging the "Liberal Bent" or "Radical left" agenda. He claimed the worst thing to ever happen to the country was allowing 21 million murderers, criminals and mental patients from foreign countries to roam freely through the United States and then said we would "lose our country very quickly," if he couldn't get rid of the "stone cold criminals" Biden had somehow allowed into the country. It isn't true, but Trump has been saying it so long he firmly believes it - or firmly believes it when he says it.
His lies are often pathetic. He claims that in four months he solved the energy problem and we "are now seeing $1.99 gasoline," he claimed. Well the average price of gas is actually $3.16 a gallon. The cheapest is in Mississippi where you can find gas at $2.66 a gallon. Nowhere near what Trump claimed. Maybe he's buying gasoline in Fantasyland.
If this was a press conference and not a propaganda broadcast, someone would have pushed back. No one did. No one challenged Trump on any of his lies though I know that many of the reporters in that room know what Trump says is a blatant lie.
Trump insulted former President Joe Biden, calling him a "vicious person." Trump claimed Biden, "hurt a lot of people, so I don't feel sorry for him," before also saying Biden is "not a smart person."
Musk then jumped in and offered his keen insight on the issues, with hands spread wide, fingertips touching as he adopted the attitude of a self-reverential professor/guru talking to an assembly of kindergartners. "The fundamental flaw of the left is empathy for the criminals not empathy for the victims." And then Musk began his Ted Talk, and claimed that judges who do not bow to Trump are "violating" the constitution.
He had clearly outstayed his welcome, but Musk can never read a room. Doocy, who had already had enough of Musk from an earlier encounter, just stared at him with a look that some said made them wonder if Doocy thought Musk's son had the right idea.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1ab4f479-f078-40c6-9a80-f24332b3ad6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Trump continued to veer off course, talking more about drug dealers and killers, saying "we can't keep them here for years before they go to trial," and "we have to get them out rapidly."
Not one person asked the natural follow up question about the destruction of habeas corpus and Trump offered no explanation. No one asked him where he got his numbers. He didn't say.
He closed his remarks about the automotive industry; "Build a car, make it in America."
So, what did America learn from the public appearance of Trump and Musk Friday? Trump has marital advice for Emmanuel Macron. He knows how to fix the Democratic party. He hasn't ruled out a pardon for Diddy. He's great. Biden sucks. Elon Musk is gone, but will still be around. Musk is no Constitutional scholar, though he didn't mind playing one on television.
Oh and Musk's five-year-old son apparently has a pretty good jab.

Peter, I want to be upfront with you — we came up short of our fundraising projection for May. And with everything happening in Washington right now, that’s a setback we can’t afford. Just days ago, Georgia Republicans in the House voted unanimously to pass a budget bill that does exactly what we feared: **it rewards the ultra-wealthy and leaves everyday Georgians behind**. Buddy Carter and his allies are doubling down on their agenda — slashing critical programs like **SNAP** , **Medicaid** , and the **Child Tax Credit** , all so they can keep padding the pockets of billionaires and corporate donors. Meanwhile, working families are being squeezed by higher prices, fewer resources, and a government that turns its back on them when they need it most. This isn’t just bad policy. It’s a deliberate choice. And Georgia Republicans keep choosing Donald Trump and his billionaire friends over the people who elected them. We’re heading into the final month of Q2, and this moment demands an urgent response. We need to prove that Georgia Democrats are strong, fired up, and ready to fight back. name: Deb Haaland
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
This is a marathon, not a sprint — and I’m so proud to be running it with you.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2330%2E400544%2EtOthT7)
We reached our May goal, and it’s because of this grassroots team. Thank you for being part of it! 🙌
I’m running this race to tackle New Mexico’s toughest challenges with real solutions. I’m ready to fight for our future with the fierce leadership this moment demands because our communities deserve nothing less.
But this governor’s race is _far_ from being over. It’s getting more crowded and competitive. We know Donald Trump and right-wing super PACs are watching New Mexico closely, and they’re ready to flood the field to flip this open seat red.
Our big end-of-quarter deadline is at the end of June — and what we raise will determine how much ground we can cover, how many voters we can reach, and how strong our momentum is heading into the summer.
**[Can you chip in $5 to our campaign to help me kick June off strong?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250601_1_ty?amount=5&refcode=em20250601-2330&refcode2=2330_400544_tOthT7&akid=2330%2E400544%2EtOthT7)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250601_1_ty?amount=5&refcode=em20250601-2330&refcode2=2330_400544_tOthT7&akid=2330%2E400544%2EtOthT7)**
This is a marathon, not a sprint — and I’m so proud to be running it with you.
Be fierce,
Deb 💛

_I don’t want to alarm you, but this is an update I hoped I wouldn’t have to send._ **Across the board, Senate Republicans are being outraised and outspent. ** **Democrats have mobilized their elite liberal base** to tear down our Senate Majority, all so they can reopen our borders, keep criminal illegals here, and ban things like gas cars. _They want to rip away your freedoms and silence your voice._ **I’m fighting to stop them, but if we keep getting outraised and outspent, odds are we’ll lose the Senate.** Without resources, we can’t cut through the media’s lies and liberal spin. _It’s just that simple, but if everyone reading this chips in, it could flip the entire script._ [**Can you rush support before 11:59 pm?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c45b20909c324037823ead1e2b4e678c&_e=jllfMqOXuyQDsy66miMaPTx-5iNScNvkgcOtSSRuAJmyUP3OWsPbtyNXFhcRg6ntnnBP_N1VLzXP4onNwE8rjrmS0nh0Pwmg-GAHWKIah4xrvQ9tVbEPn0JDxMNxfOrn4a01HmY_zGDJkDvVTnX9pJAzG4j4qtIC-RngPaNrU6SIjQtKhtyLsFSYP3KkHWsFttGzN6BZSe-jROyjOW4im_O8idAPah6wvJS8j0MbSaNnQkcPSDVOuSdVGHAOUy7c0fu0aEiZR-b4j-Qw3_w5dilpTsUe7S2qiln2xpAA-p-5LghoSzzuAGJwaJ2pNYX-qKP0rQxQm0NlH6PBqtvZKhV0TaEOVedrC_4uNvQ-cy2kyw_Re5psF-d45nJr5lKQdG-KRVKN87cFa4eRWzelQsOzN16JlcuUoqPJ089Ajt9IdzpPOtFhjTfLUMMnDsu2N4C4AsCSLmm_gynEM-OsvQ%3D%3D)

name: Mitch Kates
subject: standing up for LGBTQ+ people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Happy Pride Month, Peter!

Pride Month celebrations are underway across the country honoring the persistence, strength, and sacrifices of LGBTQ+ Americans throughout history in their continuing struggle for basic respect, dignity, and freedom from discrimination.

**This year, as LGBTQ+ rights, especially trans people, are under attack at every level of government, we must take a step back and remember how this celebration started: with a protest.**

We must remain committed to standing up for LGBTQ+ people, not just during Pride Month. Everyone deserves to live as their authentic selves, without fear of retaliation, hate, or discrimination.

Here at the PA Dems, we work every single day to elect Democrats up and down the ballot who will use their positions to stand with and for the LGBTQ+ community.

Thank you for standing with us,

Mitch

clean_body: | | Happy Pride Month, Peter! Pride Month celebrations are underway across the country honoring the persistence, strength, and sacrifices of LGBTQ+ Americans throughout history in their continuing struggle for basic respect, dignity, and freedom from discrimination. This year, as LGBTQ+ rights, especially trans people, are under attack at every level of government, we must take a step back and remember how this celebration started: with a protest. We must remain committed to standing up for LGBTQ+ people, not just during Pride Month. Everyone deserves to live as their authentic selves, without fear of retaliation, hate, or discrimination. Here at the PA Dems, we work every single day to elect Democrats up and down the ballot who will use their positions to stand with and for the LGBTQ+ community. Thank you for standing with us, Mitch = | Follow us on , , and **! Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party. Peter, **We are under a year away from the 2026 primary, and the fight for a fairer Indiana never stops.** We have been holding town hall events in the new year, going into Republican districts and showing up when their representatives won’t. That work is helping us identify target areas and recruit candidates for 2026 and beyond. All of our scheduled Town Halls are on **[Mobilize](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108799492/549048858/626575025?refcode=250601communities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzIyNzJiNC0yNzNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qerpHuyoxW3Duzqb6Qih7BnZzTKMELRHG2hhZIgkodM=&emci=d4c97922-253f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ac2272b4-273f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4925535)** , which is a great tool to use to see upcoming Democratic events near you. [**Hoosiers want change. We can only deliver it if we stand together now. Rush a donation of any amount to the IDP today to help us hold more events, support more candidates, and call out the Republican leaders in our state.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108799495/549048861/1764064610?refcode=250601communities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzIyNzJiNC0yNzNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qerpHuyoxW3Duzqb6Qih7BnZzTKMELRHG2hhZIgkodM=) Next year is an important opportunity to put our state on a path toward better governance and a better future. With the chaos and cuts in Washington and at the Statehouse, this is our time to win more seats across Indiana and the country. **[Will you pledge your support and make a donation to fund our statewide efforts?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108799496/549048862/1764064610?refcode=250601communities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzIyNzJiNC0yNzNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qerpHuyoxW3Duzqb6Qih7BnZzTKMELRHG2hhZIgkodM=)** Thanks,

Ken Paxton is winning his primary against John Cornyn.
That’s right — the indicted, impeached MAGA extremist could be the GOP nominee for U.S. Senate in Texas. And if he is? Democrats have a real shot to flip this seat.
But only if we act NOW.
We need a massive cash surge to make sure the Democrat in this race can launch a full-scale offensive the second Paxton wins the primary.

Senator John Cornyn is up for reelection next year. But he's not running unopposed.
Ken Paxton is primarying him — and right now, Paxton is WINNING!!!
Paxton’s a disgraced MAGA extremist, impeached and indicted, and banned from practicing law in multiple states. He’s Trump’s guy — and Trumpworld is going all in to get him on the ballot.
If Paxton wins the primary, Democrats will have an unprecedented chance to flip this Senate seat. | | The movement to end the Electoral College is making progress,**** friend: Minnesota joined the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact and**Maine's state legislature is working to join as well.** If you don't remember -- The National Popular Vote Interstate Compact (NPVIC) is an agreement among a group of U.S. states and the District of Columbia to award all their electoral votes to whichever presidential candidate wins the overall popular vote in the 50 states and the District of Columbia. **17** **states plus DC have now joined.** Minnesota brought 10 electoral votes, and Maine 4, now **accounting for 209 Electoral College votes of the 270 needed to win the election** and totaling 78% of what is needed to make the popular vote the law of the land. Minnesota passed a slate of voting rights protections alongside joining the compact as well, which represents huge progress. Whether it's through the NPVIC or one of the other legal alternatives, ending the Electoral College forever is a big priority.**[We are going to make this happen! Keep the momentum going and put us over the top so we can end the Electoral College forever with $25 or more today!>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/108800140/549051190/-523723236?am=25.00&contactdata=iM73n7RzNxPnjmHl+Lpl2oS7FgPWZEzdE+NZKl/4hUs25r0yGU/cIoII+7PuTnTAS3FSwFQcjAzMpfKrrBMfZZ36LH3x2TnVtv5ipvni0qY=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3N2EzYWZhLTJiM2YtZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_LWEG2Ck3baE3SWnmsS9lPrUQmzNUaqdnFI_f4qtk68=&emci=f9434010-ff3e-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=c77a3afa-2b3f-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=33603084)**

| | Defenders of voting rights like Cory Booker, AOC, Robert Reich, and Stacey Abrams recognize that the Electoral College is harming our democracy and needs to go. State legislatures in Nevada, Michigan, and more are heeding the call and also considering bills to join the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact. **The Electoral College is the biggest tool that opponents of voting rights have to swing national elections and suppress the will of the people.** We have to take away this dangerous mechanism that enabled the January 6th insurrection by any means necessary. **[The vote suppressors have proven there’s no length they won’t go to in order to win. Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. [**Your support is crucial to our efforts. Minnesota brought 10 electoral votes, and Maine 4, now accounting for 209 Electoral College votes of the 270 needed to win the election and totaling 78% of what is needed to make the popular vote the law of the land. Minnesota passed a slate of voting rights protections alongside joining the compact as well, which represents huge progress. Whether it's through the NPVIC or one of the other legal alternatives, ending the Electoral College forever is a big priority. ---](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=55010b69a9&e=5ccada9200)
|
---
| | | | | Dear Friend,This past week was another busy one, as we passed the “One Big Beautiful Bill” and engaged with community residents at local events across the 7th District. Despite what you may read or hear from the biased media, the “One Big Beautiful Bill” accomplishes many of the things that American taxpayers need and want:✅ Removes illegal immigrants from Medicaid✅ Eliminates taxes on tips and overtime✅ Expands the child tax credit✅ Strengthens our southern border✅ Cuts taxes✅ Supports small business growthThe passage of this bill is part of my work to fulfill the promises I made to make America safer and more secure.
---
|
---
| **McClure, Democrat-Led Counties Continue to Ignore Federal Law, ICE** I was disheartened to learn that Northampton and Lehigh Counties have now been designated as sanctuary counties. This designation stems from the failed policies and executive orders of leaders in both those counties that put criminal illegal immigrants above public safety. Northampton’s Lamont McClure has been especially out-front in these efforts: signing the order that established the policies driving the sanctuary county designation - and then defending and fighting to continue their failures.In recent weeks, McClure has attempted to justify his policy of rejecting ICE detainers, allowing predators and abusers to walk free from prison. This policy has been repeatedly condemned by authorities at ICE for jeopardizing public safety. For instance, on February 21, 2025, ICE arrested a Colombian national outside Northampton County Prison after the county released him despite an immigration detainer request. ICE officials criticized the McClure policy, stating that it "jeopardizes public safety and wastes taxpayer funding" by forcing ICE to divert significant resources to locate and arrest criminal aliens in unpredictable, high-risk public settings. ([ice.gov](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=3e642e9c23&e=5ccada9200))With less than two years until the election, McClure has now decided he wants to take his America Last agenda to Congress - despite repeatedly failing at one of the most basic jobs of county government: working to ensure public safety. As we look ahead, I will continue to push county officials in Lehigh and Northampton to reverse the dangerous policies that earned them this shameful designation, and continue my work to secure our nation’s borders.
---
|
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=c657fa56f5&e=5ccada9200)

**The Future of Local Zoning is in Ned 's Hands - But He is Driving the Bus - Do NOT expect a veto unless there is some other quid-pro-quo. If you want to know your town's "fair share" see this [link](https://substack.com/redirect/64bd1b49-27c6-4a7c-9be5-c8535f1517d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or the interactive [link](https://substack.com/redirect/0f3cd1f6-7d32-45c0-966b-7136af78b093?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
As far as your elected officials, the Democrats allowed some to get a "hall pass" to vote against the final bill (despite supporing it through the amendment process).

**Hall Passes are for High School - Not in Hartford.**
[CT 169 Strong](https://substack.com/redirect/b97a4ffa-300c-448c-9d1c-658769317e77?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- put together the chart on which Democrats really do not represent their towns and were given the hall pass. It is a while until November 2026 but start getting active now.

name: Chris Pappas
subject: I never imagined this was possible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Growing up I never imagined this future was possible, Peter.
#
**I’m Chris Pappas, Democratic candidate for U.S. Senate in New Hampshire.** State Democrats Committee said I could reach out to you today with a special message about Pride.
Growing up gay in New Hampshire, I never imagined this future was possible, Peter.
While I was lucky to receive love and support from family and friends, it was still hard to picture a time when I would be able to live openly let alone be elected to Congress.
I certainly never imagined the community I grew up in would embrace me, believe in me, and elect me to represent them — not just once, but _four times_ in a row.
Now because of the progress we’ve made together, I’m running for U.S. Senate. And if elected **I’d make history as the first openly gay man to ever serve in that chamber.**
**[Will you help me make history? Pitch in $5 to support my grassroots campaign and State Democrats Committee now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89394?refcode=em20250601-8981&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8981%2E614464%2EiR2xkd)**
When I came out there were examples of LGBTQ+ trailblazers – like Harvey Milk – who had been elected to public office. But it wasn’t a very long list. I knew that if I was going to serve my neighbors the way I envisioned, I’d need to break some barriers of my own.
With the support of my community, I became the first openly gay man to represent New Hampshire in Congress back in 2018. I defeated the GOP four times in one of the most competitive districts in the country. Now I’m fighting to keep our U.S. Senate seat blue.
New Hampshire is one of the most critical swing states in this election cycle. Republicans are targeting this race, aiming to flip this competitive seat red and expand their majority.
But we’re going to stop them together, just like we’ve done before. We’re going to keep this seat blue – and we’re going to defy expectations when we take back the Senate.
This campaign means so much, Peter. It’s something that my younger self would never have even imagined. And not only is this race our opportunity to make LGBTQ+ history, it’s a crucial election we can’t afford to lose to the GOP. The stakes are simply too high.
**[If it makes sense for you today, please split a $5 contribution to my campaign and State Democrats Committee right now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89394?refcode=em20250601-8981&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8981%2E614464%2EiR2xkd)**

clean_body: Growing up I never imagined this future was possible, Peter. I’m Chris Pappas, Democratic candidate for U.S. Senate in New Hampshire. State Democrats Committee said I could reach out to you today with a special message about Pride. Growing up gay in New Hampshire, I never imagined this future was possible, Peter. While I was lucky to receive love and support from family and friends, it was still hard to picture a time when I would be able to live openly let alone be elected to Congress. I certainly never imagined the community I grew up in would embrace me, believe in me, and elect me to represent them — not just once, but four times in a row. Now because of the progress we’ve made together, I’m running for U.S. Senate. And if elected I’d make history as the first openly gay man to ever serve in that chamber. When I came out there were examples of LGBTQ+ trailblazers – like Harvey Milk – who had been elected to public office. But it wasn’t a very long list. I knew that if I was going to serve my neighbors the way I envisioned, I’d need to break some barriers of my own. With the support of my community, I became the first openly gay man to represent New Hampshire in Congress back in 2018. I defeated the GOP four times in one of the most competitive districts in the country. Now I’m fighting to keep our U.S. Senate seat blue. New Hampshire is one of the most critical swing states in this election cycle. Republicans are targeting this race, aiming to flip this competitive seat red and expand their majority. But we’re going to stop them together, just like we’ve done before. We’re going to keep this seat blue – and we’re going to defy expectations when we take back the Senate. This campaign means so much, Peter. It’s something that my younger self would never have even imagined. And not only is this race our opportunity to make LGBTQ+ history, it’s a crucial election we can’t afford to lose to the GOP. The stakes are simply too high. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Happy Pride Month, Peter. And thank you – as always – for your kindness and support. With gratitude, Chris Pappas Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

This is _dark_ , team: **Donald Trump signed an executive order to _defund_ NPR and PBS.**

A free, independent press is _essential_ for our democracy, but Trump insists on attacking -- or even _threatening the very existence of_ \-- any outlet that reports on him truthfully! First it was MSNBC, then it was Voice of America, and now it's NPR and PBS.

**We can't stay silent.**

We launched a Live Petition to prove Democrats support NPR and PBS in the face of Trump's escalating threats. _Signing it may be the most important thing you do today._ **We don't have a moment to waste, so add your name right now:**

name: Team Warner
subject: We fell short of our goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
and we simply can’t afford to, Derek.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108800459/549052321/906044162?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_FellShort_250601_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTQ0M2YyMC0zMjNmLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V8HO60Zv6x79kGSHVxq9F6ufQnn1UZMF8TT-VNA2rlM=) Bad news, Derek: our finance team let us know that we didn’t reach our projections for the month of May.

That’s not good. Sure, it’s not the end of the world, but the deeper we get into this 2026 campaign, the more realistic we need to be. We could be badly outspent in this election by some very powerful people—the same billionaires and special interest super PACs that went after Democrats in 2024.

Our fundraising goals are carefully calculated targets we need to meet to fight back against whatever dark money attacks are coming our way.

GOP Rep. Brandon Gill **[faced Kaitlan Collins live on CNN](https://substack.com/redirect/662780ef-f01f-4dff-95be-0eb27abf7015?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , defending President Donald Trump's criticism of "rogue judges" attempting to thwart his trade policy.
Gill was ready for a brawl:
[Watch The Video](https://substack.com/redirect/662780ef-f01f-4dff-95be-0eb27abf7015?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/662780ef-f01f-4dff-95be-0eb27abf7015?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
President Trump and his administration **[strongly criticized the actions of three federal judges](https://substack.com/redirect/4a6e9148-36b7-4d9e-b4bc-def1072e7c53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who ruled against his ability to enact global tariffs, an agenda Trump has ensured will bring back American manufacturing, fix massive trade deficits and address other threats facing the American economy. The judges were appointed by Ronald Reagan, Barrack Obama and Trump himself.
"Congressman, isn't President Trump responsible for who he nominates?" Collins asked Gill.
Gill fired back, "I think that theres a huge problem in this country with rogue judges who are overstepping their authority, abusing their authority to usurp the president's power and to thwart the agenda that voters elected him to do,... that's no democratic?!"
**["We have a huge problem right now](https://substack.com/redirect/662780ef-f01f-4dff-95be-0eb27abf7015?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with large and persistent trade deficits," Gill continued. "That's a national security issue,... (Trump) is taking action to alleviate that problem! I don't think that ruling was proper!"
Watch the full CNN clash here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/662780ef-f01f-4dff-95be-0eb27abf7015?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Rep. Mark Green EXPLODES at Democrats for defending bloated government bureaucrats
## _" They got their a** handed to them!!" _
GOP Rep. Mark Green **[exploded with frustration at Democrats](https://substack.com/redirect/39d32ce8-c264-4aaa-9054-c73b8e4d591b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after Rep. LaMonica McIver suggested a tax hike to pay for the bloated and wasteful government DOGE has been trying to cut down to size.
[Watch The Video](https://substack.com/redirect/39d32ce8-c264-4aaa-9054-c73b8e4d591b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/39d32ce8-c264-4aaa-9054-c73b8e4d591b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"We talked about how 'we're bloated in our budget and we're spending too much money.' There's a simple fix to that, it's called tax the millionaires and billionaires in this country and we wouldn't be in the situation that we're at!" McIver proposed, before calling the White House "silly" and saying Republicans' agenda "doesn't make sense."
**[Green pushed back on the insane suggestion](https://substack.com/redirect/39d32ce8-c264-4aaa-9054-c73b8e4d591b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , giving the Democrats the reality check they desperately need. "How often do we see companies all across the country doing layoffs?" the congressman asked. "It happens all the time. Workers across America have to deal with this all the time, and yet, if you listen to the ranking member you'd think federal employees are immune somehow!"
"The federal government is bloated, we are spending far too much money!" he continued. "All across our government there is a deep dive going on to see how we can cut spending, because we are broke! $37 trillion in debt! It's time for some layoffs!"
**[Green called out the entire Democrat party's true motivation](https://substack.com/redirect/39d32ce8-c264-4aaa-9054-c73b8e4d591b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for opposing fiscally responsible federal cuts, "This is political games! This is them clawing for a piece because they got their ass handed to them! 6 swing states, all the swing states, they lost overwhelmingly!"
Watch Green go off on the Democrats with one of the most impressive rants he's ever had:
[Watch The Video](https://substack.com/redirect/39d32ce8-c264-4aaa-9054-c73b8e4d591b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Gabe Evans
subject: Just one generation.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ElectGabeEvans
body:
| | | Friend, In one generation, my mother went from thinking the best life had to offer was a one-room hut with a dirt floor in Juarez, Mexico to seeing her son sworn into Congress. _**_Only in America is that possible._**_ **My mother did things the right way.****__**_She built her life on_ _faith_ _and_ _patriotism_ _while working hard to create a better life for me. _
---
[](http://links.gabeevansco.com/u/click?_t=eecc4c6a5d3b4a988a63ebf81efb270d&_m=2bcdbd428d184637827f3742ea90ede2&_e=urm73NKZZ5tCw0LAkLFjhnfHwRPZ8lcIaP2dOFd1iblfDszFZohn8zcM5z4ChYDPtT-TvKhL1NWl6Cfk7VTT7gvD6286iBtlxVQAYuTxxnt54p_0_ngOCSKL_kMwXjQDGNyiZM2aP5wB5c90NQOsgWFV6dySWA29CeW-1z-ZnVbbuPtJQMRdNor-O0LvvZi5KipVcqrK5GWf1_V9XA3f3bsz052QU753atS3ZQLJRMMIg86EjMkn-iRrQxsoQGSzfhgNPHUR_lwpuTDb1AOXFMXMJEujMGQf8pHFwoNA448gmyWGLiGeUOrx9LIRpFfPWUeN6ihFBkwufmQY39ISraj7jl1BLW3pKntfuU7Ay3Y%3D)
---
**_I have never stopped paying our nation back for the life that America has allowed us to live. _** In the **Army as a Black Hawk Helicopter pilot** , in my **community as a Police Lieutenant** , for **my state as a wildland** firefighter and **in Congress** – I’ve never forgotten how much I owe my family and my nation for the life I’ve had.
---
[ **HELP ME PAY AMERICA BACK** ](http://links.gabeevansco.com/u/click?_t=eecc4c6a5d3b4a988a63ebf81efb270d&_m=2bcdbd428d184637827f3742ea90ede2&_e=urm73NKZZ5tCw0LAkLFjhnfHwRPZ8lcIaP2dOFd1iblfDszFZohn8zcM5z4ChYDPtT-TvKhL1NWl6Cfk7VTT7gvD6286iBtlxVQAYuTxxnt54p_0_ngOCSKL_kMwXjQDGNyiZM2aP5wB5c90NQOsgWFV6dySWA29CeW-1z-ZnVbbuPtJQMRdNor-O0LvvZi5KipVcqrK5GWf1_V9XA3f3WrEvzpeBdH_FzolnYmB4YKEmiUJzO8x-C8LfRxQMlnbJL7WWkLzAC8sQplNLDfg5dNasolIkSp-ee4ntwMljtv30e1_iIwJgyQAn-NpNfussciQ8x8gh9gHptrTi0cMQnVFWEcw1vER53EReaqJUhQ%3D)
---
_I’m serving in Congress to defend the American Dream—from the same radical Left trying to destroy it._ **_I’m standing for SECURE BORDERS, LAW & ORDER and AMERICA FIRST POLICIES. _**
---
[](http://links.gabeevansco.com/u/click?_t=eecc4c6a5d3b4a988a63ebf81efb270d&_m=2bcdbd428d184637827f3742ea90ede2&_e=urm73NKZZ5tCw0LAkLFjhnfHwRPZ8lcIaP2dOFd1iblfDszFZohn8zcM5z4ChYDPtT-TvKhL1NWl6Cfk7VTT7gvD6286iBtlxVQAYuTxxnt54p_0_ngOCSKL_kMwXjQDGNyiZM2aP5wB5c90NQOsgWFV6dySWA29CeW-1z-ZnVbbuPtJQMRdNor-O0LvvZi5KipVcqrK5GWf1_V9XA3f3b0q9WAsMayI5GxRU-0pqJmeuMMPKvVUGkDsxsLbuWeyuoj4ksgIx76C-kwexCl74RMvD3LG_QoWexGITK0gaMIyjumInpTD4ZPMs6XT3hEOlMnOOng8r1dgBEJEc7-gSZt-RqEJqrRrvZRvCprvv-8%3D)
---
With your help, mine was the **only Republican campaign in the country to flip a seat red in a blue state** in one of the closest races in the nation. **_But there’s a problem._** The radical Left cannot stomach the thought of a Trump-endorsed Hispanic combat veteran making a difference in Washington. They aren’t hiding it. AOC has attacked me personally. Pelosi’s donors are earmarking millions against me. **_The mainstream media has labeled me as the MOST vulnerable Republican in Congress._****__**
---
[ **HELP ME PAY AMERICA BACK** ](http://links.gabeevansco.com/u/click?_t=eecc4c6a5d3b4a988a63ebf81efb270d&_m=2bcdbd428d184637827f3742ea90ede2&_e=urm73NKZZ5tCw0LAkLFjhnfHwRPZ8lcIaP2dOFd1iblfDszFZohn8zcM5z4ChYDPtT-TvKhL1NWl6Cfk7VTT7gvD6286iBtlxVQAYuTxxnt54p_0_ngOCSKL_kMwXjQDGNyiZM2aP5wB5c90NQOsgWFV6dySWA29CeW-1z-ZnVbbuPtJQMRdNor-O0LvvZi5KipVcqrK5GWf1_V9XA3f3SQWXLa5mQluKrWYpRy429PXgntDLY_wCofQHbmj2Gp-ZN-7WrsS_E3_g0_5htYNRFDbSrO7eJu1IujruznNwvSmi7RYzvCz6qUT9g5LoLkpfU-vTlhY84rIJAPUGjWFK-hvNUMctNyISnxWWACS09E%3D)
---
I don’t say this lightly—but without immediate support, I may be forced to make the hardest call of my life: shutting the doors on the campaign my family and I have poured everything into. **_I can’t concede now, not when control of Congress is on the line like it is now. _** **[I’m fighting for the country that gave my family everything. Please, will you stand with me?](http://links.gabeevansco.com/u/click?_t=eecc4c6a5d3b4a988a63ebf81efb270d&_m=2bcdbd428d184637827f3742ea90ede2&_e=urm73NKZZ5tCw0LAkLFjhnfHwRPZ8lcIaP2dOFd1iblfDszFZohn8zcM5z4ChYDPtT-TvKhL1NWl6Cfk7VTT7gvD6286iBtlxVQAYuTxxnt54p_0_ngOCSKL_kMwXjQDGNyiZM2aP5wB5c90NQOsgWFV6dySWA29CeW-1z-ZnVbbuPtJQMRdNor-O0LvvZi5KipVcqrK5GWf1_V9XA3f3fQCROQ4UsrGk8xewBQnVmMrET9v6L6tt-2cyX9DUQg0OgCHn1ie6ARnSjRpAqYvfZ3fVjsmg_Yj7H9r5kU-2xSoarwmjLYR_CstQeYiv8Qt6XrXZ5hIQHZoU-UZEclP7roBUVbEuo_c_ebr-kygzLk%3D)**

clean_body: | | | Friend, In one generation, my mother went from thinking the best life had to offer was a one-room hut with a dirt floor in Juarez, Mexico to seeing her son sworn into Congress. Only in America is that possible. My mother did things the right way._She built her life on faith and patriotism while working hard to create a better life for me. I have never stopped paying our nation back for the life that America has allowed us to live. In the Army as a Black Hawk Helicopter pilot , in my community as a Police Lieutenant , for my state as a wildland firefighter and in Congress – I’ve never forgotten how much I owe my family and my nation for the life I’ve had. I’m serving in Congress to defend the American Dream—from the same radical Left trying to destroy it. I’m standing for SECURE BORDERS, LAW & ORDER and AMERICA FIRST POLICIES. With your help, mine was the only Republican campaign in the country to flip a seat red in a blue state in one of the closest races in the nation. But there’s a problem. The radical Left cannot stomach the thought of a Trump-endorsed Hispanic combat veteran making a difference in Washington. They aren’t hiding it. AOC has attacked me personally. Pelosi’s donors are earmarking millions against me. The mainstream media has labeled me as the MOST vulnerable Republican in Congress._ I don’t say this lightly—but without immediate support, I may be forced to make the hardest call of my life: shutting the doors on the campaign my family and I have poured everything into. I can’t concede now, not when control of Congress is on the line like it is now. Thank you, Gabe Evans | | Paid for by ElectGabeEvans.com | | PO Box 350608 Westminster, CO 80035. Use of Gabe Evans' military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Gabe Evans For Congress

| | | | [****](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUz8-O2yAQBvCnGd9swYDBe_ChreUetlpVlXroKcKAHSoTO_xJmrevsKJIe2TmN_r4lN9XNz96kF8B8exMBERgXwDx-ufuQ_7r37_X5n36UV_Fh2_LFr896Q1f-KLVVdDzv8n8_ojL8Db-Cj_ljb54euz2hZ-hjfXKrWUqh8r0bDaEV7ankncd0k7K6txrwrXiWmrWvk2KcoZ2Rqs6Ngs58clUrkeCLRGEImsp5Y1BlFzxWRLBpO0ocHLkNMrb4LSiMd1VCNvmG735au3PKe3x-NgIOEarc7CNulizpSIAx9VNNqRHvWQVTHkv9WxNHbNLNdZ-qg8FbMzJn-KWg7bAhk8KUJSlt8ZlD2woF8dEK78rt1yADX4CFMpv-ZKADdg-RbKhXCARhJ3ugVahN_vdrauLQgIny9GudLn1-D8AAP__bOKO7g)
[****](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUz8-O2yAQBvCnGd9swYDBe_ChreUetlpVlXroKcKAHSoTO_xJmrevsKJIe2TmN_r4lN9XNz96kF8B8exMBERgXwDx-ufuQ_7r37_X5n36UV_Fh2_LFr896Q1f-KLVVdDzv8n8_ojL8Db-Cj_ljb54euz2hZ-hjfXKrWUqh8r0bDaEV7ankncd0k7K6txrwrXiWmrWvk2KcoZ2Rqs6Ngs58clUrkeCLRGEImsp5Y1BlFzxWRLBpO0ocHLkNMrb4LSiMd1VCNvmG735au3PKe3x-NgIOEarc7CNulizpSIAx9VNNqRHvWQVTHkv9WxNHbNLNdZ-qg8FbMzJn-KWg7bAhk8KUJSlt8ZlD2woF8dEK78rt1yADX4CFMpv-ZKADdg-RbKhXCARhJ3ugVahN_vdrauLQgIny9GudLn1-D8AAP__bOKO7g) Patriot,

Picture me in a dimly lit room, pouring over tapes, piecing together a story that could shake the foundations of power.

That’s what I do—go undercover, expose corruption, and show you what the elite don’t want you to see. But right now, **those I’ve exposed are fighting back** , and [**I need your help before it’s too late for me.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUz8-O2yAQBvCnGd9swYDBe_ChreUetlpVlXroKcKAHSoTO_xJmrevsKJIe2TmN_r4lN9XNz96kF8B8exMBERgXwDx-ufuQ_7r37_X5n36UV_Fh2_LFr896Q1f-KLVVdDzv8n8_ojL8Db-Cj_ljb54euz2hZ-hjfXKrWUqh8r0bDaEV7ankncd0k7K6txrwrXiWmrWvk2KcoZ2Rqs6Ngs58clUrkeCLRGEImsp5Y1BlFzxWRLBpO0ocHLkNMrb4LSiMd1VCNvmG735au3PKe3x-NgIOEarc7CNulizpSIAx9VNNqRHvWQVTHkv9WxNHbNLNdZ-qg8FbMzJn-KWg7bAhk8KUJSlt8ZlD2woF8dEK78rt1yADX4CFMpv-ZKADdg-RbKhXCARhJ3ugVahN_vdrauLQgIny9GudLn1-D8AAP__bOKO7g)

Let me tell you about one battle. I tracked down Jamie Mannina, a former FBI agent who thought his secrets were safe. I had him on video, his own words that betrayed America.

When I confronted him, he didn’t defend himself—he lashed out, screaming, “You’re a fraudster! Get away!” I stayed calm, letting his outburst speak for itself. That tape went viral, **but now Mannina’s suing me for “assault” and “slander,”** trying to bury me in court for daring to hold him accountable.

Then there’s Project Veritas, the group I built from the ground up.
